We ordered the Meghana special chicken biryani. The rice and chicken are packed separately for delivery. Each grain of rice was perfectly cooked and infused with the rich flavor of the spices. The chicken pieces are small, juicy, tender of meat that added a unique flavor when combined with the rice. However, the raitha was not that great.
Overall loved the flavor and definitely would recommend to everyone.

Author: Suchetha Karanth
Description: Meghana Foods is a go-to destination for biryani enthusiasts, offering an amazing array of this flavorful dish. What sets it apart is its commendable selection of biryani options for vegetarians, catering to a diverse range of preferences. The portions are substantial, with one order proving to be fulfilling, making it an ideal spot for families seeking a hearty meal. While the absence of soup options might be a drawback for some, the overall experience at Meghana Foods is a treat, especially for non-vegetarians who can relish the rich and diverse flavors of their biryani offerings.

Author: Prithi
Description: Good biriyani, good sides and good ambience. Everything is a bit too spicy- but biriyani needs to be spicy to taste good. It will hit you in the face while having it but after awhile you will end up craving the same. The restaurant is clean and waiters are very attentive, the drinks we had are lime soda and meghna spl sarbath which is nothing special, its just fine but you will need something sweet right after to balance out the spice. Overall this place is recommended for people who like spicy food and if your not good with spice also recommended - there is a cream stone down the block for dessert. I dont know if its just me or if there really is a difference between the meghna spl biriyani and the other normal biriyanis- all tasted the same. The starters also had a meghna spl 555 which tasted pretty similar to every other chicken starters we tried.

Author: Shashi Kumar
Description:
We visited Meghna foods for a late lunch on a Sunday. Despite menu was shared, we came to know that only boneless chicken briyani is available and under beverage only soft drinks were available. First of all I dont understand concept of boneless chicken briyani, as its chicked cooked with some gravy served on top of briyani rice ( read flavored rice). If chicken and rice are cooked separately how it is a chiken biryani? The taste was not what we expected.

Better inform at the entry itself that only 2 items are available rather giving menu to decide and then get disappointed as your desired item is not available.

Service was not upto the mark, we saw order was received to tables where people come after us. Even salads were not served to us despite asking for it. We have to remind the service guy multiple times to give salad and tumblers.

Author: Ayush Kumar
Description:
I ordered Meghana Special Chicken Biryani and when the delivery was made and when I opened it, to my surprise chicken was missing from the biriyani. The packet in which chicken should be there was only more rice. I threw everything.

I called them and the guy just quipped, "Call Zomato" and cut the call. It was so disappointing and the monetary loss is nothing in front of that.

Don't order delivery. I don't say that this will also happen to you but there is a high chance of it happening, after which there won't be any accountability. So, you might be better off ordering from somewhere else or if possible cook something. Because ordering from here is risky and they certainly don't care.

Added the pics as proof.

Mark my words, the rating is an illusion.

Update: Zomato delivery has also not taken the responsibility. Even after multiple mails explaining them the issue.

My favourite restaurant in Bangalore
We can get delicious biriyanis
Exspecilly spl & boneless biriyanis are too good
Chicken 555, lemon chicken, pepper chicken, chicken pakoda are best staters here

Author: Srikanth Reddy Baddipadaga
Description:
Ordered chicken biryani from marathahalli branch, I dont understand what's wrong with Bangalore restaurants, taking 300 bucks and not providing enough quantity of rice, Before checking this out I have ordered from diff restaurants but after reading reviews on Zomato, I thought this restaurant could be the one but unfortunately not and I don't find it amazing when it comes to taste or as per reviews,
i miss Hyderabad's shah ghouze biryani..

Author: Tejas Jee
Description:
Tried special chicken biriyani ! The quality was fantastic ,the taste was fantastic , the quantity was also great but the chicken was not that good :/
4 out of 5stars

Author: Himanshu
Description: If you been visiting b'lore's pubs and restaurants, you must have heard Meghana's biryani. Well, the restaurant looks a little bit shady, and the waiters were also kind of busy on their own, but as soon as you take your first bite, you'll have this utterly delicious taste of andra masalas and soft juicy chicken which make you forget about the surrounding. I would insist you on going for 1 chicken biryani and 1 chicken side dish for 2 people. Trust me the portion is appropriate for 2 though they will suggest for for going 2 biryanis for 2 people.

Author: Karthik
Description:
Very nice biryanis .
We tried dum alu and paneer. It was contentful . Panner should have been little soft, else everything was perfect.
The texture of rice and the aroma was perfect. Raita made a good combo for the biryani.
Recommended

Author: Sukanya
Description:
We had been here on a Sunday. The place was damn crowded with delivery people of Zomato, Swiggy etc and were making a lot of noise. It was really very disturbing and exceedingly annoying as the place was full of chaos.

The quantity of the food was far greater than expected for the price which felt good. We had ordered Chicken Biryani and Aloo Dum Biryani. However, the taste was not that great. The staff looked like they were distracted ( anyone would be due to the chaos around).

My experience with Meghana Foods outlets at Kormangala and near Brigade Road were very good in terms of ambience, order and the taste of food. I think the experience would not have been this bad on the weekdays. However, I am a big fan of Meghana's biryani!

Author: Hungry Robin
Description: I was home and I didn't want to cook and I craved a biryani to top that. There are so many options around and so I had to make a decision based on the available reviews. I'm glad I chose to order the Chicken Biryani from Meghana Grand. It was delicious and one plate is more than enough for two people. There were decent portions of meat and the rice was long-grained and fragrant with spices. The food arrived super fast - it was hot and it was well packaged. I'm so ordering from here again!

Author: Kumar Aryan
Description: Ordered thumps up and meghana has given me pepsi instead of that. Didn't expect this type of service from meghana even they are charging 15 rupees more from MRP.

Author: Hemanth
Description: Good restaurant. I use to order chicken fried rice regularly from this restaurant. But some times the chicken taste would not taste that much better

Author: SATHISH KUMAR
Description: Paneer Biryani was so good.. they can give paneer masala separately which you can add it in Biryani. Veg kadai is also good. Overall liked it very much even my kids too :)

Author: Khyati Shah
Description:
We tried Paneer Biryani and Chicken Boneless Biryani from here. The quantity is huge for the price and we loved the overall taste of both the Biryani's. Both the Biryani's had a good amount of paneer and chicken given with it. Highly recommend you to try this place out.

Overall verdict:

Taste: 10/10
Service:10/10
Value for money: 10/10
As we ordered for home delivery I can't rate their ambience.

Follow @the_gastrophile_ on Instagram for more food related posts.

Author: Pankajini Das
Description: I always like to order food from Meghana Grand for Prawn Biryani.More I like the they way the packed the food. .But this order was not expected by quantity and quality .

Author: Sandeep P
Description:
Quick service & decent interiors, food was not as expected so only my rating goes 3. lollipop biriyani and meghana special was something we have ordered as we are in a hurry, quick delivery i guess food is prepared in advance which raises other doubts. 

Food tasted good so it compensates minor errors. Prices are bit high. Will certainly go again to try the starters n all other stuff.

Author: Prasanta Kumar Seth
Description: Ordered boneless chicken Biryani . But received only Biryani rice and raita . Service is very bad . Don't order from here . They don't cross check the items before delivery ....

Author: Ramu Sesha Reddy
Description: Ordered chicken biryani from this place. The taste, temperature, quantity, quality, packaging everything was great. Its really a good place for biryani lovers, if they are always in search of authentic biryani

Author: Satya Satya
Description: What a great experience we had. I visited this place with my friends and just loved the food here.the waiter was too friendly and kind to serve the food on time and hot

Author: Sunanina S
Description: Nice service from restaurant. I always order Meghana special boneless Biryani. Packaging and food handling is very good. Keep up the good work

Author: Manu Manu
Description: Excellent quality and tasty food. Many times coupons are not applicable here , that is a bit expensive but got convinced after tasting the marvelous food

Author: Rahul Raju Dusa
Description:
Staff and Ambience : Online order so no comments

Food : yummy tasty chicken Biryani. Mutton was not great for parcel. But I did try at hotel and it was great. It is andhra style as they say. One should not be expecting a true hyderabadi dum Biryani though.

Price : Reasonable. Can't complain much as this is the best Biryani place i could satiate my Biryani cravings.

Packing : I liked the special chicken Biryani packaging esp giving that extra chicken and gravy topping in separate pack amd not mixing it with the rice.

Author: Soubhik
Description:
I orders chicken biryani through zomato, the biryani met my expectations. The quantity was sufficient for 2 persons. You could get the rich tastes of all the spices used in the biryani. The aroma was really mesmerising.

I would definitely recommend this to people in Bangalore apart from the traditional biryani centres in and around Bangalore.

Author: Sainagabhairu27
Description: Recently ordered biryani on online its superb taste and quality also super , one of the best restaurant available for biryani visit once for best biryani

Author: Richa Kulshrestha
Description:
While en route to Banglore, I got a chance to explore this “not-so-common” item called "Paneer Biryani". With the only a handful of restaurants now catering to this experience, I liked this masala balanced not so spicy, well-cooked biryani. 
I also tried the baby corn Manchurian which was okayish.

Author: Khadeer
Description: The food was good as always and spicy. The chicken Biryani should include chicken with it. But, they provided seperately. You can always eat here for good Biryani

Author: Pulkita Bhatia
Description: This place remains as one of the best places to eat biryani in Bangalore. Dum aloo and paneer biryani are very good.Must try according to us.

Author: Ginger Garlic
Description: Biryanis at the best. You like spicy food, you are at the right place. The quantity of one item can be shared by two. You get to taste some of the authentic dishes of Andhra Pradesh.

Author: Devi Sundaram
Description: We ordered many items, The overall food is good, but mutton biriyani quantity was less, we didn't get the spice separately for it. Peas masala was with dry peas n very spicy.

Author: Tyrion Lannister
Description:
Visited this place on weekday for lunch, though the crowd was there, we got the table quickly.
Tried dragon chicken(named as meghana special in menu) and mutton kheema biryani. Both were really good. Taste and quantity.

Author: Akhil Khatri
Description:
Meghana Foods Grand is one of those restaurants which is very consistent with the food quality and taste. I have tried at least 25 of their food items and I must mention that every single item was very good. The portion size is very good too.

Just one thing which I hope they work on is their staff. At times, the staff gets hyper or make silly mistakes of serving wrong dishes during rush hour, and takes too long a time to prepare food.

Overall, it's a must visit place. Do give it a first try and you shall visit again and again. And yeah, missed to mention about their delivery. It's usually impressive. The food is delivered on time and fresh and hot.

Author: SGJi
Description: Ordered chef's special biryani. Real bad stuff. Felt nauseated after eating their pathetic biryani. Rice was of very poor quality. Chicken pieces were very few. 320 bucks went down the drain. Quantity of rice is enough for 2 people. But avoid this place. Dont go by their rating as it is all managed.

Author: Pamela Banerjee
Description: Service is very prompt - anything you order is bound to be served at your table within five minutes. I found the Biriyani to be very flavour-ful, not overwhelmingly spicy. Same goes for the Chicken fry . But weight watchers will definitely be in shock to see the amount of oil floating in the chicken fry or even, the biriyani. Another negative point I found was - both the items were reheated and served to us - I missed the freshness of a dish.&amp;nbsp; Nevertheless, it is a bustling joint - I loved the attention they were giving to each customer inspite of the huge crowd.

Author: Murali Allam
Description: Only wasted masala u deliver to the customers, how people can eat only masala rice. This is like horrible service by u. Not once every time it was same experience. No more u in my list. Greedy management hungry customers.

Author: Ramakoteswararao V
Description:
I had ordered a chicken biryani and egg biryani from meghana but the taste was not good.The rice could have been more cooked.
Taste is average. We can get better biryani in other place with low price.

Author: Nagesh Dutt
Description:
I Visited this restaurant multiple times. Specially when I miss Briyani. Bcoz of restaurant is very close to my home and delicious food.

I loved here boneless chicken biryani and megha special biryani. Food taste wise always tasty.

Service would be really appreciated if it is little faster. Ambiance was very good.

Must recommend everyone.

Author: Seshagiri.jadda
Description: We ordered 2 Meghana special chicken biryani from marathahalli branch and it  was not good. it is bitter in taste due to over fried masala and too oily.

Author: Debjeet Basak
Description: They specialize in biryanis. We ordered chicken, egg and panner biryanis. The food was really good. The quantity of their biryani is mentionworthy. It is more than enough for a single person. Ambience and service were okay. And it was a good experience.

Author: Sathiyendran
Description: This one is the closed Megana to my place and have visited multiple times. Fav of their dish is Chicken Boneless Biriyani and Megha Spl Biriyani.

Author: Harsha Gupta
Description:
Boneless chicken biryani here is one of the best biryani I have tasted in Bangalore. Their starters are also amazing.
A must try place in Bangalore.

Author: Nikhilkrishna58
Description:
This is what I found in the biryani .

Zero hygiene ,imagine people who just ate the same batch of food ,disgusting.

I want the restaurant to take this seriously and apologise .

Will never visit nor order from this shitty place

Author: Vishaal S
Description:
FOOD ALERT #FOODONTHEROAD

WHERE : MEGHANA BIRIYANI , BANGALORE

WHAT : BIRIYANI , BIRIYANI , BIRYIANI

WAS IN A ROAD TRIP FROM CHENNAI TO BANGALORE.

Have got some positive and must try spot about this place and yes this is the worth the try and hype

Banglore la Andhra style biriyani that’s the oneliner of this restaurant

This place has 5 outlets in Bangalore I reckon will put the location of the shop below

Our order:

Mutton Biriyani (301₹) : This is simple hydrabadi mutton biriyani (yes that rice and mutton masala combo) was really good. The mutton was so soft and tender and tasted soo good

Mutton Kheema Biriyani (313₹): This was wow . perfect blended mutton kheema masala and served with that biriyani rice . This was soo good and the kheema was just mouth watering and I literally started to drool.

Meghana’s Spl Biriyani (Chicken) (258₹): Their signature dish it seems . The masala was spicy and tasted soooooo good the chicken was like that Andhra chicken gravy tasted good

Mushroom Biriyani(270₹): Yipieeeeee Haven’t tried a a veg biriyani like this the mushroom tasted sooo good that at one point of time I taught it was a mutton piece (sorry sorry sorry)

Prawn Biriyani(315₹): For seafood lovers this will be a treat for you guys a must try this one as well

Chicken Fry Biriyani(258₹):Andhra chicken masala (spiced) and tasted soooooo good

Tandoori Chicken Full(455₹): Regular chicken tandoori tasted good and that mint chutney they served was lit

DISCLAIMER: All biriyani will be a combo of gravy and rice (that’s the hydrabadi biriyani) and the quantity was huge so plan accordingly

Overall a must try food spot in Bangalore especially for biriyani lovers

Food :4/5

Price:4/5

Ambiance: 4/5

Hospitality:4/5

Author: Abirami Sathiavasagam
Description: Excellent place for tasty biryani and yummy starters as well...Crowded place... you'll have to wait for sometime during peak hours...Decent place to dine at..a must try restaurant 🥰

Author: Deepanjan Banerjee
Description: Enjoyed some good andhra dum biriyani along with chicken butter masala. If i stayed in bangalore I'd come every weekend. Service is good too and it has a reasonable rate. 4/5

Author: Prabhat Dey
Description: I enjoyed my food here. The biryani is superbbb here. This is the one of the best restaurant in Bangalore specially for biryani and services.

Author: Nrusingha Behera
Description: Meghana foods Grand is one of the best places in marathalli to feed your hungry tummy with the delicious Biryani, its biryani would leave you licking your fingers and with utmost satisfaction....

Author: Ranjitha KL
Description: I am very big fan of Meghana, I have visited all the outlets in Bangalore. MG road meghana is my favorite among all. Recently I have ordered mutton biriyani and lemon chicken from Marattahalli meghana. Lemon chicken is really awesome but mutton biriyani is worst it’s completely filled with masala no rice no proper mutton pieces.. I am not blaming the restaurant, please don’t do it for food parcel...we really like meghana... I personally suggested many for this restaurant. If it disappoints like this then, sooner it will loose its name of quality.

Author: SHAURYA RATNA
Description: I had ordered a special chicken biryani from here... The chicken and biryani were separate first of all... So it was a little disappointing as I am used to biryani in hyderabad... But the taste was good and chicken was perfect blend of spices.. The rice could have been more cooked.

Author: Koyel Biswas
Description: This used to be our most favorite biriyani place. Today we ordered the food via zomato. As usual the chicken biriyani.. Sad but the road side and office canteen chicken biriyani taste better... Never going to order it again. 283 rs was a waste.

Author: TaNuJa
Description: Meghanas is the best restaurant in Bangalore for Andhra style biriyani ! Had paneer biriyani and turns to be the best i ever tried! Must visit

Author: Pravallika Reddy
Description: Who doesn’t love this biryani of course everyone does Meghana biryani is a must try one and I love it and starters are amazing and I atleast go to Meghana biryani weekly 3 times

Author: Mukund Makwana
Description:
This people give bill before they serve order..

Imagine, your food came and same time your bill also received.. Before you start having food, they start asking you to pay bill..

Author: Krishna Metlapalli
Description: Ordered 2 boneless biryani but i got biryani rice chicken packets are missing ..immediately i called up restaurent instead of asking for apology with a rude manner he is saying "if you want come and collect yourself" ..this shows true colors of service here keep it up.

Author: Rajaram R Talekar
Description:
Quality food and very good customer service is good as well.
Nice ambience. Value for money spent. little crowded during peak hour making it difficult to get table.

Author: Debjit Adak
Description:
Meghana Biryani is famous all around Bangalore and they don't disappoint. I previously had been to their kormangala branch and loved it. So when a few friends suggested this, it was a no brainer! There are 2 floors with ample seating options. Since we went for lunch at 2am, the place was bursting with energy. There were so many waiters and servers running around. We ordered a paneer Biryani and a Meghna special Biryani. And a chicken kebab. Loved the kebabs and the paneer Biryani was good. Somehow we didn't really like the Meghna special chicken Biryani. Wish we had ordered the normal chicken Biryani instead. Anyway, it was ok. The Biryani was atomatic, hot and flavourful. And we didn't have to wait long. The servers were pretty quick with our orders. Good experience. Will visit again.

Overall:
Food: 4/5
Service: 5/5
Ambience: 3/5
Value for money: 4/5

Author: Swarna Routray
Description: I felt the place is a little overrated. We had ordered chicken biryani(bone) bt I didn't like it that much, maybe coz I had alot of expectations from the place. They had Meghana spcl 555 starter which was okay. And Andhra special chilli chicken cud have been better.

Author: Jit Saha
Description: The place is not quite cheap compared to overall experience. The ambiance was congested on the sunday noon. We ordered pepper chicken, Andhra style chicken, chicken Biryani and lollipop biryani. Lollipop biryani was disappointing. Chicken biriyani was ok. Pepper chicken tasted great and Andhra style chicken was good too. Starter quantity was impressively more which kind of validates the price.

Author: Prutha Desai
Description:
It is a good place for having lunch and visit with family and friends. The biryani served is really tasty, spicy and in good quantity.
Service- 2.5/5
Ambiance- 3.5/5

Author: Jilani Sayyad
Description: Dear Team, quantity is very less it is not sufficient in my family even kept high money.my suggestion is to provide better quality so that it will be useful to the customer.

Author: Reddy Bhuvan
Description: I was order one lollypop biryani and one bone less biryani. They was delivered only one bone less biryani and one Biriyani rice only. Don't believe them. Go with physically and get it and save your money as well.

Author: Srisindhu4376
Description:
Service was polite and friendly.
Ambience was good to hangout with friends and family.
Food was very tasty and hygienic and served nicely ....

Author: Ashok Raj
Description:
Meghana foods team least bothers about any missing items in the order, when you call them to check about the missing order. they ask to call Zomato regarding refund and then when you call zomato, they say you have to contact Meghana food. 

They don't care about your order, absolute apathy towards the customer.

i wish there was "0" to rate their customer service

Author: Nikita Mishra
Description: Have visited this place multiple times. My favourite dish to order is Meghna Spl. Chicken biryani. I have tried paneer biryani , chinese fish fried. Out of these fish fried was not good. Except for that very reasonable price for biryani. Must visit for it. Keep it up.

Author: Aishwarya
Description:
The veg meals is absolutely amazing. Especially the podi and rice.
Paneer Biryani was average, not so spicy or masaladar.
Dum aloo biryani comes with really big aloo pieces. Again very average
Paneer 65 was too hard and rubbery.
Golden Babycorn was not cripy, instead long and flimsy.
Not a very good experience this time.

Author: Bharat Sharma
Description: One of the Best biriyani I had in a while. Just loved the taste. The environment in the restaurant is good. It's a good place to visit with family and friends. Great and fast service and worth for money. The chicken and mutton pieces was wel prepared and nicely cooked and rice and masala properly cooked. They have big sapce, Valet parking available and One the best option we can eat on banana leaf or even you can choose normal plates, Rate was ok. Overall it's one the best place to try biryani.

Author: Abhisekh Das
Description:
The biriyani served is really tasty , spicy and is good quantity - very much appreciated for food .
Ambience - not good its little bit messy place.
Service - ok ok .

Author: Shobha Nand Das
Description: Last to last Friday we went here. Good taste. Nati chicken biryani was good. We got little spicy food but if you say less spicy then prepare that way( I guess). Cost is little high compare to biryani at other place. Good service. Liked it.

Author: Sushanto Bhattacharya
Description:
Ordered fish biryani from here recently. The fish pieces were good and tasty but the problem with the dish is they just took some biryani rice which wasn't flavorful and gave it with the fish pieces in some gravy kind of. The taste was good but it didn't mean a fish biryani..the rice didn't have the flavor of fish at all.
Will try other times and probably then the rating might change. For now 3/5

Author: SubbaRao
Description: Ambience is not good. It's like a market. They take 1st order immediately so the customers will not leave. But for intermittent order, they will make you to sit for hours. Taste is good.

Author: Mahesh
Description:
We ordered spl fish fry ,chicken fry pice biryani super testey, sarvice also very good .
one of the best biryanis
Bangalore

Author: Blank
Description: Testfds kjfdsjklfdsljkfds lkdsfjklsfdjkldfsjkld fsdlkjfdsjlkfdjklfdlj fsdlkdfsjkfdsjlflsjkd fdjlslkfsjlfs klsdfjkfdjksfdjk fskjfdsjkfdljfds fsdlkfsdljk'">

Author: Suresh P
Description: Oorder home delivery very quick good very resty food ckn maharaja meg 555 fishappllow boneless biriyani maintenance good perfect time👌👌👌👌👌👌👌👍superb

Author: Himanshi Bhugra
Description: One of the best biryani places in Bangalore . Strongly recommended. Must try : Meghana special biryani, Chicken boneless biryani and Paneer Biryani for vegetarians.

Author: Murali
Description: Chicken Boneless Biryani is my favorite all time. I always love to order this Boneless Biryani when I have Biryani in my mind to eat. It will be a special Recipe of meghana for Biryani

Author: Sheela Sijin
Description: The biriyani here spoils u forever coz after having biriyani here, u won’t like any other biriyani anywhere else!!  best biriyani ever!!! Must try!

Author: Pooja Majage
Description: Heaven for biriyani lovers. The food is perfectly spicy. Cooperative staff and at the best prices possible. Need more outlets around the city.

Author: Mahesh_naidu
Description: Chef's special is not so special after all they didn't even look at requests during order and food is cold even delivery time is around 15min never gonna order again from this place I don't know how it get 4star rating on zomato

Author: Rahul Kumar
Description:
Ambiance - 3.5/5
Food - 4/5
Service - 1/5

Four friends visited the place on Sunday evening. We were the second people to take a table.

Food first, biryani is good(both veg and chicken) as was the expectations. Paneer gravy is average, didn't like it much.

Now the disappointing part. The menu has a soft-drink option of 600ml but they won't serve you. It is there in restaurant but it will only be provided in online orders even though it is on menu. The staff would not serve until asked even though he has nothing to do than standing few feets next to you. Overall due to multiple things, was disappointed by the service provided.

They shouldn't behave this way especially when they have good competition nearby.

Author: Murali Dhar
Description: My group visits dinning best place for family order lollipop spl fish fry Meghan a 555 sholey kabab mein course boneless biriyani totally superb taste excellent

Author: Neha Hiremath
Description:
Had been here for a team lunch!! A colleague suggesed we try this place.
Tried:
Mushroom chilli (2/5)
Panner biriyani (3/5)
Honest opinion : the place is over rated!

Author: Shan
Description: Meghana special Chicken Biryani Boneless on of my Best i loved that Biryani and the packing also good.. Only giving 3 star because they are not given hot food so

Author: MeK
Description:
Have been here atleast 5 times over the last one year, but must say that the quality and service has deteriorated over the period of time.

Meghna Biryani swears by the Biryani.. and on a Sunday they were serving only one biryani and that was the boneless biryani. Having no choice ordered that. The rice was cooked separate and lacked flavours for sure. The chicken was also not cooked perfectly. The taste was just average.

And for a Biryani they took 20 mins to serve. Pretty long for something that shoukd be ready.

We also ordered fish fry and ghee rice. Fish was fresh, but the taste was pretty average.

Need to improve quality or will start losing customers

Author: Umesh M
Description: The place, famous for its biriyani and it doesn't disappoint. The mutton biriyani is my favourite here. I have even tried paneer biriyani here and its's good. Very pocket friendly place and surely worth the visit.

Author: Shahin
Description: I ordered home delivery from meghanafoods grand marthalli very fast delivery food tasty specially guntur ckn sholey kabab boneless biriyani famous

Author: Rajiv Reddy V S
Description: I had very good experience with all other Meghana foods outlet, took team with same expectation, however we were totally disappointed, non veg was served to veg folks, this was the worst that could have happened, and the bike parked outside was towed away, this probably was our mistake, but want to point out that there is no proper parking facility. Finally when we went to pay the bill, they say swiping machine is not working. Overall was a very BAD experience.

Author: Djay Warrior
Description: Chicken biryani which was prepared here was very yummy was tasty I liked very much. But fully crowded area in the weekends. But the taste is superb

Author: Mallikarjuna Arjun
Description: Hi meghana foods Grand I had for lunch yesterday food very tasty particular boneless chicken biriyani excellent ckn Maharaja also good good maintenance 👌👌👌👌👌superb

Author: Saranprasad Medisetty
Description: They charged 32 rupees for a AQUAFINA Water Bottle where the actual MRP is 19. They slapped me a bill of 30 rupees with Rs.2/- GST. I shocked by seeing the bill.

Author: K.suresh Reddy Sure
Description: I ordered Home delivery very fast food was delicious very taste spl 🐠 fry surging Meghana 555 lolipop chicken boneless Britani excellent overall good

Author: Anvitha Ann
Description: I always order biryani from meghana foods but the biryani which i ordered today was horrible.. Instead of chiken biryani u shud rename it as chicken salt biryani.. N the masala was also not mixed properly.. Uff horrible taste...

Author: Swati Khatter
Description:
I found a difference in quality of Biryani ordered and when had there. Would always prefer having there.
When had there, the biryani was super tasty.
Would have def given it a 5 star, had it been of the same taste during home delivery too.

Author: Ganesh Shetty
Description: Famous for biriyani, so we were here to try it and liked both the non veg chicken biriyani and the veg paneer biriyani. Other dishes were okay okay. Worth visiting the place only for the biriyani. Decently priced.

Author: Alok Dey
Description:
If you are a biryani lover then Meghna foods is place to go.
I have been to this place multiple times and will continue going there whenever I'll feel the craving of biryani.
Sadly I am a vegetarian/eggiterian so couldn't try much.
I tried veg special, paneer and egg biryani till now and all these were pretty spicy. I would definitely recommend this place to all.

Author: Chandrika
Description: Visited this place after listening from almost everyone.. about their biryani... But either i was keeping too hope from this after listening from all.. or they are not really best.. yes within this area this might be best... But this is not best you can eat...so from my side i will give 3.5 only.. for both veg and non veg .. nothing new and extra ordinary in their biryani

Author: Saurabh Rakesh
Description:
These people are cheaters. Along with food we ordered 3 cold drinks with MRP in bottle as ₹18. They charged ₹30.
Same they did for water bottle. For MRP of ₹19 they charged ₹30.
They show a newspaper cutting attached in this review for justification.
I am not sure how fake this clip is.

Guys be careful with such frauds.

Author: Ravi Teja
Description: The Food here is great, this is very typical andhra style restaurant.The biryani here is superb and the taste here stays usually constant thats what i like about it and the service is also great but at times it feels slow . I also liked the andhra meal over here , i guess this is the only place i can get proper ulavacharu in my meal which i like it a lot

Author: Ajit Mahapatra
Description: Meghana Special Biryani is just wonderful! Biryani lovers must give it a try👍 for an unforgettable experience. Add to that Apollo fish 🎏 as a starter 😀

Author: Sandeep
Description:
Meghana foods - Marathahalli....

Expensive yet average food
Need 10-15 min to get a coke from fridge
Ans when asked about charging coke more than MRP, didn't have a explanation and gave me some card to read.

Not visiting this place again....

Author: Gopi Govardhan
Description: I ordered home delivery very fast delivery orderd spl fish fry and ckn sholey kabab Meghana spl biryani royala seems very tasty thanks formeghana foods grand'

Author: Veera Pandian
Description:
Actually I loved this place as well as Briyani.
Good Ambience.
Good Service.
There is no other words to describe the taste .I will give 1000% ..

Author: Tummy Buuny😋😋😋
Description:
Excellent food
Good ambience
Good response
Taste was really AWSOME
Had so many times from here same taste and same response
Once atmosphere
Loved it
👌👌👌👌😋😋😋😋😋😋
I suggest this place for families

Author: Srinivas R
Description: One of the most popular biriyani boneless ckn biriyani hear meals also very tasty weekend very crowd meghana 555 famous service good best place for andhra style food superb 👍👍👍👍👍👍👍

Author: Payal Khandelwal
Description: One of my favorite places to have biryani in Bangalore. Love their paneer biryani 😍. Service- 4/5; Ambience-4/5; Food-5/5. Would definitely recommend this place.

Author: Sridhar Bellam
Description:
Quantity of biryani reduced to half at the same price. Quality is same. Increasing the price should be considered as option instead of stripping the quantity to half.

Recent order, they are back to earlier quantity

Author: Supriya Nayan
Description: It is located on the service road, you may miss out if not observed. We had alu biriyani and veg biriyani also Panner chilli starter. Chilli Panner was okay but those biriyanis pored all the stars. It was amazing, truly the best.

Author: Satish Krishna
Description:
Ambience - 3.5/5

Food - 4.5/5

Pricing - 4/5

The biriyani is what the place is famous for. That is what keeps me coming back again and again to the place. Along with chicken biriyani, other dish that I would recommend is the chicken lollypop. Veggies can try paneer or potato biriyani.

Author: Ankita Sinha
Description: Food is outstanding Meghana special chicken Biryani is a must try dish ambience is average and service is very fast it's always always super crowded

Author: Mahesh Savalagi
Description: cool place n Very good taste...specially boneless chicken Biryani yumm and in starters lemon chicken is very good option...love to go there often

Author: Muneer Ahmad
Description: Excellent food with impeccable taste, ordered biryani today it was just splendid!! Well done zoomato team, on time delivery, extremely good experience!!!

Author: Soorya Sahu
Description:
It's 8:22 PM and the restaurant says tht they don't have Chicken Biryani (bone) for dinein but on the same time tht item is available on online swiggy zomato nd ubereats.
The service guy always wants us to order boneless which we don't like. If i wish to eat chicken Biryani bone then you can't Force it. Zero stars for the 3rd class management.

Author: Aasish Kumar
Description: One of the best biryanis I ever had and I will have till I stay in Bangalore. Starters will be too tasty making us to order more and more. And I love meghanas boneless biryani it's a must try.

Author: Nixon Mendez
Description:
I have heard so much about the Meghana biryani and I was wondering what is the buzz all about. So I decided let me try out their biryani. Apparently, they have 3 floors to accommodate so many customers. Coming to food what caught was the Meghana special chicken Biryani and the Meghana Chicken 555. So the Meghana Special Biryani was that the chicken and egg was cooked together so that chicken so fluffy and soft. The biryani was so delicious and it had so much quantity that 2 people could eat it. The Meghana Chicken 555 consisted of strips of chicken which was cooked with spices. It was spicy and also tasty and I love it.

The service was good, the waiters knew what they are serving. The food was served without any delay. Overall loved it all.

Online delivery

So we had a small office party and I suggested that we can order from Meghana.

We had ordered my favourite Meghana Chicken 555, Paneer 65, Chicken Lollipop as starters and Meghana special biryani, Lollipop biryani, Boneless Chicken Biryani and Paneer Butter Masala.

The chicken Lollipop had such unique taste and flavours. The paneer 65 was good, with tasty spicy coating outside and the soft paneer inside. The paneer butter masala was bit oily though but the taste compensated it. Moving on to the Biryani I loved all of them. The boneless chicken masala was a bit spicy but that was the punch in it. The packing of the food was good there were sufficient gravy and raita for all. Again Meghana food has never let me down.

Location ➡️ Meghana Foods Grand (Marathahalli, Bangalore)

Like/Follow/Comment #tangytreats

Author: Ashish
Description:
I had my first Paneer biryani and I am still in love with it!
The place is right on the main road so not tough to find and serves delicious biryanis. Must visit if you’re around Marathalli!

Food-4/5
Location-4/5
Service-3/5
Ambiance-3.5/5
Value for money-3.5/5

Author: Rajesh
Description: Super Well, the biryani here is awesome.This place is definitely great for anyone who loves biryani. But for anyone not interested in eating biryani, not much to look forward too

Author: Subhankar Tripathy
Description: Been here several times! Quick service!! Not easy to find a seat on weekends! Food is good! Never ever go to 3rd floor for dine in! Try in 1st & 2nd floor! Awesome biriyani👌!

Author: Nitin Saxena
Description:
Well, the biryani here is awesome. I have been to this place multiple times and kind of addicted to their mutton keema biryani and chicken biryani. The flavor here is different from other conventional biryani joints..
Do try if you are a biryani fan.. Otherwise too

Author: Himanshu Bagga
Description: This place is definitely great for anyone who loves biryani. But for anyone not interested in eating biryani, not much to look forward too. I tried their special boneless and normal leg piece biryanis and both of them were delicious.

Author: Manikanta Nallamalli
Description: One among the best hotels to get the Andhra style food. Price worthy and totally delicious food with Rich interior Ambience. Must try: Special biryani ;)

Author: Prannoy Joseph Lakaparampil
Description: You will get best boneless Hyderabad chicken Biryani. It's a must try item if you visit this place. This place serves good starters also. Ambience across Meghana Foods in Bangalore looks same and not great. I think the management should find ways to optimise the resources to avoid long queue during weekends.

Author: Vegetariano_SinS
Description: Tasted three starters, and they are More of spices and oil but wasn’t tasty.. I liked golden corn a bit though out of the three. Had paneer biriyani as a main course. The Taste is very ok.

Author: Chaitanya Krishna
Description: Meghana special biryani....as usual its very good and every time same  taste, bone less chicken biryani is too good.Home delivey also quick and on time.

Author: Naveen Kumar M
Description: Great food never compromise with the quality and the taste we had veg everything was tasty from starters to main course. Family and friends can visit

Author: Arshad
Description: Biryani here is good and different from most of the Biryani joints in Bengaluru. Meghna special chicken Biryani and chicken dum Biryani are recommended.

Author: Srinivas
Description:
Best place for the Biryani!

The Veg meals was too good. Especially the Podi and Rice, Dhal.

Their biryani are the best. We had Panner biryani , Panner tikka. The biryani was just wow with Perfect spices and Taste. Rice and panner was perfectly cooked. The Quantity was perfect for two people and the panner tikka was good.

Ambience 3/5
Food 4/5
Service 4/5

Author: Deepak Raj
Description:
We went here for dinner. This place is huge and they have multiple stories. Staff is very polite and service is also very good. This is a must go place for family dinner.

We ordered Potato Biryani and Gobhi Manchurian. Both the dishes were delicious.

Ambience - 4/5
Food - 4/5
Service - 4/5

Author: Vamsi Bn
Description: I like the recepie and biryani. It’s damn good to eat. Hope the same taste will be there forever. I specially recommend for normal biryani as dried chicken pieces. That will be good for biryani.

Author: Remz
Description: Oh my love for Meghna's biriyani will never ever die! Ordered their Meghna's special boneless chicken biriyani for home delivery. Loved it! Their packing is really good. Rice, chicken, both come in separate packets. And of course their raita and the brinjal salan.

Author: Vivek Minocha
Description: The service staff could use a huge improvement, food was ok, the main concern was calling back the staff almost 4-5 times since we were provided the table, call to get spoons, call to get table cleaned, call to get stuff put on the table which should be done at the starting itself, v frustrating

Author: Sunku Sowmya Sree
Description: I just loved biryani here. And whenever we are craving for biryani then our first preference will be always meghana foods. Even loved the starters especially golden baby corn. Worth trying this restaurant #myhungersaviour

Author: Aishwarya Prabhu
Description: Ordered food from here for a team lunch. This is a heaven for Biryani lovers. The quatity of the Biryani is also remarkable. One Biryani will serve two easily. The only reason I'm giving a 4 is because I did not like the pricing for the Starters. The Starters is pretty costly and costs same as a Biryani.

Author: Himani Chandra
Description: Such sub standards food. Got it delivered at home chicken lollypops and it was so bad without any sauce. Will never order from here again and it is certainly not worthy of good rating given here

Author: Vivek Kumar
Description:
Best Biryani, both veg n nonveg. Price is bit high.
But I haven't found any other place, where Biryani is better than this restaurant. Took one star off because of high price.

Author: Priya
Description: Ordered paneer Biryani from here. The quantity and taste was really good. Paneer is served separetly which is good thing. Worth trying this biryani

Author: Pawan Rawal
Description:
Service 5/5
Taste 5/5
Staff 5/5
Location 4/5

Have visited here quiet a few time
Much need place at Marathahalli
Got to know about them when I was a frequent visitor at the Koramangala branch

Love their food,
Spicy and taste
Really delicious

Author: Sushmitha Raj
Description: Awesome place for Biryani... The Biryani is best in taste, the aroma is on spot and the service is very quick... Always a go to place for awesome food and my personal favourite here is the aloo dum Biryani

Author: Madhu
Description: Prawn biriyani is absolute bliss. Very delicious finger licking good. very neatly & properly packed. Food and packing both are superb. Thank you very much.

Author: Swathi Vankadara
Description: Quality of food has reduced a lot. Food is not tasty. Not worth for the money I spent. Don't order biryani from Meghana foods. Waste waste waste

Author: Parijat Sharma
Description: Ordered chicken special biriyani and coke.They sent me normal coke and the biriyani was split into two halves in one packet there was chicken and one half was rice.I don't know in which part of the world they have these two things separate in a chicken Biryani.The chicken curry was made south indian style so beware if you can't eat south indian.I conveyed the same to the Zomato customer service but their vague response was no good.Wasted money on shitty food.dont order biriyani or for that matter try swiggy.atleast they have a customer service.These guys think that they can't be replaced.#zomatosucks

Author: Shahul Hameed
Description: Very spicy food! If you are a spicy food lover this is the place for you. But the food is too spicy that one cannot eat after a certain limit

Author: Vijay
Description: As the name goes, this outlet is no different. The biryani is always a hit never a miss. Some minor fixes like quick service or more dessert options would make this a lot better

Author: Neeraj Garg
Description:
One of the most famous biryani place in Bangalore.
Ordered Meghana special chicken biryani and Chicken boneless biryani. Both were good.
They serve raita and salan also.
I went on sunday night. It was very crowded at that time.
Overall, I liked the place.
Unarguably, this is the best biryani place in Bangalore.

Author: Kaishik Gundu
Description: Best biryani forever. You can go to this place with friends family and even single as well. Will always prefer this place. "Meghana Special Biryani" is a treat for non veg lovers. The weekends are always full and you need to wait for some time from 10-20 mins

Author: Dibya Kar
Description: It's always been my favourite biriyani .one of the best in the list.special the boneless biriyani and the planner biriyani too.and the 1 biriyani is enough for two people.. ambiance is good and services also .I will highly recommend this place if you want to help your tummy to make happy.

Author: Rahul Attri
Description: Taste of good. My order chicken Biryani and butter chicken. Biryani taste yummy and butter chicken OK OK... Only.. Is like tomato gravy... Come to service is very delay for Biryani and chicken they take Max 45 min... 🤔🤔 don't ..wt overall is is good... Improve service and butter chicken....

Author: Narsa Reddy
Description:
It's a sudden weekend party, thought of ordering some non veg starter's, on friend's suggestion ordered chicken pakoda and chicken Maharaja and chicken 65, Tandoori chicken. The delivery was prompt and received after the expected time.
Coming to food, both chicken pakoda and Maharaja were good and chicken was less spicy and felt sweeter than the expected spicy need. Tandoori was spicy but the masala was over coated and 65 was good. The quality was good and disappointed with quantity. It's lot less comparing to amount that's been spent on it.

Author: RAHUL PATEL
Description:
One of the best biriyani in Bangalore I have ever tasted. Always a delicious and tasteful experience eating/delivery at Meghana Foods.

Great biriyani! A must try for all biryani lovers. If you love biriyani, this is the place for you to rejoice. 

Food was delicious and more than sufficient. One pack easily two people have it. Really appreciate the team for providing such a splendid meal.

Best biryani in Marathahalli. Biryanis are Super spicy and tasty. The order also I got within time with good packing

     Butter Naan

Author: Shachi Agarwal
Description: Good as always. Biryani is trademark Meghan's. Super spicy and tasty. Always a tasteful and delicious experience eating at meghana outlets .

Author: Sachin Kumar Sherikar
Description: This place definitely lacked the tasty which you'll find it in any other Meghana outlets. Having said that, appetizers were very delicious and well cooked. Biryani wasn't up to the mark as one would expect from Meghana Foods.

Author: Akhilesh Reddy Chaikam
Description:
Worst ambience ever I've seen. Customers are not even approached properly. Ordered thali, food is okayish asked for more dal, they didn't even bring it, I waited for half an hour and left this with bad experience. I won't visit this restaurant again.

Wanted to give 0 rating, looks that is not possible here.

Author: Kishan Pb
Description:
Based on 2 home delivery orders place through Zomato. Excuse my pictures as they are taken after transferring to plates at home, and everyone are impatient after receiving food parcels 😂. I liked the Boneless Chicken Biryani which is a must try. Special Chicken Biryani is interesting. Both these Biryanis can be shared between 2 people. Avoid the Mutton Biryani. See details of the 3 items as follows.

Special Chicken Biryani - Packing was good. This one and the boneless were a surprise in that the rice and chicken portions with masala/curry came separately. Priced at 250, 2 people can share it. Yeah the quantity of the rice is a lot for a person. I liked the slightly tangy Chicken masala, pieces were boneless. I am starting to get familiar with the style after trying a few Andhra Biryanis, totally different from Nagarjuna though. This biryani is an interesting change from the fiery Hyd Biryani.

Boneless Chicken Biryani - Clear winner by a mile. Must try dish. Again the rice and curry are separated, but gel seamlessly once mixed. Delicious. Totally different from the special Chicken and the Hyd Biryani. I will recommend everyone to go for it. 2 people can share it.

Mutton Biryani - priced slightly high at approx 350. My suggestion is to dine at the place instead of opting for a home delivery. The packing is stylish well branded. The quality of the rice is good and the pieces were delicious although there was little meat on the bone . The masala was frugal which is the major turn off. Unfortunately you don't have the option of customizing to double masala in Zomato. They still got a very authentic, spicy masala.

Author: Krishnapabolu
Description: Taste of biriyanis is tasty but the prices are expensive, takes longer hours in online delivery. Raitha, gravy & salads won't be provided. Late servoce

Author: Sneha Rawat
Description: Very tasty biryanis, chicken minces are very fine and gravy is just way to awesome ,though a bit spicy but definetly a try and you will love it

Author: Vinitha
Description: The best authentic biryani in town..... yummyylicious. The Meghan special chicken biryani is a something that everyone who goes to Meghan crave for...order it, happy tummy, happy life

Author: Arun Kumar Sahu
Description: No photos, no clicks, no images.!!! but yes there is a review and which is completely unadulterated . And the pics are missing as we were too busy in having the tasty foods served on our plates here. Chicken Biryani is the USP of this restaurant and I will suggest you the same if u visit this restaurant. Starters are good but there is a limited variety. We had ordered dragon chicken and Meghna special chicken(Andhra special) which were good but more spicy. Ambience is okay. Parking is limited but food quality holds the customers. Go & enjoy the food.

Author: Shawnik Bose
Description:
Love this place for Biryani. Always had boneless chicken Biryani which is my fav. Didnt get why they give only half a egg in it when price is expensive.
Appropriate spicy in comparison to Andhra food and quantity is more than sufficient for one person. If you are not too hungry, you can order one and share with someone, nd still u will be satisfied. Chicken 65 tastes good, soft, tender, boneless.
Ambience is 3/5
Service is 4/5
Hygiene is 4.5/5
Price is expensive for a biryani

Author: Anoushka
Description: The BEST biryani I've had in Bangalore!! Hands down!! The ambience is okay but the service is good. They have an authentic taste when it comes to biryani. The starters though are not so good!

Author: Rushikesh Shinde
Description: This place never disappoints.. food is 5/5*. Off late the gravy/ masala for the special biryani has been reduced but still its not a showstopper. Whenever you want to have a delicious spicy biryani... blindly order it from. meghana..

Author: Chandra Prabhakar
Description: worst experience and taste ,I am giving minus 5, because they take 300 for single biryani but proper service for that.very less quantity and not even 100 gram of chicken in biryani.very less quantity and simply charge extra for packing and using plastic. Never go to this restaurant.

Author: Priya Garg
Description:
Bad attitude of staff and worst service I have ever seen in Bangalore. Terrible food, specially for vegetarians. Staff is there to crowd, not to serve you. Top of all these, no card payment many time and they won't tell you before hand.

Must Not Visit.

Author: Baijnath Kumar
Description: Best biryani in Marathahalli. I have tried biryani from almost all restaurants in Marathahalli, none matched to either quality or quantity. Meghana I am loving it.

Author: Farzan Cooper
Description:
BIRYANI LOVERS..!!! This is a place to be for all of us. Been here multiple times since I tasted their Biryani for the first time one year back and I must say, every time the food has been amazing. Must try their Paneer Biryani and Chicken Biryani. The place is always packed and service can take a while sometimes, but it is worth the wait.

Food-5/5
Service-4/5
Ambience-5/5

Author: Chaithanya Prabhu
Description: If you love biriyani ,then this is the place for you to rejoice. Chilli chicken and chicken biriyani is liked by many. It serves authentic food with a decent ambience. Usually will be crowded but worth a visit.

Author: Vikranth
Description: The Briyani here tastes very good! I have ordered from this restaurant multiple times and each time i have got the same tasty briyani with the non-veg pice

Author: Bharadwaj
Description: The best biryani you can ever get in this multicuisine restaurant world with exotic taste of special chicken that you wont get anywhere.....

Author: Soumyadeep Rout
Description:
The ambiance was bad ,service was not good ,food either overcooked or felt like heated in microwave
1. A group was shouting and laughing out loud which annoyed ever customer , even manager notice but no action taken
2. Service was fast but behaviour was rude not at all professionals
3. Briyani - rice and chicken was dry felt like microwave where as Guntur chicken - chicken pieces are overcooked , worst was mushroom chilly which neither look like chilly nor taste like one

Author: Disha Somra Mehta
Description: Their biryani is the most talked about in the city and they deserve it. Awesome and delicious it was.. apollo fish was also nice.. price is a bit on higher side but totally worth it

Author: Sangeetha
Description:
I tried  biryani, special kerala chicken curry along with paratha and also my fav fish  fry along with some dal rice.
 Moderate  prices, good service and the taste was really good.

Author: Sadhana
Description: There chicken boneless biryani is my favourite. Whenever I think of it I get water in my mouth. I have been to all there branches and all are equally good .. the best place acc to me for Biryani in Bangalore

Author: Sreeja
Description: We visited this place for a team lunch. We ordered two biriyani combos that had chicken biriyani with 2 tandoor chicken kebabs and rice kheer. Food was really satisfactory, along with fast service. The biriyani had typical firewood aroma to it and I really enjoyed it. They delivered it warm so it was quite enjoyable. The tandoor kebabs were good as well. Definitely worth a try. I would rate  4/5

Author: Kingshuk Chakravorty
Description: One of the best biriyani in bangalore i I have ever tasted. A must try for all biryani lovers. Have tried their chicken, paneer and aloo dum biryani. Each and every one were absolutely wonderful and tastier to the last bite with a unique taste. Service is quite fast. Overall a terrific place for biryani in Bangalore. Their Boneless Chicken Biriyani is a must try.

Author: Rakesh Reddy
Description: The 3 rating is only for its Meghana Special Biriyani. If you try out the other usual biriyani's they do not score and taste well with other competitors. And I have observed that the taste differs in each of their outlets ( Tried at Koramangala, Jayanagar, Residency Road and Marathahalli). So the consistency isnt there even with their signature dish.

Author: Yaminibabu
Description: Meghana special biryani .. didn't find any good taste in this even though it will be 2 servings .. waste of money ... Informing Zomato that please be aware of these kind of restraints ... Literally waste of money ... And the food was entirely waste .. totally unsatisfied with this lunch which I had jus now

Author: SREENATH REDDY
Description: Wrost Magana Special Biryani..They have changed the taste and the chicken pieces are not good. and it looks like gravy type chicken pieces.. Wrost experience thinking not to order next time

Author: Rahul Kumar Singh
Description: they tooks my 600 rs and did not delivere my order.never order from zomato ,this was second time ,i m facing this problem .dont order frome zomato they r fraud.

Author: Petson Chirangara
Description:
I personally did not like the biryani here. The quantity was good but that was it.
The Meghana special chicken biryani was nothing to rave about.
Had seen a lot of reviews from people going nuts about the biryani here and i personally visited on recommendation of a colleague. He was enjoying it a lot but i personally didn't have the heart to tell him that this is not great and i have had better. He was of the opinion that this is the best biryani in Bangalore which is quite sad as I have had better at a nearby place called biryani zone(which is not the best either).
In the end I guess it's all about the person's taste.
The two stars are because I was quite disappointed after all the hype.

Author: Narayana Krishna
Description:
If anyone wants to eat nice spicy biriyani then without hesitation you can close your eyes and come to this place. Nice ambience and quite spacious to accommodate more people as this branch has three floors. Neat service and economical prices for happy eating. 

Well coming to the food, the starters are very good both veg and non-veg, but the varieties are quite more in the non-veg side and not of the same in the veg. Chicken starters are of the best, be it tikka or leg pieces or boneless. 

Biryanis, be it veg aloo/paneer or non-veg mutton or chicken it is so full and the quantity they give easily two persons can eat for one of if you are so hungry then you can easily complete it. Best pick for non-veg undoubtedly is boneless chicken biryani and for veg it is dum aloo biryani.

Author: Shaik Shameer
Description:
For the love of biryani, one must try special biryani they serve.. Loved it.

One thing they must improve is the ambience, not a great place to sit.

Author: Pavani Pravallika Reddy
Description:
This place is bit crowded in weekends
ambience-3
Food taste-4
Food serves-3.5
However meghana special chicken boneless biryani taste is awesome

Author: Speakup
Description: Biryani (ye toh mera pehla pehla pyar hai, Biryaannniiii... :P)I am insanely in love with the food they serve and the quality standards they have maintained so far without compromising the portion sizes and price hike.The portion sizes are huge and are enough to serve two.Flavours are amazing, so is the aroma of it.Extremely pocket-friendly.I'am a fan!Thank you team :)

Author: K Sharma
Description: Vegetarians beware. Had a really bad experience ordering Paneer Biryani from this restaurant. The biryani which I received was a Non Vegetarian one filled with eggs and chicken pieces. What is even worse is that I tried to contact the restaurant regarding this issue. The guy you picked up the phone was totally nonchalant and couldn't care less. He even cut the phone right on my face when I tried to explain him the issue and didn't pick up the phone subsequently. That is how Meghana 'Grand' foods treats it's vegetarian customers.

Author: Anjali Sisodiya
Description:
I had their BL Chicken biryani twice, both of the time it was awesome, Chicken pieces are well cooked.
Best biryani place in marathalli area.

Author: Akash
Description: Been here multiple times and taste is always the same.The heavenly place for biryani and prawn curry. In bangalore this palce makes to the top for the taste and quality of biryani.

Author: Shashank Jaiswal
Description: Meghana foods is a famous name among foodies and I found it to be true when I tried their biryani which was awesome and tasty and so much in quantity. Can't blame anything . It was a wonderful experience and would definitely try them again.

Author: AaDhi Surani
Description: I am trying to order online but the hotels im looking are closed for online orders at time 09:15 pm today. Rayalaseema chefs nd krithunga etc.

Author: Ritika Tondwal
Description:
Nothing special about it but great place for my comfort food - veg meals. Spicy but wouldn't kill you. You always get what you expect kind of deal with them.
If you want meals, turn up before 2pm.
Always be ready to wait 15 mins or so on a Sunday because they are very busy!

Author: Jagadeesh Raju
Description: Ordered their chicken biriyani after lot of hype. It satisfied my expectations and it had perfect blend of masala with proper proportion of rice. Prawn items are also must try here.

Author: Parvati Kartha
Description: Good range of biriyanis and yummy too! Don’t expect a great ambience or an amazing service! This place is crowded almost every single day of the week!

Author: Dileep Varma Kalidindi
Description: Terrible Biryani. It was my most admired restaurant..in 2008-2009. Ordered home delivery of Biryani and it is almost next to stinking. I think ingredients used are third class, taste is not that bad but I had unpleasant mouth till evening.

Author: Dhivakar Kanagaraj
Description:
Okay..!

Not very spicy like other branches of Meghana. The taste is not very consistent. Some days it is really good and not on some days. Generally good. Try the special chicken biriyani.

Author: The Fooodiieeeee
Description: The place is very good and the biriyani is so yummy really its mouth watering. Love to visit there again as well have told my experience to ma friends as well they also have visited and told same. I just loved it.

Author: Asit Padhi
Description: Order special chicken biryani and mutton keema biryani but it was only rice and chicken and mutton for the name shakes only. Taste was not good also.

Author: Gsnair88
Description:
If you're a fan of a 'biryani' where the masala comes in a separate bowl and rice is cooked completely separate, ehm, you probably would love this place.
The so called 'Biryani' is highly mediocre.

Author: Rakesh Mahapatra
Description:
I have been this palace many times .On weekends the place is bit crowded . it's an Andhara style restaurant and a good destination for biryani lovers especially the chicken biriyani. Other items are just average .
Coming to ambiance I felt it's just OK.
The service is fast and some staffs are very friendly .

Ambiance 2.5 /5
Price 3.5/5
Service 4/5
Food 4/5 ( more focused on Chicken Biryani , Though over-all food rating 3/5 )

It's just a good place for casual dining .

Author: Prashi
Description:
Probably best biryani available in Bangalore.

Tips: if you want to experience real taste, always dine in the restaurant, The quality of the rice is low for online orders often and I don't know why they are doing even charging 316rupees with taxes and delivery.
Whereas if you order online you don't even get basic things like onion's or lemon that which is much essential for a biryani.
When you order online they don't customise your food,in case of dine in you can customise the biryani with the level of spiceness etc.

It's ridiculous that panner biryani is costlier than 🐔.
290. They have reduced the quantity of paneer too.

Author: Akshay
Description: Best special boneless chicken biryani and prawn biruani in town. The raita and salan is also good. Awesome place to dine in as well equally good for home delivery as zero delivery fees. Packaging is also good.

Author: Manish Choudhary
Description: Biriyani Favorite Zone.. love there biriyani too much... Ordered Panner Biriyani and it was well prepared with perfect taste and blend of flavours...

Author: Er. Lokesh Singh Loha
Description: An awesome place with too good biryani. If you are looking biryani with moderate spicy this is the place. It has good quantity as well. Specially the veg biryani i liked the most.

Author: Satyajit Bhunia
Description: Briyani biryani so much of Briyani lovers is their I am giving one suggestion can u go to the Meghana foods restaurant and taste the Briyani it was amazing food and the Briyani is good taste and the quantity is really good

Author: Rajena
Description: In one word, Superb. Meghana has stayed on top of the list for Biryani in Bangalore and their food is top class. Service is excellent too, and a quick staff ensures that you don't have to wait for your food. The starters are decent and too spicy, and the thali is good. i would like to rate it 4.2/5..

Author: Kmprasad7777
Description: This is my first order in Meghana, I really upset on this order because I ordered Mutton biriyani but I received only biriyani rice there is no Mutton piece then I call back to Restaurent they are talking blaaaaa blaaaa blaaaaaa but it’s ok at least rice was good

Author: Sasi
Description:
One of the best biryani I had in bangalore till today especially the special chicken biryani they serve.
The quality of food is also very good. But you will not find any offers for this restaurant.

Author: Ananda Reddy
Description: I ate more briyani's in Bangalore but in Meghan restaurant the chicken Briyani boneless is very 😋 taste and I was went to the restaurant in Sunday the crowd is in quee but quntatiy is good.... 😍

Author: Sk Baji BajI
Description: In Bangalore the best Briyani is Meghana spl briyani it was very hummy and the crowd is very full in the restaurant and I ordered chilly chicken is very yummy and good taste....

Author: Shantanu Jawale
Description:
Boneless biryani was better than Meghana special biryani

Had once Rampuri chicken as a starter in special menu that was too good

Mutton starter was also good but tried second time most of the bone pieces came and it was not that much tender

Author: Apoorv Tailang
Description:
GOOD TASTE!!
Food: 5/5
Ambience: 3/5
Staff: 4/5
Recently visited this place. We had ordered paneer biriyani and Veg Dum Biriyani. They quantity of biriyani was so good and also the taste was yumm.
The staff members were very nice and always keeps there smile on.
Would recommend everyone to visit the place, if you are near Marathalli!

Author: Anjali Sharma
Description:
Hi i had chicken biriyani is very nice
And good food and good
Staff also very nice
Very good servise ......
All item is good .....
Thanks very good ....

Author: Ruhi Chandra
Description:
I have always known this place for Meghana biryani , recently visited this place with few office collegues.

For a change tried butter chicken and naan with sweet lime soda... quite filling and good.

Author: Kamala
Description: Biriyani is great. Other dishes are also good. Staffs are well behaved. Nice place for office or family dine.. I went there 2 times, everytime the service was satisfiable. Go for it.. Suggested.

Author: Dinesh
Description: Service is great, Briyani is too good both veg and non veg. Must try Hyderabad chicken briyani. Pepper chicken is spicy and yummy. The place is croud and yet you’ll find a table in less than 5 min. Definitely I will visit second time.

Author: Daya Dikshith
Description: I have ordered Meghana Special chicken biryani Food taste was awesome for sure everyone should try in this restaurant , please provide family pack biryani also.

Author: Abrity Bhattacharya
Description:
We ordered lime sodas, Chicken Tikka kebab, Chicken boneless biryani and prawn biryani. All were good in taste and quantity. Chicken pieces were tender in both dishes, Prawns were also good. Quantity of food is Good for 2 person/serving.
I have heard a lot about this place but Taste of Biryani was not as awesome as I expected. It was definitely above average but not yum!!
Ambience average.
Staff were polite and helpful.
All together a nice place to relieve your hunger.

Author: Kc Kiran
Description: Worst experience ever😔 completely disappointed by paneer biryani ... the paneer was hard n old, the biryani wasn't hot at all ... basically everything was cold. Taste is good until served soft n hard.

Author: Neha Raj
Description: The quality of food has deteriorated with time. Tried the food last time in mg road branch as well. Since it was too crowded so I had a feeling that Coz of large number of people preparation might have gone bad but to my astonishment,felt the same in marathalli branch too. Quantity of chicken in boneless biryani has reduced and preparation too is not up to the mark anymore . Was tasting too bland. Plz improvise as there was a time when it’s biryani used to be our most of the weekend’s order. Missing the same taste :(

Author: Rishav Sethia
Description:
I have been a fan of the paneer biryani here for the last 5 years, and only off late the quality has been deteriorating. As a vegetarian, not a lot of places serve veg biryani as good as their's. But my last experience makes me reconsider all of the times I have savored their biryani. I feel cheated and with no idea of who to complain to. And if you're a vegetarian I would suggest you steer clear of the options they have because they don't care about you beliefs or your preferences.

Finding a piece of chicken within the biryani masala was a big blow to me, and goes to speak about the level of care and attention they put into their food. I would disregard it as a one-time mistake if the same hadn't happened with two other people I know. And I can only make one of two inferences possible in this scenario - their is no segregation in the kitchen, and if by required kitchen standards they do - then for whatever godforsaken reason they knowingly chose to introduce chicken into their veg biryani.

I know a lot of people here are going to read this and think/say that "biryani cannot be vegetarian", all I'd say to that is - in that case they should not serve vegetarian biryani under false pretense. If anyone reading this understands a vegetarian's plight, please suggest if there is anything that can be done about it.

I had ordered the biryani from swiggy and all they could do was refund a portion of the biryani money. I called the restaurant and was given the manager's number but he never happened to return any of my calls. I choose to write this only after having lost all hope on getting any kind of respite, and to educate/warn any fellow vegetarian of the kind and disregard and disservice you would receive from the restaurant. #endrant.

Author: Sankar Swaminathan
Description: The place super popular for its biriyani. But being a veg, I go there for the Andhra Meals. I absolutely love their pappu - the Andhra style. It's not too spicy so it's kind of good for all. The taste and quality is guaranteed.

Author: Atonu Bhattacharya
Description: The best Biryani in Bangalore - Period. Brilliant flavours and authentic Hyderabadi stuff. Have tried the fish biryani too - very good. The starters - had the apollo fish, quite succulent and yum. Keep it up!

Author: Abdul
Description: Best biryani in Bangalore, must try the Meghanas special biryani,good ambiance and service,chicken 555 and manchurian starter was also good.

Author: Saurav Anand
Description:
To keep it sweet and simple, I have always had Boneless chicken biryani, butter nan and prawn masala over here since last 2 years.
But the last time I had the same food here, felt as if the quality is compromised now a days. To sum up, presently serving average food quality.

Author: Venkat Raju
Description:
Always great food & high standards.

I am a regular at the Meghana foods & went there with my friends. As we have become to expect the food was amazing as usual. The staff are really friendly & great service one and only restaurant in marthahalli in terms of quality, quantity and good tastes food really I loved it thanks lot for everything.

Author: Prasad N
Description: Meghana foods is very quickly restaurant and very fast delivery and services chicken royal SEMA is very tasty and paneer65 . golden baby con and today special sholay chicken I like you for Meghana👌👌👌👌👍

Author: Ankaiah Ankey
Description: I love meghana biryani my special is meghana special biryani, chilly chicken aandra style, butter chicken is very testy meghana services is very good and fast delivery thanks for meghana foods grand

Author: Anchal
Description: We ordered a veg biryani and got a chicken piece in it. Being a vegetarian ofcourse I was baffled , when tried contacting the manager the phone wasn’t reachable at all . It’s highly irresponsible of them and this show the lack of maintenance and attention given to the food

Author: Vishal
Description: This is my stop whenever I feel like having hyderabadi style biryani. The taste and quantity is far better than its counterpart. This review is completely for veg biryani items served by this outlet.

Author: Balaji Ct
Description: Tasty foods. Biryani was nice. Waiting time was more. Ambience not bad.... Price is little higher ...!!! Non veg f items shud b cooked more...

Author: Chandan
Description: I ordered meghana's special biryani ,But what I noticed in this branch was that taste of rice is not as good as other branches(like Jayanagar branch). But still the chicken is great.The quality and quantity are good ,but I only had a problem with the rice

Author: Bharti Gupta
Description: Meghana is famous for its biryani. I tried paneer biryani and it was delicious. I have been there twice and would love to visit again. Polite staff. Nice ambience. Worth the visit for all biryani lovers.

Author: Kuldeep Sharma
Description: I have heard about this restaurant from my colleagues and wanna to try... placed an order on 15th Sep. Ordered 3 items one of them Nati chicken. They charged rs 291 that s fine but surprise is quantity was very less, approx 250g. I was wondering they charged rs 291 for 250g, means 1kg nati chicken is rs 1200... moreover food was very very spicy. They openly cheating the customers.. I would not recommend this place to anyone

Author: Akhil Singh
Description:
A must visit place if you are a biryani lover. I don’t think i can find a biryani which can be compared to a biryani at this place. I ordered a Meghana Special Biryani and I can give 5 out 5 stars to it in taste, quantity & presentation. The chicken pieces are soft and boneless. They do not have any Biryani with bones in their menu. But the boneless pieces will make up for it definitely when you taste them. The staff is too quick & provides good service to the customers.

Must Try- Meghana Special Biryani

Author: Nidhi Kakani Sharda
Description: It is one of the most horrible restaurant I have visited..... the food tasted pathetic and there was no hygiene at all..... there was food on the chair and the waiters were pathetic and nobody was there to listen to your issue

Author: Ankita Basu
Description:
Heard about this place from few of my friends so decided to try this one specially for biryani
Ordered meghna special biryani
Very much impressed with their packaging
Found separate chicken pieces which is quite unusual than the others
The quantity is sufficient for two people
But I found the taste just ok,not something so extraordinary as heard.
So yes u should give a try if u r looking for a taste change.

Author: Sunanda Dey
Description:
“Meghna Special”

Had been to this place a few couple of times and mostly ordered to office for lunch/dinner. The place is usually quite packed.Even my colleagues are ardent lovers of the food here.
Although most of the items served here are highly spicy, courtesy Andhra style, for me it doesn’t take a split of a second to decided on the biryani. Its Meghna special all along. This biryani is unique to its preparation and taste, soft boneless pieces of chicken and rice is lesser spicy.
Other starters and prepared good as well, mostly what you would get in any Andhra style restaurant.
Service is fast only when your order contains non veg only.

Author: Murugesan C
Description: Taste biriyani ,good starters ,excellent service ,good staff friendly ,spl order fish fry and MEGHANA 555 nati chicken biriyani mutton kheema biriyani super

Author: Vasuki S
Description: The biriyani was really unique and very good . The friend rice and chicken starters tastes good as other fine restaurants. The cost is quite high compared to the quantity of the food provided. The curd rice tastes very bad , could be improved .

Author: Abhinav Shaurya
Description: Biryani is too good here . One thing i miss is the egg pieces that was given in the biryani earlier . Now they have removed it . That's why giving 4 star .

Author: Lohith K Kanchan
Description:
I had ordered chicken biriyani and panner biriyani. Both were good in taste and sufficient. But the thing is,
it was little bit more spicy than expected.

Author: Revathi Damarla
Description: This was the first restaurant I visited after coming to Bangalore and my experience was quite good. I have tried chicken lollipop, chicken 65 and boneless chicken biryani here. As per the taste, I would say everything was up to the mark. I liked chicken 65 the most. On the whole it is a decent enough place to go and have lunch once in a while.

Author: Phanindra Kumar
Description: I ordered boneless chicken biryani but didn't get chicken packet. Felt very bad at night when I was very hungry. Normally Meghana foods gives good biryani but had a bad experience this time

Author: Nikita Masoom
Description:
A place that needs no introduction when it comes to BIRYANI.

A wide variety of biryani on the menu and each tastes absolutely delicious. My favorites are Boneless Chicken Biryani and Egg Biryani. One serving is enough for two and the prices are absolutely pocket friendly.

Overall, a must visit paradise for Biryani lovers.

Author: Sumantra Dasgupta
Description: Ordered for dinner from this place. The order was a Boneless Chicken Biryani. It came well within time & buoy, I was impressed with the packaging. Everything was packed in different different pouches. The biryani rice was packed in one pouch, the boneless chicken pieces were packed in another one and the raita & the gravy was also packed in different pouches & all the pouches were delivered in Meghna’s cloth bag. Coming to the quantity, it’s too much for one person. Being a biryani fan that I am, I could complete the entire content after struggling a bit but I’m pretty sure, many people won’t be able to finish the same. Taste wise, it is really good.
