The spices were just the way I like, not too soicy & not too bland. Overall, an absolutely satisfying & brilliant experience. Highly recommended!

Author: Bharath Garikapati
Description: Once again I visit Meghana foods the quality of briyani is very nice and the taste is Amazing....and the ambience is very nice....and the staters also very nice......

Author: Kamdev Dolai
Description: Today I went to meghna Foods the briyani is very yummy and the meghna 555 is very yummy and the service is good the ambience is very nice.....

Author: Nilu Kumar
Description: To day I went to Meghana restaurant it's looking very nice and the ambience is good I ordered fish fry SPL is very tastee and the briyani is very yummy

Author: Ralf Pradeep
Description: First visit to meghana foods in marathalli area.. ambience is usual as in other places .. asusual we ordered biriyani nattu kozhi biriyani and prawns biriyani felt the taste was same compared to other outlets .. tried fish fry which was spl on that day .. 4 medium pieces with good taste..price they have increased a bit which i felt bad ..valet parking available here!!

Author: Mani Mani
Description:
Meghana foods is one of my favourite restaurant in bangalore good food and nice service
when I go to restaurant am feel happy and there waiters also very friendly

Author: Joydeep
Description: Quantity and taste of the biriyani is very good..but I other dishes are not up to the mark. I ordered meghnas chicken biriyani. Good place to eat

Author: Karthikeyan Settu
Description: very best briyani in bangalore I eat megahana555 was very taste and amazing get. ...and the Briyani spicy and good taste and the service is good

Author: Apoorva Gorle
Description: The best biryanis I have ever had.. the fish biryani should on the to-do list of every biryani/fish lover. This place is always crowded so be sure to be here early or pre-book a table in advance.

Author: ARIKATLA SRIMANNARAYANA
Description: Meghana foods s good and the briyani very taste and chi65 is very yummy and thee taste is amazing..........and service is very nice in mehanaa foods

Author: Koushik
Description:
If you're die hard fan of andhra style biryani then this a perfect joint to have a fantastic biryani and tastetalastic.
Specially that boneless biryani that's the masterpiece and a classic biryani of all.

Author: Ankush
Description:
I am a Big Fan of Meghana Food.. have been to almost all their outlets in bangalore. Last time was at Marathahlli branch. . . Tho must say i have only tried Chicken Biryani there and Non veg starters.Â  This place has never let us down in terms of taste. Ambience is poorÂ  and there is always a waiting time but who cares about all these when the taste of Food is simply woww!!
Must try if you are a biryani fan.

Ambicence - 2/5
Food - 4/5
VFM- 4/5
Service - 4/5

Author: Kapil G
Description: One of the few places which has got the biryani taste right and always consistent in terms of taste and quantity. Meghana special and boneless red biryani is superb. A place you have to visit for biryani.

Author: Phani Prakash
Description: I really liked the veg biryani over there. Besides this we will also get South Indian thali. We had tried veg thali(Andhra Style) tastes delicious I felt I would be at a restaurant back home.

Author: Stuti
Description:
When you r in Bangalore for a very short time there are some places which you have to visit like have to visit anyhow😅😅so one such gem is Meghana, much hyped about its biryani♥️♥️
So went there on Saturday, the place was quite crowded but we got a seat easily.
So we ordered:
*Golden baby corn: if u are expecting something of chinese touch, then definitely it is not 🙈🙈but amazingly fried and tossed with veggies 😋
*Dum aloo biryani: I know that veg biryani is not a biryani still 🙈the perfect one had so far, not just spiced up, but the aroma and flavour made it much more interesting. Generally if you order biryani from any other place it would just be spicy 😂😂
*Chicken biryani: equally amazing, was loved by my Tamil frnds and it reminded them much of the biryani from there place ♥️♥️
*Lime water: yes you need it to gulp that huge quantity of biryani ♥️♥️

So saying giving it a try is definitely worth 😅😅

Author: Raj
Description:
Yesterday i visit this place with my friends,
It's a good place for dinner, not so croweded but we are happy with food....
Service is also good ....
You can Improve on your ambiance.
Food-4/5
Service-4.5/5
Ambiance-3.5/5

Author: Aparna G Menon
Description: Amazing biriyani! The perfect biriyani i have had in Bangalore. The right amount of spice, taste and feel. I would recommend everyone who loves biriyani to try this place!

Author: Raghavendra Nayik
Description: Meghana is the place for briyanii and meghana 555 is very yummy and tha food was good but nothing new to look forward and good service tha chicken boneless birthday is quite awesome and all food varieties

Author: Ashoka Ananda
Description: I ordered home delivery meganaspl birayani. Fish fry and megana 555 very taste very fast delivery good and very good service Andra style hunter chicken in Meganafoods Marathali

Author: Dhanush Shettigar
Description: Just love the Meghana’s special Biriyani and Chicken Pakoda !! Amazing taste , bit expensive but affordable one ! Must visit place ! Also must  try the Meals

Author: Arun Gurung
Description:
I am eating for boneless chicken biriyani and
Ckn 65 started in 2nd time that is very good test and good quantity
That place and receiving also good.

Author: Vidhu Ranji
Description: Had a worst experience today ordering from this outlet. We placed our order at 8.50 and until 11.20 no response. When called the delivery guy, he was very irresponsible. When we called meghana foods Marathahalli (from the restaurant where we ordered) the guy said in next 20mins the order will be delivered. No luck after 20mins. Called the restaurant continuesly and none of them responded. Worst service ever!

Author: Sneha Simon
Description:
I had heard a lot about this place and gave it a shot few days back in Marthalli branch..
The food was good but nothing new to look forward to...We had ordered a fish and paneer biriyani..
Both were good but I would say I would vote for fish more...
One thing which made us uncomfortable the entire time is the service staff..They are very rude especially the manager that many at times we felt like walking out...
Food - 4/5
Service - 2/5
Ambience - 2/5

Author: Muralu G
Description: Visit this place for the most awesome biryanis. I just love its biriyani be it non veg it tastes awesome.Quantity is very good. Very quick service

Author: Karthik Yadav
Description: One of the best biryani place , even though the place is crowded all time they serve food reale quickly. The chicken boneless biryani is quite awesome

Author: Mchinnappa Chinnappam
Description: Mutton briyani taste was very tasty and the spl fish fry is good and the service is good and good management.......hygienic also good and briyani was amazing...

Author: Anusha
Description: All food varieties are very tasty in this meghana foods grand. Once in a week I will visit this restaurant to taste this awesome food.Mostly I like biryani but other food items also very tasty. So I like different food varieties also in this restaurant .

Author: Fakrun Nisha
Description:
Trust me ..this restaurant is one of the best in marhathali ,
Briyani ki taste aahh can't explain .
Behaviour or staaf is also satisfactory..
Neat and clean and maintained hygiene..

Author: Hemanth Potla
Description: Very nice place . The setting is very different from all other restaurants. The quotes all over the walls are very funny and enjoyable. The taste of the food is too yummy. Mainly the buttermilk mmmmm☺️ really tasty. We will feel like having more and more.

Author: Nagendrababu Chow's
Description:
a week ago

Nice place for food lovers who love to have speciy food this place is full always as it's a small place and provide tasty food. Nice hygienic place. Expect few deep fry items remaining all good taste good quality and good price. Nice

Author: DUVVURU SAI HARISH
Description: Very tasty mutton biryani was very spicy and tasty and the ambience is good. And the service is good the Meghana chicken 555 is very good...

Author: Milan Bohara
Description: Good briyani in banglore and good dlivery meghana food and I went to the resturant and the ambience is good...and the food is very tasty and spicy

Author: Uma Shankar
Description: We tried Meghana for the first time with the team and the food was great, freshly cooked very tasty and well presented. The waiters were attentive and service overall was very good. The restaurant looked to have been recently decorated.

Author: Thejaswi
Description:
Food - 4 food is tasty and spicy , ambience - 2 the place is not very great to sit and eat it's a bit conjusted but the food s great for a take away or home delivery... We have tried special veg biriyani which comes with Raitha and veg gravy - the quantity is huge and taste is awesome..
Fish biriyani and chicken biriyani was also great.. over all a good place for biriyani take away...

Author: Subbu Balu
Description: "A wonderful restaurant Megana Foods marathalli Megana special Biriyani is very good combination with leg roast and very good speed of service very nice place "

Author: Ben Noble
Description: Their boneless chicken biriyani is the best. I've not had better ones anywhere else. Apollo fish is nice as well. I was only disappointed with a few flies that found the biriyani aroma irresistible. Although, they could never get any close to my biriyani. I had a workout while eating....swaying my hand back and forth. ;-)

Author: Jayachandra Jai
Description:
I ma fine dining in megana food's marathalli is very good place and wonderful biriyani's
I am ordering in megana555 is very good taste
Again and again going to that place me and my family......... Keep it up

Author: Ashirbad
Description: We had a birthday party and we ordered paneer tikka, mushroom masala, tandoori roti and butter naan and paneer biryani and slat lemon soda. We had a pathetic experience with this restaurant. Found hair strands in the tandoori roti while saying we have not got any response... Lemon soda was served with spoiled lemon juice which we asked to replace and after argument he did it. Only thing we liked was paneer biryani. This I never expected from a famous food chain.

Author: Kumar Harsh
Description: They are not providing orders correctly....how can u say that in Banglore Whitefield area is dangerous (delivery boy).???????? U could have arranged some other members to deliver. It's very unfortunate to order something from a good restaurants n getting a feedback like we are cancelling your order.its very sad this was not expected.

Author: Sanjay Khan Nagra
Description: Ordered Boneless Chicken Biryani, Butter Chicken, Egg Curry, Rotis, etc. Boneless Chicken Biryani was the only good thing -- and historically, has been the only good item Meghana has to offer. 4 rating is only for that. Everything else is 3 or below.

Author: Sudha Kannan
Description:
I was never a BIRYANI fan. Though I tried veg Biryani (may be pulao) at most of the highly reputed places in Hyderabad, nothing felt impressive.

 Been to this place with friends and had to eat veg biryani. Thankfully it wasn't disappointing at all. 

In fact, felt so good that I had biryani continuously for 3 days at this place. 

The biryani was spicy, hot, tasty even no matter what the time 

Coming to value for money, they offer good quality food at an affordable price and service is decent. Overall experience is great.

Author: Mona Tejeshwita
Description: Always lands up here if having biryani cravings... decent food with average ambience and services..paneer biryani was different than chicken one...

Author: Sourav Prosad
Description:
When I was in Bangalore, I visited this place twice.
First time one of my collegues introduced this place to me. Second time, I went there with one of my friends.
I had Apollo Fish, Chicken Biriyani, Chicken Boneless Biriyani, Mutton Biriyani.
I loved Apollo Fish. It tasted good. A bit crunchy.

Now lets talk about Biriyani. This is the one of the finest Biriyanis in Bangalore. I personally travelled throughout India and tried different Biriyanis from North to South, from East to West.

The biriyani is of Hyderbadi style. The chicken as well as the mutton were properly cooked. It tasted very good. And the quantity is also good. If you have moderate appetite, then one biriyani is meant for two people if you order any starter. It was so spicy.

So, please try this once if you want to have good biriyani in Bangalore. It has other outlets also. But didn’t visit those places.

Author: Nitin Khot
Description: My friends suggest me this place.....finally we went there.....we had a lunch over there ....but they need to be more improve the food.....service was good......

Author: Gautam Mohan
Description:
Heard this place through friends. And they say briyani is good. So I decided to try.

Mutton Briyani is the epitome of Briyani to me. I visited this place with a friend and we tried.

Quantity was good but the taste was not upto the mark. It was spicy and had lot of pieces of mutton which were not soft. Moreover the briyani was pricey.

I would not recommend this place for Briyani, not sure about other items.

Author: Santosh K
Description: Been there with the friends .....for the lunch......we had some starters and the veg .non veg biryani.....the starter was good but the chicken biryani was not good chicken was bit hard .....remain all was good...

Author: Ananda Reddy C
Description: Food was not good not sure y zomoto has given 3.8. 600 rs 💰 got wasted :(. Food was not good not sure y zomoto has given 3.8. 600 rs 💰 got wasted :(.

Author: Murali Krishna Balla
Description: Ordered here many times but this time surprisinly got biryani packet without chicken. Very disappointed this time... Raised complaint against restaurant, will see they refund money or not.

Author: Avanti Singh
Description:
I've been to the other outlets of Meghna and have quite liked it overall, food service and stuff. Not sure about this specific outlet at Marathahalli. We reached here for late dinner couple of days back. The place was as usual pretty occupied and hustling with people. We sat, and kept waiting for someone to attend us. Had to call for someone to take our order several times. After 3-4 followups a guy came and took the order. The food was served in 5 mins. The biryani was fine and the taste like all other outlets. It was spicy.
The staff had some confusion about the fan.. some wanted it on, some wanted it off and the switch was beside my table. And the entire staff was just hovering around our table, which was really irritating.
Food wise the place is fine but the service can definitely be better and staff needs to be more polished and mannered.

Author: Sowmya
Description: One of the best biryani places in town, even though the place is crowded all the time they serve you food real quick. Authentic flavor. It's a must try for all the biryani lovers out there

Author: Urbill
Description: Wow seafood test is better then other restaurant.well decoration. beautiful place .be polite and friendly...next time we will be came again.....👍👍👍👍👍

Author: Raghava Kumar
Description: Went for lunch and had thali and asked the waiter to suggest something which goes well with rice and he told chilly chicken in Andhra style will be good . None of the items given in thali were good. Chicken was horrible and we couldn't eat one piece. It was just boiled chicken without any spices and was pathetic. Told the staff about it and he politely told we will make a note and forward your feedback. Sad to see such popular brands known for quality and taste deteriorating. Don't recommend anyone to have thali at least in marathalli branch. Don't think I am ever going to go back to this joint.

Author: Vishwanath Menon
Description: Meghanas biriyani food chain has always been one  of my favourites. They serve some really good biriyani. The restaurant is always crowded with lots of customers. The service is very good and the staff are courteous. I would surely recommend this restaurant to everyone.

Author: Munnangi Ram Reddy
Description: Chilly chicken biryani is very special here and nati biryani is awesome too had a good food #biryani #chicken #so soft Loved food #quality 🤗😍✌🏻

Author: Poushali Mukherjee
Description: Meghana food is famous for its biriyani. Today we have visited the Marathahalli outlet of theirs. We have order 5 different kind of biriyani: prawn biriyani, Keema biriyani, boneless chicken biriyani, meghana special biriyani and paneer biriyani. Rice for all of taste same only they have changes main ingredients(chicken and prawn, paneer). I feel they have down graded their taste a little bit. Prawn and boneless chicken biriyani at Marathahalli outlet is good.

Author: Vedant Modi
Description:
I wud rate it to be the best Biryani in town.

Its flavour is Authentic & love the use of spices.

Quick service & neat interiors.

Nothing to complain for.

It always maintains its quality & consistent.

A MUST MUST TRY !!!

Author: Ravindar Natarajan
Description: I went to this Marathahalli branch with my friends. This branch is more spacious compared to Koramangala branch. Biriyani was as usual delicious, also ordered chicken fry. Both were good. Had a good time with friends here.

Author: Prajwal
Description:
My favourite place in Bangalore...
They serve the world's best biryanis.
The chicken 555 is a must try.
This is a must visit place for all the foodies!!!!

Author: Abhinav Bal
Description: I have always loved the Biriyani served at Meghana, and this outlet is no different. The quantity is more than enough for 2, and the taste is nice and spicy - just what you would expect from a good quality Andhra style biriyani. Accompany that with a fish fry or something, and you are good to go !!

Author: Charanpreet Singh
Description:
It was during my last visit to Bangalore I was craving for a nice biryani.
After recommendations from my fellow Marathalli friends I decided to pay a visit to Meghana!
I ordered Meghana Special Biryani and Chicken 65.
Biryani I must say is very different like a chicken gravy and aroma rice cooked separately and plated together.
Taste: 7.5/10

Chicken 65 was well Spicy! And believe me friends if a person like me who snorts garama masala says it was spicy then it was freaking spicy(I'll attach a pic for your reference, 10-12 Chili's in one plate is a freaking volcano ready to explode).
The thing with spicy is that it takes all the taste away from a dish and person just thinks of getting over with it fast!

Nevertheless the place has a legacy and a huge fan following and I respect the foodies who like Meghana, perhaps a small disclaimer next time ;)

Author: Pramod
Description: One biriyani will be sufficient for two people. Special chicken boneless biryani is awesome.  Tandoori chicken was pretty good. Service is also good.

Author: Brahma M
Description:
boneless chicken biryani is good and mild
meghana special biryani is boneless and little spicy and good in taste

Problem is its not fine dine restaurant. Staff will chase you to eat food and leave early, which is little odd and uncomfortable.

Author: Monojit Das
Description: This is a bad place for people who love less spicy food.. too much spicy food here.. taste is bad. I will not recomand to any one.. we have tried biriyani, plain rice, dal fry, omlet.. dal and omlet noth are pathetic

Author: SUMAN Rathore
Description:
I went to day .......... my self experienced are not better today .............food quality are bad ....
.......not professionally staff.............................so not good..............

Author: Jhinga Mal
Description: Visited this on a sunday afternoon. Reached around 12 so not so crowded at the time. Ordered paneer biriyani, spl veg biriyani (not in the menu), butter naan and dal fry. The rice qty definitely seemed to be lesser than what we get in home delivery. Maybe that's why the paneer biriyani had an overdose of masala that spoiled the taste. The other biriyani was better. Service was quick but we had the same experience as others with waiters continuously disturbing. While we were still in the middle of food they asked if anything else was required and when we said no, promptly gave hand wash bowls and the bill, as if they wanted us to wrap up and leave!

Author: Shakti Ranjan Samantaray
Description: Just loved it. Giving 4 ratings as the price has been increased as compare to previously. but taste is awesome as usual. Both quality n quantity just awesome.

Author: Ashnna
Description: One of the best places to have Biryani in Martathalli. The Meghna special biryani is awesome and has set different level of expectations. Less oily and they make it spicy according to you. Biryani lovers should visit this place once.

Author: Farah Naaz
Description: Ordered fish fry, Meghana special chicken biryani, mutton Keema biryani, egg fried rice and curd rice. Fish fry was good but only 2 pieces. Meghana special biryani is one of my all time favourite biryani in Bangalore. Although the quality and taste keeps reducing day by day, I still prefer ordering this to be on a safe side. Mutton Keema biryani was similar but the mutton Keema on top was good and too spicy to handle. Even a hardcore spice eater will struggle to gulp it down. Egg fired rice was simple n classy. Not at all spicy so good for less spice eaters. Curd rice is just amazing. I would say one of the best curd rice I have eaten in a long time. Overall it's a good restaurant to visit.

Author: Parikshit Sagar Kesavaraju
Description: Fiod is good but the service and hospitality is really bad. Few items are very expenssive and over priced. Omlet is 77/- mineral water bottle is sold at 30/- wher as it s priced at 19/- as mrp. When i questioned about it, they have shown me a pamplet which says supreme court has told them to sell at any price above mrp.

Author: Sriman Saswat Suvankar
Description:
One of the best places to have biriyani in Bangalore. Had been here a few times. The chicken boneless biriyani is quite awesome. They have so many guys who serve the customers and so the service is super fast.
Coming to the food as I said the chicken boneless biriyani is a treat to both eyes and mouth as well. If you love to eat a bit more spicy then this biriyani is for you. If you have a desire to finish one bowl of biriyani alone like me then i want you to rethink on it as the quantity of biriyani served in one bowl is more.
Price of biriyani is a bit on higher side compared to other restaurants that serve the same but the taste is so good and so the price is definitely a trade off.
They have special daily starters here as well. Do try it if you want to.
Do visit here if you are a lover of biriyani 😊

Author: Ananth Soy
Description: Though good the main problem is with consistency. That's the hallmark of any great restaurant and this one is not quite there yet. out of the 2 times I was there, and once when I ordered, I I had a good experience only once. The other time the biryanis were cold :(

Author: Pranshu Kohli
Description: Tried hyderabadi special biryani 6 to 7 times now and loved it every time!! Location is appropriate for 2 wheelers as one can park right in front of the restaurant.

Author: Jayati Srivastava
Description:
Have been a fan of meghana biryani since last few years. There are many chains across Bangalore. Visited the marathalli restraunt on weekends. This place will be mostly crowed and we have to wait for 15-20 mins on an average.
Coming to the food I love the hydrabadi boneless biryani here. Very spicy and extremely mouth watering. Also had guntur chicken which was proper andhra style.
Had prawns fry as well for the first time here. It was good but not at par with the other dishes served here.
The biryani here is sufficient for 2 people.
Must try!

Author: Nivedita Basu Dey
Description: Ordered Meghna special chicken biryani. Loved the taste...the food was very spicy and hot but tasted good. Loved the chilli prawns. A big thumbs up for the portion size.

Author: Shalini
Description: I always miss the Hyderabadi biryani in Bangalore. Meghana biryan lives upto the expectations and never disappoints. Must try- chicken biryani and Meghana special biryani

Author: Rohit Vipat
Description:
Excellent food and quick service.
Taste and Spice and everything was amazing.
One of the best Biryani and snacks in Bangalore.
Have been looking for such place for over an year

Author: Nair
Description:
The love for the Meghana special chicken Biriyani started years back when they had opened their franchise in kormangala, and the love remains same forever and ever.
But sometimes they charge you incorrectly.

Author: Shatakshi
Description:
I am a very frequent visitor of Meghana Foods. Biryani was something which i didn't like earlier. But last year i tried Biryani in Meghana Food and since then i have started loving Biryani 😊😊.

Chicken boneless Biryani is what i order, everytime i visit Meghana. After having Biryani in Meghana last year i have tried Biryani at many places but the Biryani here is the best. Apart from that whatever starter you order it will be of Andhra style.

The resturant is generally crowded. In weekends sometimes you need to wait for 5-10 mins before you get a seat.

The only problem here is related to the staff. Though they are very friendly n polite but they will come to your table after every 5 mins to ask something or just check your table. This turns out to be very disturbing and uncomfortable. Feels like someone is keeping an eye upon us.

Apart from this everything is perfect. Chicken boneless Biryani is a must try.

Attaching pics from my few visits there.

Author: KR K
Description:
Food was good ,biriyani average but good fast
Staff also friendly enjoy the my friends
Captain somu the take order my friends very enjoy
Thanks you friendly staff

Author: Hanzala Ansari
Description: They make one of the spiciest biryani in the city, their boneless chicken biryani is okay and the serving concept is brilliant with separate rice and Masala, chicken pieces , gravy and raita, serving portion is good, must try.

Author: Shakir
Description:
Very few places serve biryani this good even after midnight!
They have seats that have nice view of ORR.
Chicken biryani boneless is my usual order here.
The biryani was spicy, hot, tasty even no matter what the time.
Sit here watching the traffic in ORR and contemplate how there is some much traffic even at midnight!

Author: Koushik
Description: Biryani is not tasty at all it is not fresh also I smells sticky , people order because they feel very hungry  and cannot cook that doesn’t mean u can send what ever u want and we can eat that . Totally disappointed with the quality

Author: Siri Poovaiah
Description: They packed the wrong order.. I ordered lollipop biryani and the restaurant gave me veg biryani with some chilli chicken. The gall on these people.

Author: Debasish Padhy
Description: Good food @reasonable price , i have been there lot of time as it is in marathalli , So they need only some kind of cleanliness in to their restaurants.

Author: Sanjit Das
Description: Ordered chicken biryani  on 29th june ,it was taste less , no spices , just like boiled colored rice and white chicken , no masala at all  . very dis-satisfied .

Author: Ramya Ponnada
Description: Well! Being a pakka Hyderabadi but a vegetarian, I was never a BIRYANI fan. Though I tried veg Biryani (may be pulao) at most of the highly reputed places in Hyderabad, nothing felt impressive. Been to this place with friends and had to eat veg biryani. Thankfully it wasn't disappointing at all. In fact, felt so good that I had biryani continuously for 3 days at this place. Coming to value for money, they offer good quality food at an affordable price and service is decent. Overall experience is great.

Author: Soumya Mohapatra
Description:
Big fan of Meghna Biriyani. Everyone has his/her own taste of palate but for me its one of the best I have had so far.

Must try: Meghna special biriyani

Author: Thasbiha Amjeth
Description: I love the biriyani here especially the ‘Meghana special biriyani’ and whenever I feel like eating biriyani, without any second thought I prefer ‘Meghana Foods’. The biriyani here is spicy and delicious. The chicken served along with the biriyani is boneless, juicy, tender and soft and goes well with the biriyani. I have tried few starters and nothing had disappointed me. The ambience in Marathalli outlet is good. But the outlet in Koramangala is very small and the seating arrangement is not welcoming.

Author: Ankush Singh
Description: I ordered a Meghana Special Briyani through Zomato but veg briyani was delivered. When I tried calling the restaurant and explained them their mistake they were very " Rude " over the phone and hung up on me many time. The staff is very rude in responding customer queries and they do not know how the delivery process works. Customer care service from Meghana Marathahalli branch is very rude. Its okay, mistake can happen from anyone but instead of accepting they shout on customer and talk very rudely to them.

Author: Nikhil Karnam
Description:
This is one restaurant which consistently stands out for Andhra biryani's.

I mostly order Veg Special Biryani (off the menu, which have good portion of veggies + panner) and have it with chilled thumbs-up, Raita, Salan and Onion salad.

Food - 4/5
Ambiance - 4/5
Cleanliness - 3/5 (Plastic white plates are stained over time)
Value for Money - 5/5

Author: Prateek Mohapatra
Description: Visit this place for the most awesome biryanis. You got to try the Meghna special boneless chicken biryani here. It is on a bit costly side but the quantity of food makes up for it. Go, treat yourself with awesome, perfectly spiced, aromatic biryanis on your cheat day. I have not tried other food items here, so can't say much. Ambiance wise it is too crowded and the seating arrangement is a bit clumsy. Hence, going for a rating of 4.0.

Author: Siddharth Agarwal
Description: Ordered Aloo Dum Biryani for Takeaway. I got Biryani rice with Half Aloo. Quantity of Biryani Rice was Good. Taste was Okayish. Not good as expected.

Author: Navin Kumar Singh
Description: Best Biryani in town. Though people come here for special biryani but I personally love the simple chicken biryani. The spices, huge quantity ok Khuska and the right amount of chicken served makes it a perfect one. My anytime lunch/dinner. Even the veg biryani with boiled potatoes are yum. Liked by my veg friends.

Author: Elsavio
Description:
When I talk about Briyani, for me, it's always basically three things that make up the deliciously lip-smacking satisfying taste - First, the fragrance built from the combination of the well-cooked rice and the perfectly mixed spices which provides the cue to the anticipation of a delicious taste; Second, the on-your-tongue taste of the perfectly cooked central attraction of the briyani be it chicken, meat or whatever-is-added-in-veg-briyani; and the Third, the often neglected add-ons such as raita, curry or salad which when added correctly can potentially bring up the taste of briyani to being almost soulful.

Meghna Foods has Briyani as its signature dish which was recommended to me on several occasions and so I was super excited to taste it for the first time when I ordered Boneless Chicken Briyani for home-delivery. The packaging was well-done though the content was not as hot as I would have expected yet kudos for the effort.

Coming to the Briyani, it has no fragrance, the rice seems to be mixed with average spices but has no taste of the chicken content in it. It is as if, the rice was cooked devoid of the chicken and with just the spices, which was a shame as it missed a lot of the spices and taste that comes up from cooking rice with marinated chicken. Still, the rice had consistent color and overall was well-cooked. the chicken was well-cooked and tasted fine, but it never felt like an entity to go with the Briyani. I had a few pieces separately and never felt like adding it to the rice elevated the taste. I do understand that they might be going for the separate tastes but I was looking for the art of blending them together as a Briyani. Tad disappointing from my expectation. The add-ons has the watered down raita and the totally misplaced tasteless curry which doesn't add any flavour to the Briyani. You can throw the add-ons out and still wouldn't miss them while eating the Briyani.

Overall, it seems the Briyani is too hyped up. It's just a normal Briyani for a normal meal day, when you just want to eat and then sleep.

Meghna Foods' Briyani does very little for me, but still as an experience was not that bad. If you like Briyani and are in it only for the high quantity of rice, you should give it at a try.

Food:3/5
Packaging:4/5

PS: The search for the best Briyani continues.

Enjoy!!!

Author: Anush Karavadi
Description:
Taste wise, they're amazing. Love the varities of biryani they have.

Try having the biryani with some ghee and gun powder. It blows your mind.

Not just the biryani, I also love their starters and especially the chilli paneer.

These days though, the prices have become outrageous. The paneer biryani costs more than chicken boneless one. I also feel the quantity has reduced off late.

I just hope they're not too focused on cost cutting and will continue to delight customers.

Author: Sanjay Lewis
Description: After hearing the fantastic reviews of this place especially the boneless Biryani I thought of trying this place. The food was good but not mind blowing as prescribed. We tried the chicken and the mutton biryani. Its a good joint for a regular biryani fest.

Author: Sruti Saha
Description:
It's become a usual biryani place for our team... biryani hear is awesome.. namely boneless chicken biryani... meghna special biryani isn't that recommandable from my side... in starters here I prefer pepper chicken...
Rest others chicken lollipop, baby corn dish.. I forgot the name, lassi are good..

Author: Khushboo K.
Description:
Only and only for nonveg ppl,not too many options for veg,all that you can order is paneer,which tastes like rubber, their paneer biryani looks sad and tastes more sad,paneer is not at all soft.
Would really appreciate if you just improve on the one option that you have in your menu.Raitas and salan are only served on request which is an obvious thing

Author: Shashank Devisetty
Description: Prawns biryani is the best. I almost had every non veg starter and biryani over here. They are good. I would rate the restaurant a 9 on 10. Dum biryani is not good. Biryani basmati rice is long enough and tasty.

Author: Ritu Sanghavi
Description:
Really pocket friendly.
This outlet is quite near to my office and when it's month end it totally suits our Friday lunch cravings.

We have tried their Aloo Dum biriyani and panner tikka which is decent.

Pocket friendly and flavourful!

Best for month end spending!

Author: Yash Vijay
Description:
Food - 4/5
Cost - 3/5
Location - 5/5
Ambience - 3/5
Staff and services - 5/5
Cleanliness - 3/5

The biryani and the paneer tikka tastes good and they have a lot of quantity. One biryani is more than enough for anyone.
The staff is very good, polite and courteous.
Located in Marathahalli, it is one of the most easy restaurants to find.
It is a bit on the costly side, although the quantity is good so makes up for the cost.

Author: Suman Paul
Description: Visited this place 2-3 times. Generally you have to wait as most of the table is full everytime. Ambience is not up to the mark. Staffs are good and they serve your dish very fast. i ordered Meghna special Briyani once and chicken briyani with lemon juice and the taste of briyani was awesome. Would definitely visit this place again for mouth watering briyani.

Author: Neha Anshuman
Description:
Visited this place on a weekday. Most of the tables were taken.
Ambience is simple. The seats are comfy.
The service is really fast.
We ordered chicken boneless biryani and paneer biryani. Chicken boneless biryani is a must try if you love biryani.
Would definitely visit again.!! :)

Author: Mandeep Kaur
Description:
Ambience-3/5
Decent ambience
Staff-3/5
Service is fine , however, there is little waiting time if you order something other than Biryani
Food-4/5
Meghna’s Chicken boneless biryani is my all time favourite so that rating completely for the biryani

Author: Kamalika Ray
Description:
It's a good joint even it it's hot to taste buds we definitely like it.
My all times favorites are anjal fry and ghee rice while my hubby shifts between biriyani and meals.
Even if you are not an Andhra food lover but do like sea fish you can come like me for these dishes and will not get dissapointed. Don't miss gun powder and ghee with rice.
Always crowded but prompt service keeps it going.

Author: Sneha Hegde
Description: The ambience is good enough. The service is pretty quick and nice. I received my order in 5 mins. I always visit meghana foods for egg biryani as I'm an eggetarian. You should definitely visit this place for the cleanliness that is maintained there. It's the best place for any kind of biryani.this is my first choice for biryani.

Author: Aravind Raj
Description: Kindly do not visit this restaurant. I visited today after reading the reviews in Zomato. Now I realise that's a big mistake. This is the worst restaurant I have ever visited in Bangalore. Either the reviews are fake or only the Marthahalli outlet is worst of all their outlets.

Author: Gopi
Description:
Ordered Boneless chicken Biriyani on 15th May 2018 for a home delivery and it got delivered well before the stipulated time /tasted delicious. People who are really hungry and likes to have good amount of Biriyani rice with well cooked pieces then this restaurant will definitely suffice their taste buds.Most ideal for Andhra people and they have earned good name with its multiple branches in Bangalore .Overall its worth for the price we paid.

Attaching Bill for common people.

Author: Dinesh Rawat
Description:
Great place to have lunch specially if you are non vegetarian.
Dig into their prawns and chicken biryani. The food overall is little spicy in all Meghana outlets being Andhra food so it's better to specify while Placing order .. specifically non veg starters and main course gravy.

Author: Harsh Udhwani
Description: Service is becoming worse as they are growing.. our waiter didn't take order properly.. and they are not helpful....food is good.. no complaints

Author: Raviteja.iitm87
Description:
For someone who has eaten Hyderabadi Biryani all his life, Meghana’s biryani is the real Deal in Marathahalli.

I don’t know how you guys do it , but for me you are the gold standard for Gr8 Biryanis . Highly recommended

Author: Vinod Reddy Vadde
Description: Best hyderabad biryani in Bangalore... Don't miss the biryani if you are south indian😀..I prefer boneless biryani every time I visit here..

Author: Atrayee Dutta
Description: I ordered Chicken Boneless Biryani from here. It was YUM! Very nicely packed, delivered on time (Thanks to food panda!), quantity was beyond sufficient and very very tasty! I am in love with this place!

Author: Anuj Patra
Description:
Have heard so much about this place and finally we gave it a try. The quantity is good, without a complaint. Taste is amazing. Also they'll serve a generuosa portion of shredded chicken on top which goes very well with the Biryani.
Looking forward to visiting more.

Author: Ishita Ghosh
Description: Heard about this place and its biriyani and we decided to go for a weekend dinner with a group of three friends..and this place and their food didn't disappoint us..their biriyani was good with a good quantity along with which they served raita and also they had shreded chicken served on their biriyani..i found the biriyani a little spicy since i am not much a spice lover but people with a taste of Hyderabadi biriyani can definitely visit this place.. moreover it is economic too..

Author: Vaishnavi Vinay
Description:
Meghna biryani never disappoints you!!
Paneer biryani is a blessing for all the vegetarians out there XD
The Chinese starters are amazing.
A must visit.

Author: Indra Jeet
Description:
Wuff!! After my long quest for the answer of who serves better biryani, Meghana? Or Nagarjuna?.
I've gotta say, it's Meghana foods. The food here is pretty decent, I'm a guy with a big appetite and I thought I can finish one biryani myself. But no, I was wrong cuz the quantity here is too very much ( good though. xD)
The sides on the other hand goes to Nagarjuna cuz the sides here are just one and the same .
Ok so my order went as follows :
Chilli Chicken
Chicken 555(Meghana)
Boneless chicken biryani
Chicken biryani
Mutton keema biryani.
** I'D BEEN THERE WITH MY FAMILY*
One more thing I liked about this place is the staff are very responsive, polite .
Keep the good job going, Cheers!!
:')

Author: Shashikant
Description:
most of the time it's closed for online ordering through Zomato.
Quality of food it really good. I am rating 1 only for online order otherwise for food it's 3.5

Author: Akshay Vijapur
Description: This is the best place in Bangalore to have biriyani. I went several times and never ever felt disappointed, I have one suggestion to restaurant, please reduce waiting time for customers on the restaurant.

Author: Keshava
Description:
First off, do not be confused with the name being a bit different. This chain is run by the same management.

Now, food was good. We were 10 of us ordered all at once and the service was quick. They have two floors for service the one at first is usually overcrowded.

Biriyanis were amazing. The quantity is such that if you're not a hollow block you could always share it another and keep your stomach full.

Parking - They have a free valet parking service.

Author: Raju
Description: 35 minutes after ordering food, I get a call from the restaurant saying they do not have a delivery boy at 9pm in the night when it's too late to place an order anywhere else. Restaurant should not confirm order if they do not have the resources.

Author: Rana
Description: Meghan's special chicken biryani is my favourite among all dishes from Meghan foods grand. The crispy boneless and greavy is yummy combination to delight your taste buds.

Author: Sukanya Saha
Description: Service was bad..they were in hurry to serve the order instead of taking care gud quality food ...only biriyani is good.. I ordered lime juice which doesn't have lime at all

Author: Neel
Description:
Edited**
Previously I have given 4 stars for this place as the biryanis and starters were good here.
But the quality and taste has drastically went down. I had ordered food few weeks back and was unhappy with the taste. Thought that might be issue ue with delivery orders and went to dine in today, but did not helped.
This used to be my favourite place for biryanis and i am upset as i need to change my biryani destination.

Author: Ajit Samal
Description: I ordered Special Chicken Biriyani. I got notified when the Delivery boy picked up The Biriyani. For my Surprise within 5 min He made the item as delivered without Delivering Food . When I called Delivery Guy , He Didn't Picked up the Phone And then Switched Off His Phone .  That Was a Horrible hunger night For me .

Author: Sikha Barua
Description:
Hungry as ever, I wanted to eat some good biryani. And the name of Meghana came to my mind. So, I quickly ordered one boneless chicken biryani from this place.

Order was delivered on time. And packaging was good as expected.

What can I say about flavour? It was amazing... And I loved every bite. This outlet didn't disappoint me too.

The only thing I don't like is that the online ordering system would get switched off in between placing orders. This can get really frustrating.

P.S. A place I can always trust for some good old biryani.

Author: Shubhav Chittal
Description:
They said this place serves one of the best biryanis in Bangalore .They were absolutely right !

Well this place lives up to the hype ! Ordered Meghna Special Biryani and the taste was awesome. Packaging was good .The quantity is too much for a single person though ! Will definitely try other biryanis over here ! A must visit place for all biryani lovers out there !

Know any place that serves a better biryani ? Do ping me ! I would like to try it 😋

Author: Riti Saraf
Description: We ordered chicken biryani, green peas masala and paneer butter masala. Very big disappointment from a renowned place. Peas were not cooked properly. And paneer butter masala was no where near paneer butter masala.

Author: Harsha Kn
Description: We visited this place for lunch during week end... during week end it will be mostly crowded but within few minutes you will get seats... the good thing about Meghana is quality never goes down... their biriyani is benchmark... we had chicken sheek kabab, spices were on the higher side... but biriyani as usual the best... there is a pan shop below here which serves ice paan dipped in chocolate, must try... since this place is in marathahalli the road is always crowded but no worries for parking... they have valet parking too... overall experience was good...

Author: Faheem U
Description: When ever we are hungry , not decided were to go. this is our go to place for Andhra meals. it's a best place for me any family for casual dining

Author: Ashwini Jogbhat
Description: Why don't you give online delivery to Mahadevpura? It's a corporate area. If I call them they say it will be 1 and half hours to reach here.. When there is no traffic still they take that much hour.!! Unbelievable.

Author: Vidur
Description: Beware if you’re visiting there over a weekend. This place is pretty crowded and it deserves to be. For those who’re craving for some spicy Andhra Flavours, you’re in for a treat. I’ve heard that it’s a must visit place for Biryani lovers. I’m not disappointed.

Author: Siddu Siddhartha
Description: Tried Meghana boneless chicken biryani and felt it tasted okayish with the egg coating and didn't get that extra kick to taste buds :( should've stick to the boneless chicken biryani

Author: Oliva Biswas
Description: This place serves awesome Biryani. We had the special biryani which was the blend of perfect spices and yummy chicken and shredder egg white toppings.

Author: Ram Viswanadhuni
Description: every time we are enjoying to take meghana spicy dum biryani i loved it and I liked it..alu dum biryani and chicken dum biryani we ordered last Saturday very nice experience .

Author: RAMAGOPAL MUDALIYR
Description:
Visited Marathahalli Meghana Foods this Sunday evening.

The ambience in the 1st floor is just ok but doesn't wow you.

The service is asual quick and fast. the staffs are courtius.

I ordered the signature dish of Meghana that is Boneless Chicken Biryani. This dish is spicy and tasty with juicy chicken. the portion served is good amount of quantity. The asking price for the dishes served not too high nor too economical.

Overall if you want spicy Andhra cusine, then this is your ultimate destination.

Author: Valli Nayagam
Description: Food had reached me after 2.30 hours I ordered online yesterday night. Raitha was spoiled which we could smell. The cover where onion kept were opened. If you are ordering for dinner, you need to be careful. I had ordered previously via zomato and I had no complaint. But this time I ordered directly in Meghana's site because online order for this restaurant was closed. Better to order somewhere if you are ordering for your dinner.

Author: Debabrata Sahoo
Description: I usually order food from here. Almost all the items like biryani, Ghee rice, dal fry, almost all non veg starters are  always awesome WRT price and quantity. If i dont want to take risk on testy food then usually my 1st choice goes to here.

Author: Adhithya Shankar
Description: Poor service.either the order doesnt come. Or the prder comes with half the items missing. I think its more than enough but zomate wont let me post it less than 140 chars

Author: Ganesh Doddala
Description: Felt sick after eating Biryani here. I had boneless chicken biryani which was worst in taste and the chicken for sure is not fresh. It has been two days and still feeling sick and had been to hospital couple of times and might take another couple of days to recover. I will never ever visit this place again and also will not recommend to people.

Author: Gaurav Sevekar
Description: The Best Andhra style biryani I found so far in Bangalore. I am a biryani lover and have become a regular at Meghana. ask for extra masala if you want to make it spicier. ambience is ok types , but must visit for biryani lovers

Author: Pekru Pienyu
Description: Ordered Boneless chicken biryani from this place through zomato. The restaurant did not send me the chicken pieces. Called the restaurant. Super rude person on the phone, asks me to contact zomato support. I ask him why? Since the error is from their end. He refuses to acknowledge the fact. I contact zomato support, they say the restaurant is saying there is no mistake.  They ask me to contact the restaurant. I do likewise. The restaurant says they've sent a replacement. Hours later i have still not received the chicken. If i could give the service lower then 1 star i would gladly do so. Super rude person on the phone. Does not acknowledge their mistake. 0/10 customer satisfaction.

Author: Priyanka Mukherjee
Description: Known for its spicy biryani's the place never fails on its taste. Been here like 3-4 times.. Authentic Andhra taste, love the food. Mutton biryani is better than the chicken one, also is more spicy. However, the place is mostly crowded and there is always a waiting queue. If you are lucky enough to escape the queue then you might have to eat your food fast and vacate the seat. I was almost made to gulp my food and had to pay and leave before I could put out the fire of my mouth.

Author: Ganesh
Description: We ordered boneless chicken biryani. All the pieces were slimy and a lot of them only had the flour covering without the chiflesh inside. Absolutely disappointing to be served such low quality food.

Author: Ankitha
Description: Definitely an authentic Andhra restaurant! The food is spicy, it's a killer. Cozy place. Good for groups and family as well. Management is good and quick. Economic place.

Author: Deepika Sharma
Description: spice lovers, typical Hyderabadi taste what I heard from my friends. I too loved the briyani what they serve here. it's mouth watering and later it will be eye watering :D . taste so good, good quality. crispy corn and lassi we ordered and vegetables and paneer briyani. All were tasting good. best briyani , corn was very crispy.

Author: Kannan Selvakumar
Description: If u want to have a decent Biryani in and around Marathahalli area, blindly visit this restaurant. What I liked most is, they have valet parking, that’s really good and you can have your food peacefully. Next is their service was nice. Overall a good place to  have a decent food.

Author: Himanshu Gugnani
Description: Went to this hype place Meghana fooods on a Sunday afternoon for Lunch. Parking was a very difficult task. Following which had to wait for 15 mins to get table. We were sent to 3rd floor which was very different from floors below with very simple table, chairs and no ambience. We ordered for lemon chicken and meghana special chicken biryani. Found both of them may be a Little above average and nothing very different from many other places. Overall decent food at very nominal prices but not worth waiting for so much.

Author: Soubhagya
Description: this place is really awesome for biriyani. I am a biriyani lover and I really recommend their prawn , fish and chicken biriyani. And the starter chicken kabab is awesome.

Author: Abhinav
Description:
This place has been on my wishlist for a long time, finally got an opportunity to visit here. One word for the food is "SPICY" . If you have taste buds for the spicy food and want to enjoy some spicy Biryani then head out to this place. Quantity served is decent and also the service is very quick. And yes they have rush during the peak hours. In terms of presentation and stuff this place does a decent job.
Food: 4/5
Ambience:3/5
Service:4/5

Author: Seshgiri Nomula
Description: Meghna special chicken biryani, the biryani was really good. Not too spicy neither too masala it was really good. If you are a biryani lover and you want some special taste than you much try. I really liked it and after eating biryani do not forget to eat chocolate pan which is below the Meghna foods in Marathalli. Shop was very small kind of dubba but the chocolate pan was really. Not like every pan it melted down in the mouth like an icecream with the flavours of sweet and chocolate. And the pan lasted for just few min you must try it. For pan and non pan lovers

Author: Reshma
Description: I ordered Special Meghana chicken biriyani and the taste was really tasty and good quantity of the food and for my surprise the gravy given along with the biriyani was also tasty which is not the case always with other restaurants.

Author: Abhishek Saha
Description: Amazing biryani. Both veg and non veg. Aloo dum biryani was one my wife's favorite. Only thing is that it is slightly costly and for that cost, quantity is not that great.

Author: Rebecca Dhiren
Description:
I think its main competition is its own reputation. 

I've always home-ordered biryani and chicken dishes from here. Never been to the restaurant although I want to. 

The biryani is okay, not unforgettable-like. I don't miss it as much as I miss the biryani from other places. Quite unimpressed but have nothing to complain.

Author: Manaswini
Description: Meghan food , which is placed at marthahalli.. day before yesterday I had been with my friend for unplanned dinner, ordered a boneless chicken biryani, chicken 65, chicken drumsticks & lime soda , thrust me taste was awesome and off course we had a satisfied dinner over there. Coming to quality and quantity both are up to mark and yes the cons is that place is always crowded due to high demand and you have to wait for sometime to get seats. if you are a biriyani lover must try this place . I can give you assurity you will love it . Ambiance is OK type. For food only I have rated 4.5 . Thank you 😊

Author: Jerry K Bobby
Description:
Very decent quantity and taste of the food.
Their starters are overpriced and not really worth it if you ask me.
But yea their mutton biryani was really good and so was their fried rice.

Author: Rama Krishna
Description: I had been to this place many times. All the dishes are really good quality and quantity. But maintenance in Rush hours will test your patience because not place to sit and you have to stand and wait till tables are empty

Author: SowKar
Description: We have visited this outlet few times.  We usually have Meghna special chicken biriryani, apollo fish, chicken lollipop and prawn fry. All the dishes have a very good aroma and unique in its style. Only suggestion is that they can lower their spice levels.

Author: Nikhil Goenka
Description: Been here several times and it’s other branches also and there was not a single time when I have found this place empty, it’s always full with people waiting to get a table. The service is fast and hence the wait time is minimal. Meghan’s briyani is my fav compared to others. Regarding the place, the ambience is decent, service is quite good and the food is amazing.

Author: Neeraja Kandaswami
Description: This place never serves omelette and gives some dumb reason that it would take time like half an hour!! But they are ready to serve egg burchi since it is already prepared and kept and they are just reheating and serving. Will never recommend this place to anyone.Worst customer service.

Author: Somali Bhadra
Description: I have heard about Meghna biryani from one of my  friends,almost every weekend he orders from here.So finally i decided to taste it.Today being the prelude of  the upcoming weekend mood,there's nothing like to kick start it  with some Andhra spl biryani. So we decided to order Meghna spl chicken biryani,mutton biryani & pepper chicken for lunch at office.I always prefer long grain rice in biryani and this biryani is exactly the way i want...long grain rice,mild smell spicy meat pieces with masala scattered on the rice.I enjoyed my kinda biryani. Peper chicken was spicy & tasty.Biryani meat was soft & juicy.I understood why my friend always praises  this restaurant.Delivery was quite prompt.Now even I do not mind to order biryani every now & then from Meghana....

Author: Swapnil Kumari
Description:
Lemon chicken and Meghnas special biryani (with coke) you are set for dinner for 2 weather home delivery or dining out.
I cud never finish the whole thing alone so the left overs went straight to my fridge and then I was set for brunch next day too.✌
I have called this place like n no of times and they will deliver your food.But only drawback their service is a lil slow in delivery so don't order if u stay a lil far away and hungry.As you might have to order from a different place before your food arrives
But ya... This place rocks and price is also reasonable
-from the foodie in me who is not so much of a biryani lover
Happy eating
😬

Author: Sridevirajus
Description: Surprisingly their veg thali is ultra delicious adding on to their famous boneless chicken biryani. Must try is their nati chicken biryani , veg thali , lemon and chilli chicken . This outlet’s biryani was super spicy compared to the one in indiranagar . If u are craving for Biryani , you know where to head to 😃

Author: Soumya Gopi
Description: I am a big fan of Meghana Biryani and meals. I have tried biryani from all their outlets and regularly get food (mostly take away) from Marathahalli outlet. I never had any issue with their Biryanis. I always prefer Meghana biryani over any other brand. Initially, minimum delivery order from Marathahalli outlet was 700 bucks (that was a bit too much and now it’s 300 bucks) and still for the love of biryani I have tried ordering from them. Now coming to the point, since few months whenever I add dishes on online order menu through Zomato and while processing online payment suddenly error message pop up saying ‘Currently they don’t accept online order’ or they turned off online order option while adding stuffs. This is something really bad for a well-known brand like Meghana. I always end up troubling my husband to get Biryani from them when there is no home delivery option. For Biryani my rating would be 4/5 but when it comes to this kind of pathetic service, I won’t rate them more than 2. It’s high time they should consider their valuable customers. If they can’t deliver food then they should take down the delivery option listed on Zomato. One more thing I have noticed in past few years is that their quantity is never consistent; sometimes it is good enough for two adults and sometimes quantity will be too less.

Author: Chitrang Apshankar
Description:
We always visit Meghana only to have Aloo dum Biryani. This is the only restaurant who is serving good quality Dum Aloo Biryani. Others are serving Veg Biryani which will consist mainly beans and a few other vegetables to name. I hate beans in biryani.

If you wanna try Aloo Biryani , this is the place and not to forget Lemon Soda with this.

Author: Rishabh Pandey
Description:
Quick service, super taste, below average ambience, and not so friendly staff, this sums up the place for me.

Check out their biryanis, they are lip-smacking to say the least.

Author: Murari Lal Murari
Description: I just go here to have Biryani. A great fan of it. Other items are average. Place is usually very crowded . Service is good. Price is litte higher.

Author: Prasant Hota
Description:
Food-4.5
Excellent quality , taste was best compared to other biriyani hubs in Bangalore
Ambiance-3.5
Need some improvement in it
Service- superb,the staffs are absolutely cooperative

Author: Sajal Mukherjee
Description: I must visit for biriyani lovers. They make the biriyani in that distinct Andhra style, really spicy and the flavors explode in your mouth.Ask for extra raita if your not accustomed to spicy food. Tried the Nati Chiken Biriyani (biriyani made with country chiken)  and it was really good. The mutton pepper fry was amazing too. I wish they would make a boneless version. The place gets very busy on weekends but@ the service was prompt and stuff were courteous. The put enough supervisor on the floor to make sure there is someone to serve you with another helping as soon as your plate is empty.

Author: Vamsi L
Description: The perfect stop for Biryani lovers. The service was real quick. And the taste was finger licking. Worth your visit. Don't forget to taste Apollo Fish.

Author: Saurav S
Description: Meghna has the best Hyd biryani I know of. Amazingly good Gondhuru chicken as well. Must compliment them for their excellent delivery service. Well done!

Author: Pankaj Nathani
Description: Ambience and service are overpowered by the fact that it’s always very crowded. Usually a take away place for me. Go here for the biryanis - they are worth it. Wouldn’t have any high hopes for the curries they serve, their flagship items are biryanis.

Author: Shambhavi
Description:
The Chicken boneless biryani is the Best 😍
It's so tastyyyy. A goood place to hang out and the environment is just awesome. Service is really good.

Author: Sandeep Kumar
Description: They got valet parking on that busy marathahalli service road , impressed with that .. 😊 coming towards ambience two floors sat on the top floor , it was pretty decent . Got the view of busy marathahalli road you can enjoy the food seeing some sad faces stuck in traffic 😅 .. food was top class no complaints . Andhra style food .. try biryani for sure ..

Author: Ramesh C. Pradhan
Description: Can't say much about a place which serves yummylicious biriyani. Doesn't matter whether I am having it for lunch or dinner. Just can't resist eating the chicken biriyani (specially the boneless biryani) ...too good!

Author: Yeshwanth
Description:
Awesome restaurant for Andhra style food
Don't miss it.
Best part of it is...BONELESS CHICKEN BIRIYANI...once u eat..u don't leave meghana... But don't try fish item there

Author: Ashish RAJ
Description:
This place serves the best biryani I ever had in my life and I lived in Delhi for 3 years. I tried all the Jama Masjid's special and other biryani joints but this outshines each one of them.
The boneless chicken biryani is something which cannot be easily defined. What adds to it is their quick service, quantity and the Mirch ka salan gravy + Raita.
No doubt if you want authentic dum biryani then this is certainly not the place. But for a lazy person like me the boneless biryani is a match made in heaven.

At last, only 4 star because all the other items are just good and nothing special.

Author: Kiran
Description: I have been to this place many times. What I like the most is boneless chicken biryani. ........Just adding this space to make it to 140 characters

Author: Veggie Foodie
Description: We tried paneer biriyani and dum aloo biriyani here as we are vegetarians and there were no other varieties in biriyani for us. Both the biriyanis were tasty. Tried golden baby corn also. That was very good. Buttermilk was below average as it was too diluted and not at spicy. Parking space was not there. But we are told to park in no parking area and they assured that there won't be any problem. Overall experience was ok.

Author: Soumyadip De
Description: One of the best biriyany 😍. Not Only quality, even quantity also best. It's package of good taste,flavor. Staffs are really good and fast.  After a long time I found a biriyani place, after bahar cafe. It's a really value for money.

Author: Shivam Datta
Description:
After staying in Bangalore for 2 years, FINALLY tried the Andhra favourite Meghana Special Chicken Biriyani. Expected something spicier, but to my surprise it wasn’t that spicy but full of flavour! Loved how they had marinated and fried the chicken before adding it to the biriyani. The helping was very good and the biryani was delicious.

The only reason for a 4 rating would be the ambience. Could have been much better.. you had people screaming here and there and the booths to sit on are pretty small.

A must visit for a biriyani lover.

Author: Pranaya
Description:
One of the place to have Biryani... Their preparation and customer service is Best in class.. few items to have are like Lemon Chicken, Chilly Fish, Chicken Kabab, Mushroom 65, Meghna Spl Biryani

Thank you

Author: Priyanka Naidu
Description:
The best place in town to get the authentic biryani.
Head out to any outlet in the city to have a satisfying meal lighter on your pocket.
Good ambience

Author: Raghu Nandan
Description: Poor takeaway service,no proper coordination between temporarary takeaway stall(arranged outside restaurant),ordered at the stall but ended up going to restaurant to get my parcel

Author: Chankey Pathak
Description: Even though they put a lot of spices in their food, it still taste average. Quantity is really good and if you order online you'll get super hot food. Props for that. Chicken and Mutton curry were decent. Price wise it's a bit costly. 35 RS for chapati? come on!

Author: Akash Das:::
Description:
Excellent food and wsame service and ambiance was very good experience very nice ...hospitality good ...

Service team was very good smile fece .thanku for service team

Author: Ashish Gupta
Description: We came here only for a biryani as we heard a lot about this place. And seriously, after a long time we had such a really good taste of authentic biryani. The place is also good. But the only problem,this place is always crowded, so while eating you can hear a lot of voices from different places. But place is good, you should have Chicken biryani here

Author: Kamlesh Annam
Description: The best thing about Meghana is biryani. They serve one of the best biryanis. Quality and quantity are best valued for money spent. The prices are also reasonable.

Author: Chaithra KB
Description: A good place to have a decent biryani with the just right spices. Service is super quick. Quite good ambience. Defenetly food for money. If u r egg lover then u haaaave to try egg chilly here, it's just yummmm. As a whole I would rate a 3.5/5 for the biryani out here.

Author: Siddheshwar Jadhav
Description: Situated at a walking distance from marathahalli bridge is this pocket friendly decent restaurant...The ambience is ok not great not bad,the service is prompt and the food delicious...We went there on a Christmas eve at rush hours....Still the service was fast enough...We ordered natu kodi biryani and chicken lollipop as suggested by the captain...The lollipop were nicely fried crispy and juicy....The biryani well cooked and the spices blended well...

Author: Jayanti Ganguly ⭐️
Description:
The most famous biryani house in Bangalore.
Love their Paneer Biryani and the boneless chicken biryani. There is something special about the taste and you would end up coming back again.
However, do not like the restaurant ambience and therefore mostly end up ordering home delivery.
The home delivery is painfully slow and expect delays especially on weekends and busy kitchen hours.
But Meghana biryani is still- I feel the best biryani in Bangalore.
The ambience, delivery experience is all below par but the food is awesome!

Author: Sai Krishna Akula
Description: Spiciness overloaded i loved the biriyani you guys make it very spicy and you guys have so many varieties of biriyani’s thats amendable. Keep up the good work guys waiting for the next visit. Kudos!!!

Author: Sagar
Description: We really enjoy the food. But it’s delivered late always. Always the reason of traffic is given. We hope that you guys deliver the food on time to satisfy our hunger.

Author: Harsh Kumar
Description:
Nice food.Spicy in taste.
Food 4/5
Ambience 2/5
Service 3/5
Looking forward to try some more Biryani in future

Author: Dharamjit
Description: Just in love with their boneless chicken biryani !!! Don't forget to ask for the day special !! Good quantity and are really tasty ! This place serves some really mouth watering dishes

Author: Vidya
Description:
A must try for one who loves biryani.
Pros: Amazing biryani (chicken). Sufficient quantity
Cons: paneer biryani was more or less tasteless, not a go to place when talking about ambience. I did not lik the seating arrangement it's quite cluttered. Home delivery has a min order limit so can't really order for one person.

Author: Mayank Patodia
Description: I'm upset that I don't find minus 5 for rating option for this restaurant. Order for something, they'll give something else and then say that thisbisbhow we prepare it. We asked to parcel the remaining food, they said they won't parcel because they're busy. Then after argument they agreed to parcel and mixed Paneer and Chicken Biryaani. Worst branch of Meghna Foods.

Author: Nagarjuna
Description: Food is pretty good. Prices are also decent compared to other outlets of Bangalore. I have tried Meals, Biryani, Curries and Starters. They are all good and satisfactory. You won't be disappointed.

Author: Preeti Goswami
Description: I could not believe I was having Meghna spl biryani.  It is horrible. Really horrible. If you at all want to have Meghna spl briyani, pls try out out the koramangka branch. Pls don't come here!

Author: Shubham Kumar Sinha
Description:
Woh kehte hai na, bangalore aaye aur mehgana ka biriyani nahi khaye toh kya khakh bangalore aaye.

This time lets start with the food- Meghana become an icon for biriyani. Simply the legend. Authentic taste, mind blowing quantity and huge variety of menu.

Now the place - all most every outlets have same vintage layout. You might feel that this is not good but trust me this is better than other biriyani house.
Go for it once atleast...order meghana spl. Biriyani.

Author: Nabarun Purkayastha
Description: Pathetic place for online order. During order they said it will take 60 minute and its 120 minutes and no clue where the order is. They have given delivery boy's number which is switched off. Disgusting.

Author: Shivangi
Description:
When you crave biryani, you need to head to meghanas. The boneless chicken biryani and the paneer biryani is just finger licking. The paneer tikka and lemon chicken for starters OMG the seriously tasty starters I was craving.

The ambience doesn't matter when you that yummy biryani.

Author: Rittika Sengupta
Description: I love meghana biriyani so much..but to my disappointment, yesterday i received prawns biriyani, which was completely different in taste and size (prawns) from the one we had at the restaurant. It seemed like some other side diah of prawns were given along with the biriyani rice.the tiny prawns were not gut cleaned and we got allergies out of it..so guys please do not order prawns biriyani from meghana only to get allergies..ver sad to get such service from Meghana foods, which used to be one of my fav biriyani points in Bangalore, and moreover, zomato charges more than meghana's bill.meghanas bill provided was atleast 60/- less than what i paid on zomato's checkout while ordering, which they claimed as taxes.

Author: Asutosh Dash
Description: Ambiance is good as per the category. I tried chicken biryani the normal one which tasted pretty dry. Masala was very less in it so the taste was missing.

Author: Rikhath
Description:
Our Friday lunch plan gets screwed thanks to Meghna. We had ordered for 7 chicken biryanis, 2 with bone and 5 boneless. This has been our standard order for quite some time with Meghna for Friday lunch.

Today at 2.10 PM the delivery boy delivered the food and left and when we went to eat the food, all we got was biryani rice and no separate chicken for boneless biryani.

We tried reaching the delivery boy whose phone apparently got switched off and after reaching to the restaurant multiple times and narrating the issue the restaurant manager, he cared a damn for the issue and blamed us saying that we must have consumed the chicken and complaining. He didn't apologize or said they goofed he just blamed us blindly.

We have been ordering food almost every Friday and for our team events from Meghna and we will for sure will never ever order again from this restaurant.

The order was placed through Zomato, details are in the pics attached.

Author: Ankur
Description: Meganas serve traditional Andhra Biryani! If you like a spoonful of garam masala in your Biryani then this is the right place for you. I would recommend Paradise over Meghana though for it's Paradise had better value for money and taste. A mutton Biryani in Paradise costs around 180 and in Meghana around 240-260. The serving is all most of the same size. Also Paradise has lesser garam masala which is a relief

Author: Nitin Kotni
Description: It's always congested and very tough to get a seat on weekends but yeah their food is great. We also faced issues with parking. Service could be little more better.

Author: Anisha
Description:
Loved the biryanis. Go for it if you are biryani lover!
Non veg options were more than veg ones.
The quantity of biruani seemed sufficient for two people.

Author: Parth Shrey
Description: Ordered special chicken biryani and mutton. Although the mutton was good, the chicken biryani was just as bad. The quantity was less, and the taste was banal. Did not expect this from Meghna foods. Definitely not ordering again.

Author: Amritomoy Chatterjee
Description:
After getting ditched my Mani, I tried to find solace in Meghna. Alas, Meghna didn't show any mercy 😢😢
Though the treatment was tad better than Mani. Biriyani was eatable, to some extent. Could see kebab pieces too, wow!

Author: Shamanth
Description: Good egg biryani. Well coz I am an eggeterian. Hearsay - non veg biryani is great. The service is not that great, ambience is good but this won't be noted once u have the biryani ready to be served. Overall, good joint for enjoying ur craving for biryani once in a while - coz the servings quite a lot for 1. So make sure u go when u r reallyyyyyy hungry. Enjoy thinpandis ;)

Author: PR
Description: In my opinion the quality of the food is deteriorating....the first time I went I was so taken away with the food that i decided to take the famous biryani for my family .... what a disappointment!!!!!!!! Family pack had just three pieces and the food was so dry!!! We only had rice rice and more of rice....Not sure if this is because my order was a take away or is this the case now...

Author: Tejaswini
Description: Mood for some Biryani, my next thought is Meghanas.Best Biryani in town. Biryani reaches the heart :P

Author: Ankit
Description: Its by default a goto place for having lunch on weekends specially if you are looking for biryanis and spicy starters. We have had Paneer Biryani, Meghana Special Biryani along with lemon chicken, babycorn starters and most of the paneer starters here. All were good. Specially the biryani were totally worth the money. You can surely visit this place for having a potful lunch :)

Author: Arjun Chauhan
Description:
Only one thing I have to mention your menu price is bit high with your rivals ... because your food quality and popularity is same as the they have but don't know why you are charging much.

I mean I had pron biryani for 1 person today it was 290rupees+ tax but your rivals are serving same in 180-190 rupees. Don't wanna mention their name but I guess this will be enough to let you know just keep your menu with market price.

Come to the food everything was okay but can't say awesome with this price. Starter Golden corn wasn't crispy at all I was feeling I m having some kind of thick noodles.

Author: Meghna
Description:
Well well well..... Spicy is the word it comes to my mind when I think about the food at meghana.. Boneless Chicken biryani and chicken 65 was our order. The food was slightly cold but it doesn't matter as long as it didn't change the taste of the food. Although being spicy it way just awesome.

Nice ambience.
Friendly staff.
Good presentation...

Author: Anon
Description:
The place is crowded has hell and there is no list maintained by the hotel so if you are waiting you will see people getting seated who came late seated before you. Food is average you can get this kind of food at any other joint. Ambience nothing special. Staff is ok but are not organized and even when seated prepare to wait for 30-45mins or more for the order like Biryani. Vegetarians got irritated and left.
Wont recommend this place! Start making a list of waiting people so that no one has to wait unneccessarily!!!

Author: Harshitha Shankar
Description: Yum yum yum biryani😋 was fed up of the normal mess food and thought of trying this!! Waited nearly for half an hour but the wait bear the fruit and this was just perfect ❤️

Author: Sidharth Mohanty
Description: Went here for lunch! I have been to Meghana’s other outlets! This was also crowded as usual. We ordered the days special Guntur chicken, it was good! Then for main course, we ordered Nati chicken biryani (as suggested by the guy who took our order) and it turned out to be quite delicious! Had Mutton curry also, which was a different preparation than the usual but it was good. Overall, good food.

Author: Ravi Rao
Description:
Good food, albeit slightly expensive - I mean Rs. 200 for Egg Biryani is costly. Given that 2 boiled eggs cost Rs. 10, they charged me Rs. 190 for Biryani Rice!!

The biryani was tasty, nevertheless. They don't have to be stingy with the Sherwa, and the raita was more water than curd/buttermilk.

Finally, the delivery was delayed. I had to call them 1 hour after placing the order, and only then did the delivery process begin!!!

Author: Soorajkrishna Srikumar
Description: What made my special chicken biriyani special was that it DID NOT HAVE CHICKEN!!! Delivery standards suck so does the food quality. Food dripping with oil, biriyani without chicken and more awaits you if you order from this place. They never answer your pone if you want to raise an issue. Fraud at its best!

Author: Arjun Narayanan
Description: Ordered Chicken biriyani to my office and the hotel delivered the things promptly and all. The only issue was that they forgot to give Us the CHICKEN!!!!!!!!!.  So I ordered a biriyani only to get rice and no refund was given to me. I contacted zomato and they said the hotel will call me, but that also did not happen. Such AMAZING service I have never seen.

Author: Manisha
Description: A great place with limited menu. Meghna’s special chicken biryani is delicious. Chilli chicken and chefs special starters tastes equally great. Awesome place to try out biryani. Good service

Author: Shubham Srivastava
Description: Hav been to this place a few times and liked the dishes they offer..the place is always crowded and drez loads of online orders as well.. Meghna spcl biryani is good and so is the tandoori chicken ..even the alu dum biryani is very good in taste..a good place to visit if u r in mood fr a biryani..

Author: Rita S
Description: Extremely poor experience with delivery. Was supposed to take 60 minutes, took 2 hours. Biryani came without the chicken pieces.
