They forgot to give the chicken pieces and when I called, insisted that they had given.. and its impossible that chicken was missing and disconnected the line.

Author: Adithya Gopalakrishnan
Description: I go to this restaurant to only have paneer biryani. There paneer biryani is very good with correct amount of spiciness. A must have if you are a vegetarian.

Author: Sajana Nair
Description: Best place for biriyani lovers..Must taste Meghana special biriyani..Starters too are good..Bit crowded on weekends and need to wait sometime..Worth enough to wait..

Author: Pradeep Kamath
Description:
Staff do not know how to attend customers. Something they should learn from Indiranagar outlet.
Will only visit this outlet if I am left with no other option to eat in Bangalore.

Author: Soumya Chatterjee
Description: Biriyani taste the best. A craving for Chicken biriyani always ends in Meghnas. I even liked Egg chilly. Have tried almost 4-6 times in this particular outlet on ORR.

Author: Ashish
Description: I ordered from here first time and i liked the food very much ... specially aloo dum biryani is super awesome... good portion .... definitely a candidate for multiple visits or future orders...

Author: Raja Sekhar Maddineni
Description: I have ordered starter and the food I received is not hot. Even after telling the same they act like they are bothered, but nothing changes from their side. Even the biryani is not up to the mark. Waste of money. I DO NOT SUGGEST THIS. Have many more good food joints nearby that location.

Author: Colin
Description: The only mutton rice item listed in the menu was missing. Moreever the Kalmi Kabab starter that we had ordered, had pieces  way too small. It's definitely not worth for money that's spent. Won't recommend the Marathahli outlet to anyone.

Author: Niral Vaidya
Description: We were charged GST on the delivery charges. The delivery took more than 2 hours to reach us. Their phones were unreachable making it unable for us to track our order. Not at all recommended.

Author: Sachin Pandey
Description: If you are biryani lover then this is the stop for you to get some taste buds experience. They serve finger licking spicy biryani which is different from other main stream biryani joints. I would recommend to try bone less chicken biryani and yeah obviously they have paneer biryani if you are vegetarian.

Author: Ishita Chakraborty
Description:
This place is one of my favourites.I simply love all the types of biryanis served here.The prawn biryani and Meghna special biryani is delicious and too good.Long grain rice are finely cooked with correct blend of spices with chicken/prawns chunks and gravy and egg.This is the first place where I tried prawn biryani and loved it.
The biryani is not dry and that aroma leaves you craving for more.The guntur chicken and the chicken fry are worth a try and are great starter option.
They have lots of variety to choose from.The staffs are courteous.Quick service with quality food.The Hyderabad cuisine at its best.

Author: Manjunath Reddy
Description: One of the few places in Bangalore which serve one of the best biryani . We tried their chicken biryani which was served with boneless diced cubes and I must say it was completely balanced with flavors . They service is very quick and staff was attentive

Author: Purva Umalkar
Description: This is just an average place with average food at average rates. A very limited menu and all the items in the menu may not be available. So, you may need to choose your dish more than once. The service is quick. Though the place is very normal, it serves decent food compared to other restaurants of the same category in marathahalli.

Author: Tamil Mani
Description: Recently I had fish biriyani here, I feel their taste has been changed. It was very spicy and taste was OK. In allu dum biriyani potato was not cooked properly

Author: Agrima Agarwal
Description:
I had meghna chicken biryani with bone.I liked the biryani though I didnt had meghana special biryani because I m not fond of boneless biryani.
Service-4
Food-4
Ambience-3.5

Author: Salman Rukadikar
Description: Great biryani, prompt service! Highly recommend! Had to wait for a while to be seated though because of the high demand (went on a weekend) but, worth it!

Author: ANIRUDDHA SRIVASTAVA
Description: When one has a craving for a good aromatic biryani then Meghana's name comes to our mind first. Their special chicken boneless biryani is a real deal. Aroma of spices increases your appetite just as an appetizer would do. And then the main thing that one visits for, long grain biryani. Just brilliant!! Haven't tried anything else than biryani here as Biryani is the dish that is very famous from Meghana foods.

Author: Purvesh Jain
Description:
We ordered food online from office for team lunch.
firstly, items of veg meals were not listed.. we ordered a veg meal, 2 veg and 1 non veg biryani.. quantity was good
But packaging was in plastic bags, which made serving difficult. While other restaurants provide containers so it's easy to serve, store and eat when you take out obviously.
Another thing, there was one nonveg item. Which couldn't be a part of our meal. Problem was - packet didn't mention nonveg, how a person is supposed to know what's that unless he eats it when texture looks like general babycorn Starter?? Serious improvements are required for delivery.
Meghana foods was a well known name but now things have changed I guess.
Taste was okay, not very good.

Koramangla venue is way better in taste
I wouldn't opt for this place again..

Author: Jaipal Singh
Description:
This is a pretty famous spot with 2 floors. Went with friends yesterday. 
you will always find people (lot of people) waiting for table, but the time management is good and we got seats in 6 minutes (yes i was counting ). 
Service was prompt 
we ordered Meghna special Biryani, which comes with Boneless chicken,.
NOTE :- Whatever type of BIryani you order they will just add diff chicken pieces on top of it. My friend ordered veg Biryani and they put mix veg gravy on top of same rice 
Biryani was too spicy , with pieces  of cloves coming in your mouth. you can't eat it without curd raita.Boneless chicken was not tender.
we went after hearing many good reviews but it was not that impressive.. 
Still, will give it one more try sometime later ,.....!

Author: Sachin Kumar Singh
Description:
I had visited this place to catch quick grub on my hungry stomach... The pace does have a lot guests and may be it was a Friday evening :).
nothing as special as it is a usual restaurant with typical average service. The food portion is average and the taste is OK. The take away counter is busy as they are able to cater quickly for ad-hoc orders.
May be will visit during non peak hours to test how they fare when they are not busy.
The restaurant is located on the 1st floor so you will have to climb up (no lift).

Author: Mathan Santhosh Kumar
Description: One of the Perfect restaurants to taste Hyderabad Briyani in Bangalore, the Meghana spcl briyani I would suggest.. had good dining experience there

Author: John Eaton
Description:
I liked the food here quite a bit - the style is Andhra and the specialty is Biryani. We ordered a few Chicken and Paneer 65s - all quite good for starters

Service here was exceptional - this will become a favorite on my periodic visits.

Author: Anusha Naik
Description: One of the best place in Bangalore to have biryani. If you want to have spicy Chicken biryani then do try Meghana's Chicken Boneless Biryani which is served with a boiled egg. I once tried Meghana's Special Chicken Biryani and I did not like it much as it lacked flavours. All their starters are good as well... It's crowded in the weekends but you'll manage to find a seat. The prices are reasonable as well. Ambience is not that great. It's decent though. But then who cares when there's yummy biryani waiting to be devoured by you. The service provided is also fast compared to other places. Staff members are polite.

Author: Sonika Jadhav
Description: One of the must try biryani in Bangalore. The marathalli branch has a better ambience and reasonable prices than the kormangala branch. All in all must try for all non vegetarians.

Author: Ritesh Bhatia
Description:
Walk in:4/5 The place is great for a visit. The ambience is of a typical family restaurant. It is pretty crowded on weekends. The food Is awesome. One place where you can find a good veg biryani.

Online delivery: 0/5 ordered twice from here. They sent a bag of masala rice with 2 spoons of gravy and raita. When called and complained to about the same, the manager refused a refund, but instead promised to send a pack of gravy, which never arrived. Overall, a pathetic experience for delivery, but a great one on the walk in

Author: Gokulvanan
Description: Worst service when there is more crowd. The waiter says that it will take more time to make an egg omelette, hence cannot be served. But the dragon chicken or the paneer briyani could be served earlier it seems. It sounded very rubbish to me. I prefer Nagarjuna to this hotel when comes to service or the quality of food.

Author: Shekhar Gupta
Description: I love there aloo dum biryani and think it's the best. Other than biryani I am not a fan of anything else there. The starters are too oily and not worth ordering.

Author: Prashant Gupta
Description: First of all to start with I ama vegetarian and I used to love this place, but recently, when I ordered for home delivery and found chicken pieces in it. Tried calling them but as soon as they heard about it they cut the phone and not picking up again. Shit you guys are :(

Author: Sambhav
Description:
I am a big fan of biryanis and I love trying biryanis here and there all around bangalore and to be honest, meghana has beenin my top favourite biryani go to places since more than 2 years now.

Their best piece is the Meghana Special chicken biryani that will make you feel a very different kind of biryani.

Giving less tha 5 because of the service, and many a times how they mange the sitting in rush hours unless no cons.

Other things to try is
lollipop biryani
fish biryani
ghee roast chiken
pepper chicken
BHeja fry...

Author: Harsh Singh
Description: Much heard about it for biryani. Food was good but was too spicy. Service is good and ambience is ok. Overall you can visit second time for dine in.

Author: Yamuna Choubey
Description: A good place for indian  food specially hyderabadi, but needs lots of attention on quality of food the portion size is fine but tastes needs to be improve.

Author: Pramod Singh
Description:
I always give 100% for their fish biryani. never found anything better than this.
Just loved this thing in all Meghan outlets
Meghna special chicken biryani is also fine but my love goes to fish biryani.
fry Prawn was also ok but too spicy.

Author: Meby Mariam Mathew
Description: Best place to try andhda cuisine especially their biriyanis.Very spicy and tasty.Dont expect great ambience- its very noisy and crowded during lunch and dinner hours.Service is very prompt.

Author: Javed Basheer
Description:
Good for Biryani's

Frankly this is the only dish I have ordered every time as we do this while we are at work,
Never been disappointed with their Biryani, its a SAFE BET

Quantity is BIG, one regular biryani can be shared easily with small eaters
Being an Andhra speciality eatery be prepared to get a taste of their spices,

Its a little hot and spicy, to my liking not everyone may like this,
One of the so called authentic Hyderabadi Biryani but I dont mind their claim as long as its taste good although it is nothing close to the authentic hyderabadi biryani taste

Overall - 4/5
Taste 4/5
Price 3.5 /5
Service 3.5/5

Author: Uma
Description:
We ended up having a weekday dinner at Marathahalli branch. The moment I entered the premises it was filled with aroma of lovely birayani, it was so good.Without any delay we ordered special boneless birayani, chicken butter masala, butter naan and some soft drinks.

The birayani rice was flavourfull, it was not dry and it was with right spice level.The boneless pieces come with masala and it was such a nice combination.It was one of nicest birayani I had after a long time.

Coming to chicken butter masala the curry was filled with only oil, yes guys insane amount of oil.On
my insistence the service staff changed it but what we received was small pieces of chicken with grevy. It was not butter chicken just felt like we are having some curry without any taste.That really spoiled my birayani wow factor.

So if you are going to Meghna go for it's Birayanis they are really good.

To cheer up my mood next to Meghna there is a nice paan shop which sells really good paan including chocolate paan.

Author: Shraddha Navalgund
Description:
I would've given a five star rating had my recent visit been better! Very bad service. Had to wait a long time for the food to arrive.
Food was good, no doubt.
But by the time the food arrives you have lost the appetite to eat!

Author: Shreya G
Description: Had meghana special chicken biriyani as takeaway. If you are craving for some spicy biriyani then it's a good option. Chicken quantity seemed less compared to the amount of rice they give. Service is fast.They don't take phone orders or dint take mine. Not sure about that.

Author: Vijaya Soliwal
Description: Not very impressed with the food, starters were extremely spicy and oily. Biryani was dry and tasteless. Had expected this to be one of the best in Blore.

Author: Vedavyas Chaturvedula
Description: If you are a biriyani lover stuck in banglore then this is the place for you. The panner biriyani from this place is my favorite. The level of spices or the value of money makes is a weekly destination for me. There is still an issue of parking on the service road and the traffic makes it a little hard but totally worth it!

Author: Diwakar Mandal
Description: One of the best biriyani in town.. having spent 4 years in hyderabad, I found the flavours to be very close to the authentic Hyderabadi biriyani.. great experience..

Author: Priyanka Pawan
Description: Been here with my friends....for biryani this place is gud....but I think better options are also available for biryani rather than this restaurant....

Author: Vividh Kulshrestha
Description: One of favorite places for having biryani. Almost once in a week I visit this place or order online. Specially for Meghna Special Biryani, tandoori chicken and fish fry. Awesome taste.

Author: Umesh Parikh
Description:
Called for home delivery, their Punjabi food is very good. Had also called for biryani for friends and they liked it. Starters too were decent.

Edit:
Called for home delivery, chilli paneer was hopeless, so we're the paneer vegetable and rotis. Downgrading rating from 3.5 to 2

Author: Anshul Pardhi
Description:
THE BEST PLACE TO EAT BIRYANI IN BANGALORE. All the outlets serve the best biryani in Bangalore, both veg as well as non veg. The Meghana Special Chicken Biryani and the Paneer Biryani are the best one can get in Bangalore. Even the Tandoori Chicken tasted great. It's a great combination of Tandoori Chicken with the Biryani, sufficient for 2 people. 

The ambience is good, a decent family restaurant. The main problem is getting a table here. It is always full and you have to book a table in advance if you are visiting the place in prime time.

Author: Ashish Pal
Description: I ordered special veg biryani and I got really special one with a fly in it. They were so generous for not taking extra money for the fly. Thanks Meghna foods

Author: Rahul Ranjan Das
Description: Best biriyani can be found here. I have been twice and just been overwhelmed. I hope to visit this restaurant again. Prices of the food is pretty reasonable.😍

Author: Pawan Gupta
Description:
Price is going up but everything including quality and quantity has gone down. Post GST prices again have gone up drastically as if there was no tax earlier. 
Biryanis are good but nowadays you would get lot of rice and hardly any chicken.

Author: Srikant Jayaraman
Description: It's pathetic that their Minimum amount for delivery Rs. 450. Also apart from the biryani, nothing tastes that good here. Please bring down the minimum delivery amount.

Author: Melvin DCruz
Description: The order was of two chicken biryani and what came was alot of rice with enough pieces of chicken for four. The curry which was provided was too spicy and my friends loved it. Will definitely order again from you.

Author: Rajeev Ramachandran
Description: I would go to this place for a reasonable taste of the biriyani and other non veg items. There is nothing exceptional in the food served, a normal place to eat and the ambience is average, staffs were ok, nothing to complain or nothing to say vow.. go there if you are craving for some spicy food..

Author: Harjeet Kaur
Description: I liked the food but here there is no parking space... So if u are going on your own vehicle than u have to park road side.. and then police van will pick up your vehicle..

Author: Ketki Keskar
Description: Quality not up to the mark. Too much rice and very less chicken gravy. It's very hard to just eat rice without the gravy and not spicy too. Really disappointed with the delivery service.

Author: Shubham
Description:
Heaven for a biryani lover, which is their signature dish. It leaves an aftertaste behind it, which leaves you with a desire to not even have water, so that the taste remains. 

If you are going there to have Andhra food other than biryani or if you are a vegetarian, then it would be better to reconsider your decision. An interesting thing that happened in our visit was, the waiter was suggesting the "today's special" starter for non-veg, and when our vegetarian friends asked for "today's special", the waiter was like "Veg me kya hi special hota h sahab :) ".

Ambience is not upto the mark. The tables are arranged to make optimal use of the space which gives the place a congested look. It is always crowded by people. But all of this is felt until your order arrives, and then you are lost. Service is good.

Overall, the place is decent in terms of value for money, but only for a biryani lover.

Author: Akshay Kumar
Description:
Had awesome briyani and loved chicken lollipop
The best part was service which we received,it was fast and good and the staff Mr aakif was very friendly

Author: Abhi
Description:
It is written Minimum order value as Rs. 450 but when we are trying to place it is asking to place an order with minimum vale of Rs 700. EXPLAIN.

Also Minimum order value 700 is too much and it is not there for even bigger restaurants. If you dont want to deliver food remove yourself from zomato. It will safe people from wasting their time.

Author: Deepshikha
Description: Horrible biryani.... we had it at home....when the parcel reached it only had biryani rice in one packet and some pieces of cornflour coated chicken in another packet which too was horrible....hyderabadi biryani house is much much better...not able to understand the reason behind the craziness of people here for meghna biryani food...it doesn't have the actual biryani flavour ..should be named as yellow rice and chicken chunks not biryani at all...

Author: Kumar Mohanty
Description: Took away boneless chicken biriyani yesterday. After reaching home when I opened the packet o my found biriyani rice. Then I opened the small packets for raita but found some boneless chicken with cornflour coating. That's the boneless chicken and biriyani. Rice was not that great except saffron essence.

Author: Rakesh Dewangan
Description:
Heard a lot about this place from my friends.
Their boneless chicken biryani is a good to try.
Overall biryani is similar to other Hyderabad biryani.
A good place for food but nothing extra ordinary.

Author: Arun Thokala
Description:
I have been to Meghana numerous times.. Never been disappointed by the food. Food is a bit spicy.
Meals and biryanis are good. Not Overpriced. Worth the money

Author: Kavya
Description:
Tried their Briyani's in almost all outlets..its one of the first resturants which came up with boneless biriyani. Where Briyani are served with boneless pieces on it... Great creativity..
That's been the regular order from restaurant and taste has not detirioted even by a percent.. They have maintained their standards

Author: Venkat Ramana
Description: Definitely one of the best places to have biryani in Bangalore. The ambiance was not that great, feels like an outdated restaurant, but the briyani tastes exceptionally great. Serve time was also very less, got our order which included a chicken starter and two boneless chicken briyani within in 10 mins. Overall it is great place with decent pricing!.

Author: Sai Behera
Description:
The foods are Awasome. Particularly the service is quite good. Thanks Aakib for great service.
It is one of the best restaurant in Marathahalli area.

Author: Abhijeet Bhatnagar
Description:
This biryani place is easy to find, located on the main marathahali road above Sony Center.
Ambiance is plain and simple family type restaurant nothing too fancy nor too bad.

We ordered a chicken starter and meghna special biryani and taste was eternal, just the way it was decribed. Nothing too spicy. Ask for extra spicy if you want a proper andhra biryani.
Service time was also decent enough.

Author: Arun Kumar
Description: Good spicy andra food, Good number of options if you are a biryani lover. Servixe is also good. Food Delivery is really bad - Biryani was cold & no curd was provided. Wont suggest to order from here.

Author: Sapna Borwankar
Description:
The sumptuous Andhra flavors took me back to Hyderabad!  We had some catering done for a work lunch and I can't remember have felt this overdosed in ages.

The golden baby corn is nothing to boast about, can be skipped.  The tomato curry was mind-blowing.  We couldn't stop eating it.  Typical, home made tomato koora!  The veg biryani was fabulously flavored and perfectly cooked.  My colleagues appreciated the chicken biryani just as much.  Apparently the egg masala was rather tasty as well.

Definitely a place to visit if you love the spice!

Author: Praveen
Description: Total crap in online delivery. Takes very long time. More than 1.30 hrs is unacceptable. Zomato's after support is equally sad. So sorry Zomato, this is my last order here.

Author: Sidharth Suresh Nair
Description: Arguably the best Biriyani in a city which has plenty of Biriyani options. Irrespective of the number of times you have been, the flavour always seems new. The quality of rice marries perfectly with the succulent chicken/mutton. In a close competition between the chicken and mutton Biriyanis, chicken wins by a slender margin. Happy ending!! 😊

Author: Rahul Kumar
Description:
The fact that the food is cheap and the taste is good as compared to other places in Bangalore make this place worth visiting. Please don't expect much on ambience and all. Less options for veg biryani though and don't compare the taste with Hyd'bad biryani treating it as a benchmark. But it is way better than other biryani houses in the same price range.

Prices- Reasonable 4/5
Taste - Good 4/5

Author: Nagarjun Raikar
Description: Tried the boneless chicken biryani. Absolutely delicious. Good ambience and service. A place famous for it's biryanis, a must try. Haven't tried the starters here, so cannot speak about them.

Author: Shreesh Koti
Description: Its okay not that better. Been to Jayanagar outlet thats better than this! And the services are okay! Should wait even if there is no crowd. So not satisfied with what I expected from Meghana foods!

Author: Sandeep Jana
Description:
Definitely the best biryani we have had in Bengaluru in my short stay of 1 year here. My folks, my friends everyone who has eaten here have only rave things to say about their biryani.

We tried their signature Boneless Chicken Biryani and Prawn Biryani and unlike other places the meat is well cooked and marinated and not just boiled like other places.

No doubt overcrowded and be prepared for good waiting time but definitely worth the time.

Will go again for sure

Author: Girish Kumar
Description:
I am not a very big fan of spicy food but every time I ordered I always asked them to make it less spicy.. the service team have been helpful to consider my request and made it accordingly for me.
Meghana food is not just about Biryani, try out their Tandoori chicken.. perfectly marinated and Well cooked chicken is Yummm 😊

Biryani and Tandoori chicken had been among the regular order and I have always enjoyed my meal at Meghana Foods.
More than anything my family is happy to order from there every time they get a chance !!

Author: Nihara
Description: I've been here a couple of times. The Biryani here is absolutely amazing. I love Meghana special Biryani. Biryani rice is flavored so well and the best part about this Biryani is that it is topped with boneless pieces of perfectly spiced chicken. I liked Meghana Chicken 555 from the starters. Vegetarian starters are average and the Paneer Biryani that I once had wasn't so good with paneer cubes not being soft. Biryani served has good portions of rice and chicken but the quantity of the beverages like lime soda, lime juice can be increased.Apart from that, service and pricing is okay, ambiance can be better. If you're craving for Brilliant Biryani in Bangalore, this is the place to be !

Author: Chaitanya Sravanth
Description: Ambience and service is good here. But the cuisine limited to only South Indian less andhra dishes , The chicken biryani is above average and egg biryani and special veg biryani are pathetic both for cost and taste. I heard that meals are quite good here.

Author: Varun
Description: Seriously.... I wonder how come ppl are mad about meghana biryani. Ordered today.... Late delivery, still I was okay but the quality was horrible and pathetic. Completely over hyped.... Wake up guyz avoid such biryani center. Biryani zone is 1000 times better.

Author: Shantanu Verma
Description: The standards and quantity have dropped like crazy!!!!!ive been a customer for 6 years and so disappointed. They will lose business like this

Author: Ajay Rodriguez
Description:
Meghna Biriyani's are always a treat to our taste buds, inspite of my numerous visits to this place I keep falling for their mouth watering Biriyani's every time and then.

These guys also don't give much importance to their ambiance but they compensate it well with their Biriyani's.

One of the must visit places if you are a Marathallian😃😃

Author: Praveen Kumar
Description: This is a cool place to eat spicy food. Especially Biryani. Spicy spicy spicy. It's good to taste after work! Enjoy the most delicious tastes of andhra style cusines.

Author: Prafulla Chandra Senapati
Description:
If fiery spicy Biryani is your thing....then this is where you should head. Super hot biryani will numb your taste buds and bring tears of joy (pun) in your eyes.

Everybody else....keep calm and eat something else.

Author: Aditya Mishra
Description: Never order anything from marathalli branch. Twice I ordered and simply I got cheated. They don't even give 100gms of chicken in their special biryani. Both Zomato & Meghana foods are doing con job. No refunds, no phone calls too. Very very bad experience.

Author: Salumethil R
Description: Pathetic people.. horrible service..unable to give a zero hence giving it a rating of one..will never order from here again..they do not respect their customers

Author: Vinay Harinarayanan
Description: Terrible terrible service...waited two hours.. no one answers..not seen such terrible service ever..show the minimum courtesy to respect your customers..will never again visit this place. Giving a one star rating as zero is not possible.

Author: Debahuti
Description:
Known for its biyarani, hence decided to stop by for lunch. Ordered gobi manchurian and boneless chicken biyarani with some drinks.

Biyarani quantity was quite filling for two people. We weren't able to finish it. Taste wasn't that great or may be I have had much much better biyarani as I was in Hyderabad for two years. Boneless chicken biyarani was kind of chicken gravy on the top and biyarani rice below it. Gobi manchurian was ok ok.

Ambiance 3/5
Taste 3/5
Service 3.5/5
Value for money 3.5/5

Author: Srinivas
Description: Try Meghana spl biryani and boneless biryani.. Meghana foods had its own brand in biryani .. one of the best biryanis that I had in Bangalore ..

Author: Abbas Akbar
Description:
So far the best Biriyani iv had in Bangalore. The mesghna chicken boneless biryani is a must try. Their mutton biryani is okay, but the boneless chicken biryani is to die for.
Fantastic taste, quick service and tasty food is all just there.

A must visit and a re visit.

Author: Sushma Vemuri
Description: As everyone expects from "Meghana foods" the food was pretty good. It was spicy and has that flavour that will make you keep going for more. The one thing that caught our attention more than the food was their bad service. On the contrary to all the thoughts that comes to our heads when we hear bad service...The food wasn't late, it was too early ( literally 3 min from the sec we ordered)!!! The minute the food was served it felt like the waiter was breathing on our necks wanting us to complete the food.  Even though the food was good in terms of taste and quality, their hospitality spoiled the experience for us. All in all if you are looking for food and want to eat it without conversing this is the best restaurant to eat in but if you are looking for a complete meal with ambience...I think u should definitely think twice.

Author: Soumil Agarwal
Description:
Pathetic experience.
Placed a COD order at Meghana foods Marathalli outlet:-
1.Got the food after 1.5hrs(online order), the outlet is roughly 6km from my place. 
2.I wanted to speak to the manager Lal which they blatantly refused saying manager is not around(Even gave me a wrong phone number when I insisted the delivery boy Kiran).
3.A guy named Surya working at the outlet gave me that wrong number , on asking for refund he even had the guts to tell me to cancel the order but not to expect any discount or refund.So I returned the food back.

PS. I ordered it from Meghana Foods online delivery itself(you have to have a minimum order of Rs500 for home delivery so I added a naan just to cross 500)Even after that they fail to meet their standards.

Author: Sakhi
Description: A nice place to enjoy good biryani... Went with friends... Many people recommended for biryani.... It's good and worth the price... Good and fast service..

Author: Premangshu Howli
Description: A good andhra cuisine place. Though for people from rest of india like me, will find really much spicy and will have to cry but will adore the real blend of well cooked spices. Chicken kabab biriyani was really good . Almost all the starters was good. But their spicy gravies have a magic as they will call you for another spoon and then cry but again it will call you for the magical spice and again one glass of water. Really awesome value for money place.

Author: Lokanath Biswal
Description: Worst online delivery service. Can't stand along their commitment. Takes more than 3 hrs to deliver 2 plates of Biryani, as if they will prepare biryani after the chicken is hatched from its egg.

Author: Sushmitha
Description: The best Andra-style biryani one can have in marathallii area . Biryani  quantity is enough to doze you off to sleep. Service and staff is polite and trained but the place is always crowded. The ambience is for a family gathering not a place for bachelors.

Author: Kiran Palakodeti
Description: This is a quick eat and go joint. Let the expectations be as minimal as possible. The food is ok and is not the biryani you expect in a typical Hyderabadi Biryani Joint. THis is more of a hybrid for HYD Biryani. At some glance one gets a feel that the staff are very busy and are running against time. However, they are at their casual best. They surely practice slow and steady wins the race. There are times when you feel like taking your food and go as there are people waiting, looking and judging you. Staff are very friendly and try to fulfill all your wishes.

Author: Pratik Pradhan
Description: Ordered home delivery of Chicken Biriyani with extra chicken worth 996/-. Food was okay, but surprised to see the service tax added to it. I mean STax is supposed to be added If somebody is eating at the restaurant. I mean, how come STax will be added if somebody order a home delivery. Its simply loot.

Author: Amit
Description: This is the perfect place for IT people in and around Marathalli to enjoy a filling biryani. Try the authentic Meghna special biryani and be assured you won't get disappointed. They don't have much options, and why do you need them either when the place specialises for awesome biryani.

Author: Archita Rai
Description:
The biryani here is just the best and awesome! Couldn't stop myself on eating just one, the quantity and quality is just great and at the best price.

Ambience - 3.5
Food - 4
Service - 3.5

Author: Dipto Pandit
Description:
We visited this place for a quick lunch on a weekday. Tried there biryani, it different, and nice. We ordered some other dishes including fish. Food was good.

I have also taken delivery from here - on time :)

Ambience 3/5
Food 3.5/5
Service and presentation 3/5
Value for money 4/5

Author: Jithin Raju
Description: Awful service. Paid for Prawns biryani and took parcel from the take away counter. Came home only to see Chicken biryani inside the parcel. Called up Meghana Marathahalli Manager Mr.Murali at 8.45 pm and raised a concern. He promises me a replacement in 45 minutes. At 10.15 pm, called up him again to follow-up and he says delivery boys are busy and item can't be delivered tonight. He insists me to come and collect the prawns biryani from the take away counter. Out of sheer hunger and anger, I traveled all the way to Meghana Foods to collect the parcel only to hear from Mr.Murali that the prawns biryani is over and I can come the next the day to take the parcel. Was he serious? He wants me to have my dinner the next day? Asked for a refund and got the refund. Terrible experience. Spoiled the weekend mood!!!! If someone from Meghana is reading this, "You did a poor job"

Author: Gagandeep Singh
Description:
Ordered Online (Order No LTOD1737193) costing Rs 599.
But i was delivered partial order ( along with Coke ) costing Rs 577  . I returned the unwanted item 'coke' and asked for the remaining amount i.e. Rs 75. Delivery boy refused to pay me the difference amount. I called Meghana Foods Office ( Mr. Murali ), he acknowledged that he will revert back to me, but i am still to hear from them. Everyone there, I would recommend not to order online through Meghana Foods website.

Worst Expericene/ Worst Customer care.

Author: Vineel C
Description: One of my collegues planned a treat overthere. A gang of 5 went to this restaurent. We ordered chicken manchuria, chicken biryani, veg biryani. The starters are good and biryani lacks spice and again we ordered double masala biryani. I would like to say about a strange thing here when we ordered double masala biryani we thought that would be cooked with a bit more spice. The way the serving guy served it wondered us. He bought masala and biryani seperately🙄

Author: Lakshya Garg
Description: Best place to try for biryani. Though I had veg biryani  here, but even that tastes super awesome. Their extra spicy biryani can blow air from your ears and nose. I love to eat here more often.

Author: Pallavi Priyadarshini
Description: Heard good reviews about its biriyani and I must say I am not disappointed. The chicken biriyani was awesome. The thin slices of chicken marinated in a different kind of sauce was the show stopper. I savored each and every spoonful of that biriyani ! Would visit again 😍😍

Author: Sabyasachi Bhuyan
Description: This 2.5 is only because of their biryani. They have started cheating people like anything these days. Today I had 2 boneless chicken biryanis for takeaway. Ridiculously these people have started taking service tax and all for take away also. Instead of 2*210=420 I had to pay 477 which is unbelievable for 2 biryanis. You are getting name and fame but that doesn't​ mean you will start doing like this. I have been having biryani for last 3 year from Meghna foods but never this much amount biryani which was very less then anytime before. Please don't put your name down and don't start cheating people like this. Hope you maintain your dignity as before.

Author: Praneeth Kumar
Description: Ambience here is ok ok. Service is decent. Food is good here. Who ever visit there, should have Andhra meals or biryani. That's really good.

Author: Preet
Description: Mosquitoes were landing on our plates...disgusting place. Unhygienic place. Finished our food and took off as early as possible.finished our dinner somewhere else.

Author: Lokesh
Description: Try meghana special briyani!!! Must taste. Typical andhra cuisine!!! Know for briyani's and andhra meals. A good place to spend time with food!!

Author: Deeksha Pandey
Description: This is one of the place I can go repeatedly. Just love the quality of Biryaani they serve, chicken especially. The taste is really good. Though the best you get here is Biryaani rest other dishes are fine. Service is fine.

Author: Supriya Thakur
Description: Went to this place on a weekend some days back for dinner. It was very crowded. We had to wait for some time to get a table. We orderd chicken bityani, mutton biryani and paneer biryani. They were good but a bit dry. Service was okayish.

Author: Om
Description: The standard of the biryani sadly has dipped.I had ordered prawn biryani and chicken biryani.Both of them were pretty average.The meat and prawn had too much batter which didn't let the flavour of the meat come through.

Author: Pritam Banerjee
Description: If you are looing for Hyderabadi Biriyanis without makig a hole in your pocket, this is the place to go. Didnt order much except the biriyanis...Rest of the food is also decent...value for money for sure

Author: Vinay M Swamy
Description: Love the food here. But, kindly do not enter after 10p.m. Food won't be good, feels like they have served u plain rice rather than biryani. Enjoy the Biryani afternoon itself.

Author: Kushan Patel
Description: Dont  Order online, they took me 2 hour to deliver.  and every time i followed up  on delivery  they super lie(boy is coming in 5min  5 min),  Third class service.

Author: Abhinav Relan
Description:
Very poor service!
Ordered boneless chicken biryani for lunch and it took them a long time just to deliver the order.

Secondly , we already are aware that the boneless chicken served alongwith the biryani is very less in quantity so we always prefer to order extra boneless chicken and we did the same this time but they delivered just the extra chicken and did not deliver the chicken alongwith the biryani.

We had to eat 2-3 packets of biryani rice with just a little bit of chicken even after paying so much.

Above all, they even refused to acknowledge the fact that they missed putting in the packets with the biryani and were adamant on the fact that they had delivered the packets and as to that we were lying and refused to deliver them again.

Author: Krithika Nakshatri
Description: Such bad service! We had to wait more than an hour for the delivery and keep calling. When the order was delivered as it was a bulk order we could not check everything at the office gate. Chicken biryani rice was given but the chicken packets were missing. When we called back they say we have packed it and there are cameras here so there cant be a mistake! And this happens all the time when there is a bulk order placed. They are not even ready to accept that they could have made a mistake while packing.

Author: Eeshani Mitra
Description: We ordered food and the chicken boneless biryanis were delivered without any chicken. We called them several times and what they said was they have already sent it from their side and either we are not checking properly or lying. Previously we had ordered and the delivery guy had ater called continuously and said we hadn't paid although it was already paid.

Author: Ragavendra Ramamurthy
Description: By far the worst delivery service ever if you order from them online. They have online ordering option with online payment as well, but don't honor any of the orders placed through their own portal. It took 3 hours, and 8 calls to get them to deliver the food. Will never ever order from them. Very bad Customer service provided by them.

Author: Vaishnavi Vijey
Description:
Never ever order online from their portal. I had such a horrible experience, was waiting for more than 2 hours to get my order.
Very bad service.

Author: Bishakh
Description: Too spicy !my hands were burning even 2 hours after the meal ! They don't have a dessert menu and hence you might want to order a extra sweet lime juice to wash the biryani down . Service was really fast and prompt . Recommended only if you can handle really spicy biryani

Author: Ram Sridhara
Description: I feel meghana biryani taste got changed. It's not the same as I used to go regularly @koramangala. Serving part is pathetic and very poor in handling crowd though

Author: Sri Lakshmi
Description:
Best place for South Indian food.

Must try
Meghana special biryani
Egg fried rice

Value for money.
They also provide door delivery option up to radius of 6 to 7 km.
Service is good

Author: Swamy Babu Nidamanuri
Description:
You get awesome biriyani here. I had tasted Chicken boneless Biryani, Prawns Biryani and Chilly chicken.
They tastes great. Ambience is quite good. This restaurant is one of busiest restaurants in Marathalli.
I would recommend this to all Biryani lovers..

Author: Arya Kumar Gupta
Description:
We ordered chicken, mutton, fish and prawns biryani and in veg section ordered a veg special and aloo dum biryani. Food quality was good and hygienic. A LITTLE extra on the spicy side for all the biryanis. But the biryani taste was authentic and awesome.
Highlight of the lunch was fish and prawns biryani.
Con : extra bit spicy.

Author: Rahul
Description:
Being vegetarian I only ordered veg briyani.
I must they actually have best biriyani in bangalore.
Please do try it out.

Even the thali have decent taste, never tasted myself telling on behalf of my friends.

Author: Sukesh Kumar
Description: Though chicken biriyani is average, dont fall in the trap of "today's special"... it is full of chicken bones... anyways...it is ok to visit the place once in 2 month types... not so great...

Author: Rashi Rajsingh
Description:
Went here on a weekday and ordered a chicken dum biryani. The quantity was worth it and food was amazing.
People had recommended it to me a lot and so had to visit it for its biryani.
Really like the place and will definitely recommend it to people.

Author: Rakesh Sarkar
Description:
If you have craze for biryani then once you should visit this place. Though it doesn't mean that they don't have other types of food in menu but this place is famous for biryani.
So me and my friends ordered for meghna special biryani and chicken lollipop biryani and the price was reasonable. Both the biryani were awesome in taste but I guess my friend felt like meghna special biryani is little too spicy. Service is tad slow may be as its always overcrowded with people. The restaurant has to organize the staff as they were getting confused with people who were coming in and they didn't know whom they have to make sit first.
Definitely I would visit this again for biryani.

Author: RDX
Description: Food quality is not to the expecte level. This is nothing but a bit hi fi Andra mess.  The service is not so great at least not worth for money  you spend there. I visited it on 11 Dec 2016.  foods i didnt like were veg biriyani, and mushroom& babycorn starters. Mainly i didn't like the service.

Author: Vikram Kumar
Description:
Parcel ordered. I don't remember how many times we had biryani from this place. Taste wise it's always good, we never had complained. We always prefer ordering it. Service is bit slow
They can work on that and food is tremendous. Loved it

Author: Karthick S K
Description: I and my friends dropped in for a lunch and we ordered Meghana special chicken biryani, egg biryani, chicken 65 and corn Manchurian. My friend doesn't eat non veg without a cucumber salad but there was no cucumber in this restaurant which is very weird, and the egg in the egg biryani was like from the freezer, it was ice cold, but the rice was hot, weird isn't it?

Author: Rupa Subramanian
Description: Just another brand..Biryanis are good no doubt but the paneer starters are not so good..Food is never piping hot and most of the time, the place is crowded..Service is ok..I feel that for the price that they charge, they can increase the portion size of the curries and starters. Avoid curries if possible as they pretty much taste the same..Ask them to adjust the chilli and spice levels otherwise u wud end up with tears in ur eyes and an upset stomach :(

Author: Mohit Kumar
Description:
We went today to have veg biryani there. Ordered two biryani 1 special veg biryani and second aloo dum biryani. Special biryani was good but in the second biryani The aloo which i got was rotten from inside.  It was my bad luck that i ate some part of it. After that I showed it to waiter and told them that I dont want to continue eating and they should remove the item form bill.

Told politely but the worst was that the manager came and told " some people come for the same" when they dont want to pay and i should go and they will pay via their pocket. I dont want to mention here for which people it was targeted at. This statement was ridiculous and he dont have right to speak the same. Please accept if the issue and nothing is perfect. We had some heated argument and since its better to leave the place with such cheap mindset people offered them to pay with tips to gift their children with :D and i paid full amount. They offered me in charity to give 10% discount which i never took to teach him a lesson.

Will never suggest anyone to go there because of bad behaviour and the managers cheap mentality. wish the manager to get well soon.

Author: Sneha Das
Description: Whenever i think of having biryani Meghna food comes in my mind first. I would say the best biryani i have in bangalore whichever biryani u try out it turns to b super and i tried their biryani in marathalli residency road & kormangala outlet their taste remains same which matters but somewhat they have to work in their servicing a bit.

Author: Kishore Patil
Description:
I had been here for my cousin brother's treat. We had ordered Paneer 65 for starters, Dal Fry, Green Peas curry, Egg Biryani and Paneer Biryani for main course.
Paneer 65 was good and Biryani's were OK.

Service: 3.5/5
Price: 3.5/5
Ambience: 3.5/5

Since many have suggested to try Meghana special biryani, I would definitely visit again.

Author: Mayuri Shukla
Description:
I love the biryani here.
They have the best biryani in town.
Be it any veg or non veg.
The cold drinks and their lime soda goes best with biryani.
The seatings are good enough and staff was also good.

Author: Asha Ramsurn
Description: Pathetic service! Ordered food from there, called them countless times and after almost one hour of waiting, they denied that we ever ordered from them. Rubbish place, crap service, waste of time!

Author: Vinod
Description:
Been a while since I had last been here, so decided to lunch on some Andhra meals on Sunday. The last time was a good experience and I was completely disappointed with the restaurant's steep drop in standards on all accounts. Being Sunday afternoon, there was a calling queue and we had to wait for 15 mins (in hindsight, the wait was absolutely NOT worth it) to get a table for 2. We were seated near the door to the kitchen - the way the waiting guys and attendants conducted themselves was horrible. Besides the noise and abusing each other, they wernt getting anything else achieved.
We asked for 2 andhra meals and a chicken starter - the starter was decent but the meals were a mess. The 'Vepudu' looked like it was boiled and not fried with all the water in it. The dal(pappu) was salty and watery. Rasam was salty as well. We'd ordered lime sodas but it was never served. The way the guys were impatiently waiting on us indicated they were just looking to clear tables off customers and get the next waiting batches in.
I never do Andhra meals without a second serving of rice and dal but this time I passed.
When the bill arrived, I pointed out that although we weren't served lime sodas, it was billed. Instead of getting the sodas which I thought they were going to do. But they merely deducted the amount from the bill and revised it - again when I pointed out the tax wasnt adjusted, the guy asked me to leave the table and settle it at the counter. Hospitality and customer happiness can go hang, all Meghana worries about is how fast they can rotate the waiting batches.
Meghana sucks !!

Author: Anirban Roy
Description:
Not good for tummy and mood..
We ordered three dishes (one of them was a Today's Special item) and we ended up eating three different ones!!
They did not remove the item from their dispaly board for the Today's item which it was not available. Moreover, after the order was placed, they came back after every 15 mins saying the other two items was also not available. They were courteous but our mood were already spoilt by then. The food delivered was also Okayish. Nothing great.

Author: Dhilish Joji
Description: We ordered food for lunch and had to wait 2 hours waiting for it. We called a million times  to the restaurant and finally the order was cancelled aftee two hours.

Author: Sashi
Description:
Many time i have visited this place for that delicious biriyani .Its like my 2nd home.
Must try Meghna special biriyani and Tandoori Chiken in starter.

Author: Ritu
Description: Known for its chicken biryani, this place won't disappoint you. Food is spicy and tasty. Something I tried for the first time was paneer biryani. It tasted unexpectedly good! This place could definitely improve on its ambience. The good food makes up for the not so good ambience though.

Author: Priyank Rastogi
Description: Worst service, I ordered the food but did not received even after 1.5 hour. I also called after 45 mins as they told that I will receive the order in 45 mins. Then also they were saying we are sending but did not received after 1.5 hour. And also they are not picking the call as well.

Author: Jaic Jacob Philip
Description: Even tho the food was above average service was abysmal. We tried the special biriyani and 555 starters. Quantity was very less and one can simply taste the uncooked spices! And they do a very bad job in delivering. I don't know why such places exist!

Author: Aditya
Description: The ambience is good n service is fine but the quality of food isn't. I found a hair in my biriyani n it was also reported n replaced. Still it is not value for money.

Author: Kartik Bhat
Description: Very bad experience..Found a chicken piece in Panneer biryani.And the staff acted like it was not an issue..Unacceptable behaviour from such a huge chain of restaurants.Won't recommend to anyone.

Author: Sachin Kk
Description:
If ur a chicken Lover biryani is the food u Shud definitely order 🍖
And other items also they were good..
Good ambience like to visit again 😄

Author: Navneet Kaur
Description: Meghna biryani is known for its authentic chicken biryani and also its own special biryani. This particular joint is a spacious two floor one in Marathhali and is always teeming with crowd. You will definitely have to wait for a table on the weekends. The restaurant is clean and service is fast. I have just had biryani here which is fine tasting and sufficient in quantity. A perfect place to binge on biryani in this area.

Author: Abhinav Garg
Description:
Best place for Biryanis.
I visit there almost every weekend, and they never disappoint. Biryanis are delicious and service is fast. Good value for money.

Author: Sumedha Govindaraya
Description: Meghana Foods which has strategically opened its outlet in outer ring road near marathahalli bridge, attracts the IT crowd in the locality. I usually see someone or the other ordering meghana biryani in office. Parking is a menace if your visiting in your own vehicle. The restaurant is spacious with two floor seating area with typical restaurant furnishing. You can see family crowd here too. Andhra style meals lets you down completely as it lacks authenticity factor here. But the boneless chicken biryani makes it a one stop destination for all my biryani cravings. The biryani is spicy, comes with separate boneless chicken pieces and masala mixed rice. The quantity is very generous for the price. Definitely a must visit.

Author: Krishna Mohan
Description:
Meghana Foods is one of the best things to have ever happened to the realm of Biriyanis.  What differentiates this place from others is the fine ambiance and also this  burns comparatively a smaller hole in the pocket. The decor is not overdone; simple yet elegant .
 And last but not the least, the presentation was mind blowing !!! Keep up the good work guys.

Author: Abhishek Vaka
Description: Crowded place but that's what u get I guess where the food is gud .. we ordered meghana special biryani and chilli egg ..Biryani was not over the top ... But a special mention for the service ..

Author: Arpit Tripathi
Description:
Vegetarian , still love dum aloo biriyani because of the preparation.
I don't even remember the number of times I visited alone just to eat biriyani.

Author: Vidhya K Pai
Description:
This is famous for Andhra cuisine. The biryanis taste so divine!
We had chicken biryani, fish biryani, meghana special.. Must say that the food is worth every penny that you pay. Great service and good ambience too.

Author: Ashish Sahu
Description:
One of the Best Biryani I ever had.Being a vegetarian, I never eat Biryani because there no reason to.But Meghna's Dum Aloo biryani tempts one to eat double the capacity of an individual.

In Love with dum Aloo Biryani!!!!!

Author: Mahesh
Description: Been here with my friends on a weekend. While I've tried this place before this was new to my North Indian friends. They wanted to have biryani n hence took them to this place. The mistake they did was to order a Chinese dish in a Andhra style hotel. They ordered chilli fish. Obviously ordering a Chinese food in a hotel that's known for Andhra cuisine won't bring smile on anyone's face. With lot of frown, went for the main course where boneless biryani n roti n chicken curry were ordered... Thankfully they loved it n so did I.. will surely visit this place for their biryani at least. Tip to new comers: don't order any Chinese or continental in an Andhra cuisine. Be a Roman in Rome...

Author: Yash Foodie
Description:
Pure Andhra & Hyderabad restaurant.
Good biryani as it boasts.
very good when compared to many restaurants that simply says hyderabadi biryani 
i like the boneless chicken gravy on top of special biryani..

Author: Rudy
Description: This place is good, but not much great..! For their price food is ok, quality level and taste is also not bad and not great.. can try............

Author: Dibakar Chakraborty
Description:
Special In Hyderabadi biryani. Spice lavel is toomuch. But quentity is huge. I have visited the place for 2 time and both the times it was too crouded.

Service 7
Ambience 6
Value for money 8
Quality 6
Quentity 9

Author: Pankaj K
Description:
I had always loved biriyani at Meghana. I have travelled almost 25km to-fro just to have their paneer biriyani. But last time I visited them Saturday, to my surprise the quality and taste has gone so bad that I can't explain in words. The food was quite cold and paneer-on-top was not freshly cooked, just reheated. Now, this is a golden rule that mushroom, paneer, capsicum etc has to be cooked fresh and served. One can't skip this process and bring reheated paneer on table. We even had mushroom chilli and that was worst I had in my entire lifetime. I decided to have visited them last time. Good bye Meghna.
P.S. : some restaurant have the attitude towards not maintaining same quality and taste after they become successful. This is one example.

Author: Nachiket Joshi
Description: Sure shot satisfaction. I have been here several times. I like boneless form of chicken Biryani and Meghna has got this combination right with Marsala , chicken and spices. Service is excellent

Author: Raghunandana Alse
Description:
Decent place for a spicy apetite.

Though the ordered food was served quickly, the food was slightly cold. Rotis got really hard and ended up being difficult to have the last few bites.

This place might be a good one for non-vegetarians but didn't feel like a good one for vegetarians. If you do like spicy food this is definitely a good place. Waiters were friendly and cooperative.

Rating 3 for the cold food and less choice for vegetarians who would love to have spicy food.

Author: Varun
Description: Worst service ......kannadigas please don't enter ..... harassment for Kannada people..... Please visit with more than 6 people ...else they treat as if they providing free food....

Author: Jyotiska Bhattacharjee
Description: Quite a nice place. Service was quick and perfect. The food was delicious and vegetarians were also quite happy with their food. there was no valet parking so service road is your only choice for parking.

Author: Garima Bhandari
Description:
Given the location and the quality of food, it attracts a lot of crowd from the nearby tech parks. Lunch hours, expect a waiting despite a great space.
Best Biryanis in town! Starters and main course are good too.
Quick service, decent staff, good quantity, value for money.

Author: Manali Sinha
Description: After getting recommended by my friends about the famous Meghna briyani,I finally stepped into this restaurant this week.And I know understood why it was a highly recommended place by my friends.I had the tastiest chicken briyani ever.The ambience is okay.It was full as I went during the lunch time but still managed to get the seats.The service provided is good.Cost is fair.Strongly recommended for briyani enthusiasts!

Author: Santosh Kumar
Description: Just one sentence "it is not worth of your hard earned buck" please avoid , worst food worst service worst ambience, I really tried to get something good but was unable to find inspite of my best efforts

Author: Anupriya
Description:
Amazing biryani
Probably the only reason u want to go there is for the biryani which is probably the best dum biryani in town
Few starters are worth trying like the Meghan special chicken 555

Author: Rahul Bhati
Description: I had ordered Chicken & Egg biriyani today at my office. There is no taste at all after having Biriyani. They had given Chicken & egg separately. They are downgraded quality of biriyani. Its feel like i am having road side biriyani. Its full waste of money. I had ordered biriyani more than 500 rs still they had charged 30 rs delivery charges.

Author: Nikhith Pawar
Description: Visited this place yesterday for lunch, according to me you this chain of restaurants offers one of the best biryanis in bangalore. We directly ordered for Meghanas special chicken biryani with out looking at the menu card. The service was quick and the biryanis were great. This restaurant has two levels and to pay by card you have to walk to the upper level, the waiters do not get the machine to your table. Otherwise it's the regular standards and taste that has been maintained in comparison to the other branches.

Author: Mohini Priyadarshini
Description: This 5 star rating is for my favourite chicken biryani - chicken boneless biryani. While I have tried some other starters like chicken 65, chili chicken, chicken lollypop etc. but "Meghna foods" the name is good enough to get me drooling. I have visited Kormangala, Indira Nagar and bellandur outlets and the taste is the same everywhere. The ambience isn't great but when the food is so good it hardly matters.

Author: Ankita Gupta
Description:
Visited this place twice in one month. There are very less number of places which provide good Biriyani that you can visit them again and again. This is one of them.
This outlet is located in the heart of marathalli, pretty much accessible from nearby tech parks.
The ambience is okay, as people visit this place mainly to have a foodgasm and cleanliness & sophistication is what required which this place has.
Have tried several dishes from here as I visited with a group of foodies. Starters are average(-0.5 for that). Have tried golden babycorn and chicken 65.
Coming to the Biriyani, dum aloo Biriyani and paneer Biriyani surely lives upto expectation and good for Vegetarians. Chicken Biriyani, fish Biriyani and meghana special Biriyani are surely worth trying. It's finger licking!
Price wise it's worth every penny spent, as the quantity and quality justifies it fully.
Whenever I am having cravings for Biriyani, this place is on the top of my mind ;)

Author: Sandeep Ankala
Description: Hands down, one of the best places to have biriyani in Bangalore. The flavour, taste and aroma of the biriyanis will tingle the taste senses in you.

Author: Deepak Vivek
Description: Ordered food at 12:30 , delivery took more than 2 hrs ..no response from the restaurant guys..they gave me the delivery guys no and asked me to call him up directly.. pathetic service..

Author: Ankit Agarwal
Description: Used to be one of my favorite biryani joints, but the taste of biryani is not consistent. Also, i feel the quality and taste has reduced. Starters are still pretty good :)

Author: Surya
Description: I went there today afternoon for lunch I ate paneer biryani, it was very tasty but it is very spicy.i also ordered golden baby corn.it was just how i thought in my mind.i would like to visit it again..

Author: Meenakshi Sharma
Description:
We have got food home delivered from this outlet twice and I m happy with the quality and quantity of it. we ordered for chicken biryani, veg biryani rice, chicken curry, paneer butter masala and chicken tandoor. All the non-veg items were tasty. They had only 1 item of paneer in their menu - paneer butter masala, but they prepared it like paneer kadhai. Anyways the taste was good so no complaints. Also they deliver with no delays. The restaurants seems fine for dining as well, wud like to visit once.
Caution!!!! they make very hot n spicy food with lots of chilly so opt for it if u eat spicy food.

Author: Garima Dublish
Description: My hubby loves and is crazy about biryani, and he has tried biryani from almost all famous biryani restaurants in Bangalore.  According to him this is the best place and he recommends this place to everyone.

Author: Manan Singla
Description:
Went there for the team lunch. We were bit skeptical about this place but once we started eating, everyone was enjoying.
Starters, Biryani were delicious. Veg Biryani was a bit spicy but that's something that can be customized.

Author: Subhasis Parida
Description: I heard a lot about this restaurant so went today with my friend.We ordered a chicken biryani and chicken65 ,when we started eating the chicken seemed not so fresh worst in taste.The Biryani was horrible too. They don't serve fresh and also their staffs are totally baffled what we've actually ordered varies significantly from the bill.

Author: Shruthi Udupi
Description: Visited Meghana biriyani on Saturday .. As usual it was crowded but even if you wait for like few mins and order food it's worth it .. Meghana special chicken biryani is the best biryani I have ever tasted in Bangalore till date. And also ordered pepper chicken . Taste and the quantity is worth the money you pay !!!

Author: Vedant
Description: Home Delivery is not proper you order something and you get something. Staff response is not proper for on call. I ordered chicken  Biriyani  and Mutton Biriyani .

Author: Abhijith C
Description:
The food is really good. I love the biriyani they serve.

But they CHEATED me on the delivery. I order 7 biriyanis together, I got 6.  Also they failed to deliver chicken for 1 biriyani. This is a real cheap habit either from the outlet or delivery guy. The loss amounts to close to Rs.400; 20% of my bill amount.  My negative rating is for the service not the food. I will never recommend meghna on delivery option.

Author: KrantiKrishna (krantiawelltravelledgourmand)
Description:
This review of mine is only about their take away - never dined in at this place though !

Me along with my helpmate - when we are in no mood fr cooking stuff - we just head to this place straight away to get a quick parcel 
reasons r simple 
We get the delivery in no time - fast and quick in fact
Then the food taste remains  constant everytime !
May be the meghana special chicken biryani or their starters for the says special - Guntur chicken - meghana special 555 chicken or Fish fry - 
Days special starter is some thing one shouldnt miss :)
Then comes the show stopper - or their USP - Meghana special chicken biryani - its finger licking good !

Coming to vegetarian food - Their paneer biryani is good - Subz sheek kabab and golden baby corn are the show stealers :) !

Food - 5/5 (taste and quality and quantity too they never compromise on )
Then coming to ambiance - NA nothin much to comment - as we just take away never dine in ..

Service - quick delivery - 10 mins is max time !
VFM - 1000 fr 4 of us - its a steal deal :)
Will come back for sure :)

Author: Suresh Kumar
Description: U will get nice Hyderabadi style biryani in bangalore.. it's expensive but if u bought one biryani u can share two members..we order boneless biryani n Guntur chicken it's so spicy and tasty.... If u want to try Hyderabadi biryani it's best Meghana foods

Author: Avinash BNV
Description:
One of those frequent dining places. Their Biryani is Okayish , can't compare with the Kormangala one. Boneless Biryani is way too better than normal Biryani.

Went again today, Biryani was bit salty but it was edible, my friend ordered Mutton Biryani and he liked it

Author: Sakhi _Ravoor
Description: Nothing much special...!!! Service sometimes good sometimes bad..!! Biryanis is ok here than meals..!!! Waiters and service is very rude and bad..!!

Author: George Rodrics
Description:
A great Biryani place. For Biryani 4.5
For other items 3.5
For ambiance 3
For service and staffs 2

Over all 3.5

They need to do some serious work to improve their service. Other a great restaurant with much greater Biryani

Author: Avinash
Description: One of the good biryani's in the area. Try the full meal if in an adventurous mood... Huuuge spread with authentic andhra food. Ample space to accomodate the weekend rush, and very easy accessibility. The variety is not very great so cant really go back on repeat basis to try new stuff, but whatever is served tastes good. Be warned most of the days food is extremely spicy!!

Author: Veer Bhadr
Description: We been causal we didn't had reservation table was available,we sited near kitchen area. Then order for Biryani there was rarely got chunk of meat peas mostly bones we got but service was nice...

Author: Abhinav
Description: Nice as always.. same smell same taste same delightful customer.. pure biryani aroma.. had chicken dum biryani and special veg biryani.. nice!!

Author: V Srijit
Description: Now.. this is a very good place to eat biryani.. many people won't like the taste as it differ place to place for biryani.. but it's good... they have limited menu... but tasty. Apart from biryani, I had chicken lemon which was nice, crispy with a very good tinge of lemon.. I also had chicken butter masala which was equally good.. They serve quick even in rush..The place is neat also.. so overall it was worthy of this rating...

Author: Nakul Rao
Description:
The joint screams Biryani and that's precisely what you got to order. Meghana is a Bangalore legend and is the go to place if you want Biryani or south Indian sides. I had some friends over and ordered the prawn Biryani, the meghana special chicken Biryani, Andhra Chicken, Mutton Pepper Fry and the chicken lollypop. Everything was done exceptionally well. Spicy and delivered piping hot. I won't say it's the kind of place I'd like to go every time but it's a great 'drink night' food joint. The spices are toned a bit high and those with sensitive taste buds may want to go easy.

Taste :7/10
Service: 5/10 (dine experience)
Ambience: 5/10 (dine experience)
Value for money: 6/10

Author: Ravinarayana Adkathimar
Description: I took my friends here because of the hype everyone had given for this place. While ordering we asked about the quantity of the biriyani which they give. He told us that only one can eat one plate. But when the food arrived, we were not able to finish that. And it was really sour at last. Hospitality was pathetic. We were really disappointed about the place. Tikka was decent.

Author: Sridhar K Adhisheshaiah
Description:
Aloo Dhum Biryani
(Review Only For This Dish)

Thank God Its Friday, Well not because its the last working of the week,But it was for some celebration after a tuff two weeks of work at Office.

This time around it was for some treat by my new collegues who joined my team.

Who else bettr thn ZOMATO for a quick search of retaurants, So Meghana Foods was short listed.

We decided for a delivary, The order was huge. Lots of Chicken's,Mutton's Etc etc. As i am a Veggi had this somthn new on the Menu(Nt seen it on other restaurants Menu), Aloo Dhum Biryani....

Well the order on phone,Delivary was all good,Bill was huge as well ;) ;)

Coming to the Taste.... Sppppiccccyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyy. Quantity was plenty. Two people can easily have tummyfull. Two big pieces of Aloo coated with Dhum Masala and Rice at the bottom. Dhum was smelling yummy. Aloo was soft, It had sucked in all the Masala during the Cook. Dhum Masala was Spicy,Tasty and heavy. Mix well with the Rice for an Awesome Taste.

They had also provided a curry/Masala, It was a bit Oily,But tasty. You can avoid this to enjoy the Taste of just Biryani

Nothing else was ordered, But they have sme limited/Interesting Veggi Dishes. Need to try when i Visit any of the Branches. Heard they serve it on a Banana Leaf which makes food even more tasty.

My NonVeggi Foodies were saying that they were havn a Yummy Chicken\Mutton Biryani

Author: Lakshmi Narayanan
Description:
Worst delivery and customer service. We ordered food from their official website today and paid online. While the food must have been delivered in 45 minutes, it's been more than two and half hours and we still haven't received the order. We have called them 5 times already and they tell us they will contact the delivery person and get back and never did. The delivery guy too didn't respond to our calls.  

Every time a new person picks up the line and I repeat the same story and there is no proper response.

The most irritating part is the restaurant is merely 10 min away from our apartment and we chose to order because of some work going on in our apartment and so we can't leave the house.

P.S : I'm still waiting for my food to arrive while typing this. :/

Author: Rashid Khan
Description:
I was in marathahalli this afternoon and wanted to have meals for lunch. I went to Kritunga but meals were not served there. So went to Meghana restaurant just few metres away from Kritunga. There was no specific parking place for two wheelers or four wheelers. The service road was used for parking.

I was received warmly when compared to Kritunga. I ordered meals and the waiter politely asked me if I needed any side dish with it but I said no because I was in the mood of having papads, chutneys and pickles.

I was served on banana leaf. The sweet was Semiya which I had before having my lunch. It was very tasty. Sambar and rasam were served in small bowls. They also served pulav in small bowl which i did not taste. Server came and politely asked for what curries I would need. I told him to serve a bit of everything. Dal with leafy vegetables, potato and bhindi curry (which was very spicy) and chutney were served. My favorite is chutney and it did not disappoint me. i asked for gun powder and was served with 3 jars containing gun powder, and two pickles. Rice was served and ghee was brought. I had rice with lots of ghee and gun powder. It tasted yummy. Dal was tasty but potato curry was spicy and I couldn't even have a bit of it. Overall the meals were on point and not many dishes were served without proper taste. I recommend Meghana not only for biryani but also for meals.

Author: Dilip Anand
Description: If you want to try some spicy authentic andhra food then this place is very good. sometimes on weekends the restaurant is heavily crowded and you'll have to wait apart from that only glitch everything else is awesome. They serve you food on the banana leaf which I felt nice.the biriyanis and their curries are worth mentioning.do try this place once and fill your taste buds with some spicy biriyani.

Author: Ankush Bhattacharya
Description: Went to this place on last weekend with couple of my friends. Biriyani was awesome. I liked the boneless topings they provided on the biriyani. But I did not like the mutton keema, lots of spice and curry leaves. I would like to taste some more items for sure.

Author: Uday Bhartia
Description:
Place to go when you want good food (Biryani and Andhra meals).
Their consistency is really remarkable. I am a frequent visitor and hardly found any problems with the food.
Their service however, can improve a lot.
The fish biryani and boneless chicken biryani are a must try!

Author: Chandan Ku
Description: I visited meghana 2 or 3 time. biryani was testy and spicy. You must try mutton or chicken biryani. Ambiance was very good. I also liked Chinese in andhra style.

Author: Sthitodhi Sarkar
Description: This review is just for their and Andhra style chilly chicken, because I've never tasted anything like that before. Be warned, this dish is strictly for hardcore spice lovers, as the gravy is nothing but green chilly. I just love it and Meghna gets full points to get this awesome dish to us.

Author: Kiran Varanasi
Description: Have been visiting Meghana foods for the biryani for some time now. The biryanis - chicken and mutton were amazing. The food though spicy is super tasty. The overall experience was great.

Author: Kumar Shanu
Description: We went for Sunday dinner, specially for Biryani. We got seat for 4 members easily, staffs well behaved. Food preparation was good. Had a great taste of veg biryani after long time. I would prefer to visit again.

Author: Bibhudatta And Reena
Description:
Checked in this place today for dinner. For most of the Bangalprians, no need to mention, the name itself is enough.

We ordered Chicken Biriyani, Paneer Biriyani & Mashroom Chilly. Biriyanis were really good. They fall in between high and low spicy. The Meghana Spl Chicken Biriyani is awasome. Mashroom Chilly was okok, nothing special.

Service, ambience, quantities were very good. I recommend this place.

Author: Vishwanath HM
Description:
Went for lunch on a Thursday afternoon.
Was easy to get table since it was not Friday afternoon because all the IT ppl around will be looking out for lunch.
Avoid on Friday afternoon.
Meal was incomparable to Nagarjuna.
Had ordered that day's special chicken dry which the waiter suggested and it was worse and priced too high.
Only good thing about Meghana is its biryani.

Author: Swati Sinha
Description: I had the best biryani in Bangalore here. Chicken boneless biryani. Yummmm. I am always ready to have dinner from here. You can always rely on the taste, it never disappoints you. Also the chicken starters are delicious. Just visit this place soon if you want to taste the best biryani in Bangalore. Even better than Paradise in my opinion.

Author: Suranjana Chowdhury
Description: Their best dishes include egg chilly and chicken fried rice but their chicken biriyani totally sucks. It's too spicy.. In no time tears start rolling from ones eyes :p and the butter chicken tasted more like brinjal chicken.. interior needs more attention as there are a lot of mosquitoes(on rainy days). Staff behavior needs improvement.

Author: Yash Gupta
Description: Known for its biryani, we ordered from here twice for delivery. Food delivery is relatively quick and the food packaging is very good, green bag fir veg and red for non-veg.The keema biryani and the Meghana 555 (chicken) is really good. Definitely try the different types of biryanis.

Author: Vinay
Description:
Meghana is the first word that strikes the mind to satisfy our Biryani cravings while it work.
Needless to say about the Meghana Spl Chicken Biryani & Paneer Biryani... they are always delicious and to die for.

The food, packaging and delivery have all been good on all occasions, except a recent one.

We had ordered for 4 Spl Chicken & 3 Paneer Biryanis 2 weeks ago for dinner on a Saturday. We were in for a surprise when the food arrived. All the packets had Paneer topping and were not as per the order.

When reported, Manager of the outlet accused Us of lying and also that their CCTV footage showed packets of Paneer n Chicken toppings leaving their kitchen. Though We offered to show photographs and return the extra Paneer packets, He held his side saying the order was dispatched correctly.

After a lot of requests and convincing, He agreed to send the appropriate Chicken topping packets.

By the time We consumed the Biryani, it was 11pm and the food was not enjoyable.

We hoped to set aside this bad experience and ordered the same Biryanis twice in the last 2 weeks (including today) and We were happy that both orders were correct and the food tasted great as usual.

Author: FoodMonster.
Description: The briyanis are really good - amazing portions! Food is a bit towards the spicy side and known for their biriyanis and andhra cuisine espl meals. Way too crowded and prefer home delivery!

Author: Auryl Glenna Machado
Description: Even after getting negative feedbacks of this place by my friends, I decided to give this place a try. I had fish for starters and meghana's spl chicken biryani. It was good. Though I don't like spicy food, I liked this one.

Author: Anil Mankar
Description: Best biryani, less spicy. Been to Meghana in marathahalli. Nice place but heavy rush always. Tasty biryani. Need to improve on starters and meals.

Author: Sandeep Reddy
Description:
Need to improve your customer care.Had been to the restaurant on Sunday night and has ordered biryani which was promptly delivered, i guess they have everything stacked up ready to serve.
  Now for my kid wanted an omelette which was right there in the menu but the waiter out rightly said it cannot be done as it has to be prepared fresh. And the time was only 8 pm which is still not a rush hour.
  So on sunday's they only serve items which are already prepared and kept like biryani's and other items.

Author: Aditya Srivastava
Description:
A great ambiance,good service , Let's talk about food now
Boneless Chicken Biryani -a must try dish if you go there.Also if you love spicy food try nati chicken curry,
