as for starters Chicken 65 is a delight and you can have some others too. I did'nt taste any veg items so i hav e no idea about it
food -4/5
service- 4.5/5
ambiance-4/5

Author: Janki Amrutiya
Description: Pathetic place. Very bad service. No respect for customers. It was just plain rice with some frozen and tasteless paneer. They served chicken biryani without chicken. And the manager did not even care to replace it. I would not at all recommend this place for biryani.

Author: Shreyank Gowda
Description: One of the best places to have biriyani without a doubt! The must haves are the boneless chicken biryani and obviously their meghana special biryani. Barring that most starters are average. Didn't really like the golden fried baby corn. The chilly chicken is decent. But just for the biryani this place is a must visit!

Author: Aneesh G
Description: I recently visited and took prawns biryani(take away) on 4th August 2016 evening. I ate many times the same prawns biryani and it used to be good. Last time i took biryani and i couldn't complete the biryani. After eating a little only my upper throat started burning due to heavy masala(i am not talking about spice). The masala was too much, i threw it in the middle. I donno why they have added so much masala. And they charged me 306 rupees for this. Next day morning i was able to feel that throat burning whole day. And finally i got cold and fever. It's like i paid 300 to get my health upset.🙏🏻

Author: Swati Mishra
Description:
A pretty decent restaurant with humble interiors. As for food we ordered
1. Chilly Prawns (4/5)
2. Mixed Fried Rice (4/5)
3. Chicken Boneless Curry (3/5)
4. Egg Masala (4/5)

Author: Shayan
Description: Had lot of expeactations from  dis chain of biryanis.To my uttr disppointmnt...d biryani they serve wsnt up2 d mark.Being from kolkata....i alwys had an inclination towards mild dum biryani.In meghna wat dey serve is (spicy)^2 biryani.In other words its 2 spice with all dos flavours of pickel comng out of it.In all a pretty bad experience 4r me.

Author: Justfood (Keerti Pratap Singh)
Description: Meghana foods ante Andhra Cusine ante my love. Yes I love Andhra food and when it comes  to eating Andhra food in Bangalore, Meghana Foods is one of the joints where I love to go. Though I had visited their Kormangala outlet also but their Marathahalli outlet is much better in terms of seating and ambiance.As far as food is considered, I always order meals and biryani. And it is rocking here.Will surely recommend this place.

Author: Debalina Dhar
Description:
Good taste, but the quantity is too low for the chicken ! Also the size of the chicken pieces are too small! Otherwise everything is awsome! Suranjana Chowdhury Rimlee Tat Tanima Halder Swati Mishra

My subsequent visit has not been very good. The biriyani is always too spicy.

Author: Pradeep
Description: Meghana foods is famous for Biryani. U have an option to be served on banana leaf as well.  We tried Chicken biryani boneless , Paneer butter masala and roti. All item were super in taste, quality and quantity. Only problem is to get parking space on weekend. Worth to visit again.

Author: Gulshan Budhwani
Description: Boneless Chichen Biriyani is one dish you should definitely binge on at this place. All chicken starters are good. Ambience and seating arrangement is good.

Author: Debleena Bose
Description: Biryani served in banana leaf is just too amazing. Spacious compared to other outlets. But ofcourse u still won't get a space to stand anytime you go. Food taste is always yummy!

Author: Aditya Shankar
Description: Meghana's special Biryani is something which can always uplift your mood. On weekends its mostly crowded(waiting time close to 30 mins), but during weekdays one gets place easily. Drinks prices can be reduced. Over all a good place to devour all your Andhra hunger pangs.

Author: Abhilash Anand
Description: Paneer biryani, mutton biryani and Meghana special biryani is what we ordered. And satisfaction is what we got. This place is usually full and aromatic. The food was good and got even better when it arrived on time. The Meghana special biryani was a bit disappointing though. Overall an okay place. Give it a try.

Author: Vinodh Kumar
Description:
This is another out let that I visited and they suprise me with the same taste every where.
The spices, quantity, quality...etc everything is perfect and it stays till 3 am that amazing
I love it.

Author: Sai Satish Varma
Description: This is always our regular Adda for us to hang out with Friends. And the Food is decent and also within Budget unlike so many other restaurants in Bangalore. Always loved the Biryani here. And the Starters.

Author: Sauvik Kar
Description:
Delicious - One word to describe this restaurant. The moment I entered the place, I was awe-struck to see so many people in waiting just to get a taste of the dishes, that too on a normal Sunday afternoon. The huge crowds at the entrance made me realize that something must be very right with way the managers are running this restaurant. It is a perfect example of a restaurant that has nothing to boast of except its food quality and most importantly the taste that it offers. We ordered Boneless Chicken Biryani (quantity is good enough) and it was no doubt ‘really yummy’.

Some negative points for the ambience, however, the overall food experience being top notch, I would go with 4.0/5.0 for Meghana Foods(Marathalli). Definitely, a must go restaurant if you want to have one of the best Biryani’s in Bangalore.

Author: Nitesh
Description:
I went for lunch with my friends. I parked my bike in front of Meghna Foods. We had lunch and came out after 30 minutes. I searched for my bike but was not able to find it. I asked security guard, he told that it got towed. There wasn't any "No Parking" sign board and also guard did not inform me about this during parking. I went inside restaurant and asked manager for the help. He told me that I can go to towing van and ask them to release my bike by showing the bill. They will not take any money and in case of any problem I can call manager. I searched for the towing van and did the same but towing policeman was not willing to release bike without money. I called meghna foods and asked them to talk to policeman. After five minutes of conversation policeman put the phone and again asked for money. Now I called again and asked to give phone to manager but service people did not let me talk to manager for 10 minutes saying that he is very busy. After that they told me to come back without bike or wait for some more time. The overall response of the management was very poor. I felt helpless and had no option other than paying money to policemen to get my bike back. 
Worst experience ever with management of any restaurant.

Author: Ravi
Description: Being a chain taste is good... But will advise to order as they are available in app. and eat rather then planing to go and have...  Space is issue and dnt look hygienic ... Service is ok ok not too fast... And if u need parking then it will b issue...

Author: Avik Niyogi
Description: I had placed Nati chicken biriyani for order for the 6th time by Swiggy and everytime it is not available. They should not confirm the order if the item is not available or they should remove this item from the menu for delivery if it is not available always.

Author: Umesh Krishnamurthy
Description: Amazing biryani.. Pieces were juicy.. Fish was was also good.. Worth the price... Will be back to try other dishes.. Just extending the review to cross 140 characters..

Author: Aswin S
Description: Nice place for all kinds of foods...especially biryani....nearby to many hotspots...so it attracts many IT people and tourists and families.

Author: Nandhini Priya
Description: Ordered Briyani for office party, one briyani pack was missing and when enquired about it no body was responding properly. Bad delivery :(

Author: Kiran Kumar
Description: Please don't  order for home delivery. I should have listened to the other reviews that mentioned the same. We had ordered for 5 Biryani and it was delivered after 2hrs. But the worst part was all the Biryani was very salty. We had to throw it as it was not fit for consumption. We then called the branch who asked us to call the manager. Manager informed that we will be getting free complimentary Biryani's.  But the next time we called him,  he didn't pick our call. Sad that a branch which take charge much for each Biryani give such pathetic quality and service. I am afraid to order from this outlet again!

Author: Aurodeepta
Description: Have been to Maghana couple of times. Had chicken biriyani once and the other time Maghna special biryani. Chicken biriyani was okay however I liked the taste of Maghna special biriyani somehow. Avoid going on Friday lunch time, very much crowdie you may have to wait for more then half n hour.

Author: Triyambak Tripathy
Description: It's a overhyped place for Hyderabadi biryanis but it's not upto the mark. The biriyani and the courtesy was pathetic . Doesn't stand for a completion against Biriyani zone.

Author: Siddhant Malik
Description:
We went there for a team lunch. We ordered for meals, meghna special biryani and normal chicken biryani.
Taste was pretty average with nothing much to complain or praise about.
Seating space is cramped and needs some improvement.
Prices for drinks are bit on the upside though.

Author: Shreya Misra
Description: We had ordered 3 chicken biryani , first of all there was not a trace of chicken in any of the dishes. Not a single piece of chicken.Very pathetic service. Secondly, the delivery guy doesn't deliver it at your doorstep and instead asks to pick it up from a nearby landmark.Please do not order from this marathalli branch of Meghna foods. Horrible is an understatement.

Author: Prathyusha
Description: Visited this place with teamies on their recommendation.  Its a proper andhra cuisine and always packed.  The aloo dum biryani was very delicious,  the spicy level matched my taste. My friends couldn't handle the spicy level,  so always good to order a lassi or buttermilk to calm ur taste buds after they go on fire.

Author: Nitish Sahoo
Description: Delicious food that you ever imagine about. Quality of food is maintained throughout their franchises. Ambiance is not quite very good to make a point. But you will enjoy an average Ambiance.

Author: Anupama Singh
Description: I often order food from Meghana. Its boneless chicken biryani is just yumm. According to me its the best biryani in bangalore. Have also tried the Paneer Biryani and Mutton Biryani which are both decent.

Author: Amruta Dash
Description: Good biryani variety. A la carte is also good. But we generally go to have their biryani as it is better than other things. Ambience is also good. Friendly staff as well. All in all, a good experience.

Author: Harish
Description: Worst Meghana special Biryani.i din't eat that such like Biryani ...................................worst....................................

Author: Gourav Mahendra (GouravFoodie)
Description:
If u r looking for authentic hyderabadi biryani then Meghana is must recommend .
Food is spicy but yummy at same time.
For veggies panner biryani is most recommended.....

Author: Satya Das
Description: I liked meghna social biriyani among all the biriyani special hotel around marathahalli . Service was quick ..less wait time in peak days ..Meals also good to try in case u don't like biriyani . Curries are spicy and oily . My rating only for service and biriyani ..

Author: Pabitra Ghosh
Description: Ordered chicken biryanis from them and they were average in terms of taste. Nothing noteworthy to be mentioned here. Not much of a fan of their side dishes also.

Author: Purnendu Patra
Description: Not worth spending money. 250 RS for mutton biryani and the quantity is not enough for even a small kid. Biryani zone is lot better. Not recommended for home delivery. Would not dare trying at the shop.

Author: Prateek
Description:
I am a vegetarian,hence could afford only veg varieties of Biryanis here.
I had the Biryani once at the restaurant(Paneer Biryani) & other time(Dum Alu Biryani) via delivery.

If you are going single to the restaurant on rush hours than you won't find a good place to sit.The place they provide would hurt your dignity as a customer.They have two floors ,so for single person on first floor you would get the place right in front of stairs ,so that everyone coming up can stare at you.
On second floor,they would give place near there kitchen,so that all the staff & commotion you get free with Biryani.
I would suggest them to think on this matter.You shouldn't scale up if you don't have if you can't take care of your customers.
Service was reasonable taking in account the heavy rush,it seemed you have to struggle to get attention of the staff either for food or bill.
Biryani was delicious & aroma of spices in the Biryani assured you of authenticity.
For my taste the hotness level was bit higher but it is expected as it is a Andhra Style restaurant.
Potatoes in Dum Alu biryani were too salty.
I would suggest to tone down the salt quantity.
The minimum order is Rs 600.It would be unfair to someone who is ordering for a single person.They should make some arrangements for delivering food at lower value.

Author: Rodricks George
Description: Good food but below average ambiance. Waiters don't know how to be polite with customers. Few of the items  are good but at the same time few are below average. Over all a good restaurant.

Author: Srinived S
Description: A very bad experience with Meghana foods for the second time. They failed to deliver what I ordered for. They billed me for the items but did not deliver. When I called them they were extremely rude stating they had delivered what I ordered. Definitely Meghana foods needs better customer service.

Author: Raunaq
Description: I come here for only one thing. Boneless chicken biryani! It is the best biryani in bangalore according to me. Taste is almost always consistent. Have tried their a few chicken starters. They were decent enough. I come here atleast 3 times a month and i never go out unhappy.

Author: Pradeesh Kumar
Description: The biriyani is worth the money.. The ambience is average coz the place is mostly crowded and the service time is average.. But if you are looking for some tasty food regardless of other factors.. Then this is a good bet.

Author: Lavin Sambhi
Description: One of the finest Chicken Biryani in bangalore very reasonably priced and awesome taste 👍 thumps up form my side must try , they also have an outlet in MG road superb 😊. Must try in bangalore 😉

Author: Sanjay Kumar Verma
Description: If you are a Biryani fan, then you should definitely try out this place. I had dinner with my friends here. We ordered Meghana Special Biryani and Mutton Biryani. The Mutton Biryani was amazing. The other one was also pretty good. Overall a great Biryani spot.

Author: RAJA NARAYANA B.V
Description: Too spicy with misc spices.Place is not as good as expected.staff is too hurry and not trained. If they can cope it up they can reach the heights. Recommend to go with take aways

Author: Varsha Anandani
Description: Best biryani in Bangalore, no doubt, yummy spicy and that flavor. Also the yummy and spicy starters. I have been here multiple times but never get bored of Meghna's special chicken biryani. Must go place.

Author: Arpith Jagannath
Description: Being on the ORR makes it a hotspot for techies to have some nice food. Can get a bit crowdy during lunch hours. So the early bird catches the seats easily. ;) Good food and a great place to have a nice hearty meal with friends.

Author: David Thomas
Description:
A good place for Andhra cuisine. Queue is mental. Worse than the check-in line for Air Asia's flight to Bangkok. Nonetheless the food was good. Went in a group of three. The Meghana special biriyani was a bit of an overkill, I felt. It was spicy masala, spicy masala and more spicy masala. Boneless chicken biriyani was excellent and the pepper chicken was very good. Kudos to the waiters for managing the crowd. The team should be named courteous event managers.
(Disclaimer: Taste is subjective)
Vipul Verma Rajan Punatar

Author: Kiran Sayyaparaju
Description:
This place has been preparing some of the best kind of Biryanis and they are so consistent with their quality.  The non-vegetarians have a great range to choose from and the concept of boneless biryani is what is doing wonders.

The ambience is very simple. Once the biryani is there is front of you, which will be in real quick time, you will definitely forget the ambience. The staff is there to take your order quickly and pack you off soon, too. You will find people waiting right next to your table if it seems like you are about to finish, particularly during peak hours.

The Meghana's special and the Boneless chicken Biryani both are really good! Great flavours and every bite feels yummy!  Love most of the chicken starters .not really sure how the other stuff tastes here, so I have restricted myself from giving this place a higher rating.Price wise the place is pretty much on par with other places .

Ambience -2.5/5
Service-4/5
Food -4.5/5

Author: Caroline Sylvia
Description:
First off, the food here is AMAZING.
Their biryani is one of a kind, with the right amount of spice and taste.
The Meghana special chicken biryani is a must try.
The ambience is not great, but the service was good. I'd definitely go there again for their biryani.

Author: Arunanshu
Description: Ambiance: 3/5, Food: 4.5/5, Service: 4/5 Went to Meghana Biryani recently with about 20 people. Place is decent, nothing extraordinary but food was awesome! I tasted at least three types of Biryani there, prawn, Natti Chicken and Chicken Tikka Biryani everything was too good. Caution- those who cannot handle super spicy food you dare not try Natti Chicken. The only thing I didnt like was the smoke from the kitchen was filling the room and there was no proper ventilation.

Author: Bhagya Hegde
Description: The food is not as good as the other meghana outlets. Ambience is alright. Service is not up to the mark. Disappointing if you want the meghana experience.

Author: Muthuraj
Description: This outlet will be always crowded and it's hard to get a place immediately. Briyani and meals are their specialities. Service was little bad compared to other outlets. Tried meals here, it was ok. But chicken starters are really nice here.

Author: Tanushree Saha
Description: Have been a fan of Meghana Spl Chicken Biryani for years now. My other favourite dish here is Chicken Pepper Dry. I've also tried their veg dishes. Quantity is also good. They are also quite good. Service is quite prompt and place is very crowded during weekends.

Author: Bahubali Shete
Description:
Quality of food was awful. Couldn't eat it at all. We had cook again after getting this food.

The food felt like nonveg all the way - tomato curry and mushroom masala didn't have even 10% of original taste.

Author: Vicky
Description:
One of my horrible experiences at Meghana restaurant, Marathalli. I am scared to visit next time. We (10people) went there for lunch on Friday, as expected it was crowded and customers waiting-queue was long. So, we patiently waited to get a table. So here are whys? that I shouldn't be going here again. 1. No prioritization of table allocation. First we started requesting then slowly moved to begging situation to get table for 10 people. 2. Meanwhile, there was a Power cut for 15-20mins w/o backup. 3. finally after 45mins, we were allocated a table and we place food orders, successfully! 4. Food arrived only after 45mins, during which one of our members had to shout literally on the head waiter for the delay. 5. After that, the head waiter entered into argument with another waiter and thereby pulled another young waiter and started blaming this helpless young waiter. like, no one wish to take the responsibility if something went wrong in the service. entire blame has to go on the new, young waiter, disgusting! 6. No value for customers is what we felt that day. It appears Meghana foods has got enough brand value in the city and now they don't really care about customers. The attitude is like f**k off man, we have hundreds lined outside for our biryani. 7. We entered restaurant at around 1pm and left the place at 2:45pm.
This was a real test for patience. I am not happy with the service received recently in marathalli branch and ofcourse I am not even thinking again about this restaurant.

Author: Rajiv Sisodia
Description:
The food is good but the home delivery is very very bad. Firstly the time they say itself is 45min, and they delay it further by 30 more minutes!!!
If I had not loved the chicken biryani, I would have never ordered again from this place. :)

Author: Sohini
Description: Great place for biriyani lovers....awesome biriyani...the place is worth... good location. Is easy to reach the prawn biriyani is a must try..

Author: Magician Krish
Description: Biryani here is very tasty and enjoyable especially their special biryani. Ambience is not bad. And for two people it will be just 600 to 700 if u wanna try some good biryani in city I suggest this place.

Author: Mani Deepa
Description:
I have been to Meghana numerous times. Their biryanis are good in portion size as well as taste. Cost wise also they are pretty ok.
I have had their chicken (both with bone and boneless), fish, prawn biryanis.

The amount of chicken in starters is also quite good. We had their guntur chicken and golden chicken. Both were spicy and yummy.

Author: Just Another Taste
Description: Hot and yum. It was a plan for quick lunch during office hours. Ordered Chicken boneless biriyani, Chicken Lollipop biriyani and chicken pokoda. Just beautifully filled my tummy and was slightly high on hotnspicy, but that's what makes em "Yeah, baby!" I would not have ordered lollipop biriyani because although I personally liked lollipop chicken and biriyani separately, the dry 3 pieces of chicken wouldn't go great with biriyani if u want a nice biriyani experience.

Author: Harshad
Description:
Rude staff, pathetic service !!
They made us wait for half an hour to get one roti.
We specifically asked for less spicy biryani. But they just didn't care.

Author: Vishal Goswami
Description:
Food: 5/5 awesome biryanis served. Specially meghana special and prawns biryani. Nothing else i tried here so cannot comment on those.
The staffs wrking are arrogant here.

Author: Latish Nambiar
Description:
This restaurant has mixed reviews it's very understandable, let me give my experience in dealing with Meghana.

Have ordered at least 20 or more times through delivery.

Have had food at the restaurant a couple of times.

Food :

We have had two bad experience one with badly cooked chicken and the other time the rice was not the regular one (We order so much that we are good to recognize that), this incident was particularly bad as when I called the restaurant they just refuse the budge and agree the rice was substandard and the guy on phone was plain rude.

We stopped a while of ordering from there but somehow the Chicken Boneless Biryani is something out there. Really tasty with huge quantities and the other favorite is chicken 65 more for its taste and size.

Rest of the food is pretty ordinary, they are becoming like fast food joint less worried about taste than getting more customers each day (Which is pretty easy in Marathaali). This won't work for too long so get back to basics guys.

Delivery:

Ordering food has become costlier unless we have a party at home cause for just two people ordering a minimum of 500 (on their site) doesn't make sense and the other delivery site charge 50 as additional cost.

Order from here when you want a change.

Author: Palash Chauhan
Description: If you feel like having non-veg food at a very reasonable price, this is one of the places to go. Probably not the best ambience, but the food is pretty good. Gets very crowded on weekends and the staff isn't able to cope with it. But anyway if you do not care about that and just want good chicken biryani, visit this place.

Author: Sweta K. Masand
Description:
Heard a lot about this place. Considering food, I tried Biryani which is good- Taste as well as quantity.
Staff is cordial, but they could work a lot on service. The place, which gets really crowded at weekends, becomes a mess with the people waiting for food and service guys running around to collect used dishes and cleaning tables.
Overall-- decent.

Author: Varshini Bandaru
Description: Had Thali at this place. The food was great and affordable. Pappu, Ulavacharu, and Sambar are really great. The food is very homely to Telugu people. Nice experience.

Author: Vishwesh K
Description: A great place for Biriyani, even for veggies! Paneer Biriyani I tried was awesome - it was spicy and had quantity. Service was decent, Food was great, Ambience was only lacking. A great place to fill your stomach, with friends or family.

Author: Manish Babu Koppula
Description: Was here on Friday for lunch with officemates as we heard about its quality of #biryani.We ordered their special chicken biryani and leaf chicken which was that day's special ;recommended by waiter.It's the first time I've tasted the authentic #Hyderabadi nawabi taste on my taste buds in Banglore.Their quality of spice and taste is of top notch. The ambience is fair good but the service need to be improved and the table and culinary wear must be perfectly clean to remove the foul aroma.But its a worth thing to taste in #Banglore.

Author: Debasmita Ghosh
Description:
been there 3-4 times. spicy andhra style biriyani is what u get there. quantity is usually on the greater side. taste is pretty good. people who cannot have food on the spicier side should avoid this place. else its pretty above average. service is quick most of the days. starters are good. ambience crowded mostly.
price is average.

Author: Helen Grace
Description:
the Guy who took the order, VERY RUDE,

He doesn't even listen to what we are saying, we wanted to cancel one food item, so called immediately after 5 mins, he says he cant cancel so rudely he spoke, very bad,

he says, cancel the entire order if you want,how rude , even when my friends told, we will give a bad feedback, the person says, ''do whatever you want''reallyshcoking

Author: Anonymous
Description: Disappointing service. I am a regular customer of Meghna Foods. I had ordered a mutton biriyani today. Generally they provide good big pieces of mutton, unfortunately today there were very small pieces and full of bones, with hardly any flesh on it. The biriyani was more of a flavoured one rather a 'mutton' one. I understand someday the order may go bad or not upto the expectations, but I just wanted to bring this up on forum.

Author: Pooja Mahanty
Description:
A 3.5 because it is over priced and the quantity is very less. Also it is very difficult to manage a reservation. Now moving to the good aspects: I love Biryani and this place does not disappoint me. I also love the chicken 65 these guys make. Since i do not eat prawns i have never ordered them, however my friends love it here. I usually have my sunday lazy lunch here and i love every bit of the food. The food is served on banana leaves which gives it a very aesthetic feeling.
The worst thing is that you will be made to eat fast as there is huge rush and you might not have  a very comfortable experience if you are a slow eater.

Author: Sathvick
Description:
Everything else is the same as my previous Meghana Foods biryani but the following service review is speciefically for this branch.

The attitude and service of the servers and workers at this specific branch makes it horrible! Extremely rude staff, we reached at 6:40 but they were not willing to even serve the food 5 minutes earlier than their opening time of 7 pm. We atleast asked them to take the order and serve us at exact 7 as we had a movie at 7 at Innvative but they were unwilling for that as well and extremely rude. They were not even listening to our request and finally told us "we don't need you, you can leave from here and go" when we started raising our voice. Finally the manager came and apologised and asked us to sit down but the attitude of the workers made the experience very sour. Horrendous attitude and rude behaviour. Will never come to this branch again.

Author: Sonam Bansal Goyal
Description: If you know what is the real hyderabadi dum biryani, then don't think about going there. They serve you regular rice in the name of biryani. It really sucks...

Author: Hariprasad R
Description:
Horrible delivery service !! clown of a customer care !! and Rude management 
Ordered online 2 mutton kheema biriyani and 1 Meghana's special chicken biriyani, 3 aloo biriyani, 1 egg biriyani, 1 paneer gobi, one more starter and Chicken lollipop and 4 soft drinks among other items.

Placed the online order at 12:17 PM received the items at 1:40 PM !!
On the delivery bag all the orders were written promptly as in the bill, delivery boy also confirmed that he had checked all the items.
But to our surprise we had been sent only two prawn biriyani(we ordered mutton kheema biriyani) and no 1 Meghana's special chicken biriyani, 4 aloo biriyani(we ordered 3 aloo and 1 egg biriyani) and No Chicken lollipop and only 3 soft drinks(we ordered 4). 

Called 10 times to customer care and nothing happened. Called delivery guy who told his job was just to deliver and gave managers(muruli) contact number.
Called  that guy who promised that he ll check and call back. After 30 mins no one called back. I called the manager again and gave a piece of my mind for 30 mins.... now suddenly he was very sorry and regretful and promised that he ll send another guy with the correct order. Time is 2:45 Now.
Waited till 4 PM and called again !! now the fun begins !!!
On the same number someone else received the call and told that he dont have any info on what had happened. Again 20 mins time to explain the issue.

His argument broke all the logic known to man kind and was something like this :

1. No delivery boy now at restaurant, since 4:30 is closing time . At  6:30 the restaurant will re-open and the delivery boy will come and he ll check about the issue and call me back at 7 PM.
2. Its my fault for not checking the order on the road when i received the order
3. Its my fault for calling him 4 hours after the order and he doesn't know what had happened before. He's THE manager and the number is the company number mind you.
4. He can give me the Muruli guy's number and i can talk to him 
5. I am the only customer complaining like this 
6. Wait till 7 PM patiently and he will call me back and tell me if anything is wrong with their order.

Its 5:47 PM now, date is 6 May,2016, a friday evening. Its pouring outside while i wait in my empty office waiting for my Meghana's Special Chicken Biriyani  :'(

Author: Anish Padhi
Description: Biriyani is awesome here. Food is a bit spicy, but tastes great and pricing too is decent. One must taste the chicken boneless biriyani here. Beverages are also great.

Author: Gurleen Kaur
Description:
After hearing a lot about Meghana's biriyani, I was really excited to go here BUT had the most dissapointing experience!

We ordered chicken biriyani and chicken kebab. The food was served quickly but the waiter was serving the biriyani so hastily that some of it even fell on our clothes!

The food was good no doubt but what happened afterwards ruined our mood. We were still eating biriyani and the waiter brings the finger bowls! Two mins later...he brings the bill and keeps it on the table. To make all this worse (and we are still eating btw), they bring this entire trolley with dirty utensils to take our utensils too!! Such discourteous behaviour!

Author: Anish Kintali
Description: Best place to have boneless chicken biriyani...  If you are looking to have a boneless chicken biriyani then this is the place in Bangalore...

Author: Ashish Ranjan
Description:
Meghana's is another popular South Indian restaurant in Marathalli famous for its Briyani.
Variety of non veg starters but less variety for veggies. Ambience is good. Budget restaurant if you are giving treat. Cost for two people in that case will Rs 1000. People generally goes for Briyani mostly. They serve food on banana leaf to give flavour of south India. All Cuisines are good. Service is quick.

Author: Amey
Description:
I had heard a lot about Meghana's biryani and the restaurant does not disappoint the high expectations.
The ambience and decor is quite average. The cushions are torn and the ac is not good. We ordered paneer biryani, boneless chicken biryani and meghana spl. biryani. The paneer and chicken boneless biryani were spicy and really resembled the hyd. biryani. The spl. biryani was more of a thick chiken curry biryani. It was also good. The chicken was tender i guess that was the defining thing about the biryanis. Mirchi ka salan was also spicy and tasty. I would definitely recommend this biryani...

Dishes to try -
1.meghana special 555 chicken
2.meghana special biryani
3.boneless chicken biryani


Food - 9/10
Ambience - 7/10
Service - 7/10

Author: Aishwarya Garg
Description: This is a decent place to have biryani. I am a vegetarian so got very limited choices. The paneer biryani is good. the service needs improvement..

Author: Raja
Description:
I have been a regular at Meghana Foods for the past 4 years now. Love their chicken boneless biriyani and meghana special biriyani. Had the fish biriyani once and the fish wasn't fresh I guess, but the other biriyanis compensated for that. 
The andhra style chicken style which is basically chicken in a green chili paste is absolutely brilliant. But beware, its so spicy that your mouth will be on fire. 
If you are visiting the restaurant during weekends, try to be at the restaurant around the time it opens as the place gets crowded a lot and you may have to wait for quite a while before you get a table.

Author: Abhigyan Gaurav
Description:
Top 5 worst restaurant in Bangalore.. Wastage of money as well as time.I went there with my friends for dinner but it was disaster.Food was tasteless and to much spicy . They served  starters with Biryani..Too much noise ,congested. Behaviour of staffs was not good..
I would suggest please don't throw your money... Please visit any other restaurant except Meghana

Author: Abhilash Mithren
Description:
'Strands of hair in the biriyani'

What an unpardonable felony.. Here we are, working on a weekend- trying to order something satisfactory to eat for lunch. I am attaching a copy of the bill. I had placed an order for Meghana Special Biriyani and Chicken Biriyani- what I found in the Special Biriyani packet is unforgivable- strands of hair.

This is a clear cut indication that basic cleanliness is not maintained in the kitchen area/take away section.

I demand an apology for this.. I need some sort of a rebate, if not, you guys have to make this upto me somehow. I paid 513rs for this order. I have left the Biriyani untouched... Contact me a.s.a.p

Author: Sangram Das
Description:
Andhra food is becoming a trend in bangalore.
every second day you can see a andhra restaurant opening.
meghana is the oldest.
We often order food from this joint . But I have only liked their biryanis.
no othetr dish had made an impact .
And my rating goes for only Biryani.

Author: Upasana Agarwal
Description:
I am a big big Meghana fan and I have created some more by introducing friends and colleagues to their amazing biryanis. After all, I first acquainted to this place by an Andhraiet friend.

During peak hours it's almost difficult to get a place to sit - hungry students, office goers and shoppers come here to satisfy their taste buds. Luckily , this outlet is close to my place of work and their delivery services bring the awesomeness straight to the pantry table.

The biryanis are definitely great and keep one wanting for more even if the stomach is full. My personal favourites are the Boneless chicken biryani and the vegetarian biryani. I have tried the starters here but there's nothing exceptional about them thus have decided not to waste my energies on them.

The repeat value of the biryani is also good. One starts missing it, if it's been a while since the last indulgence.

Author: Krishanu Banerjee
Description: Great service, and greater biriyani. I don't think biriyani can get any better than this. Just awesome. Tried both chicken and mutton biriyani. Cost is a little high but it is well worth it. You wont get such taste after paying more also. Will keep going there.

Author: Sri Ram
Description: Been here once and had my all time favorite is chicken normal boneless. Their biryani has one of a kind taste. Reasonably priced, but their service was worst on that day. They made us wait for more than 30mins and then hurried us to finish the food and leave the place as soon as we could.

Author: Radhika
Description: Before visiting Meghana, I was not a big fan of biryani but after trying dum aloo biryani and paneer biryani here I started loving it. Being vegetarians in the starters we have tried chilli gobhi, chilli paneer and paneer 65 they were good. Service is good and they are effectively managing the customers. Must try for biryani lovers.

Author: Sudhanva Bhandolkar
Description:
Biriyani is one recipe which has the capability to break my diet... Mouthwatering always to me....

Meghana is a very strong contenders in it along with paradise, niyaz and Donne Biriyani (near banashankari). Meghana chicken Biriyani with butter milk will be nice combination.... I have tried dry chicken items but they were OK.

Author: Ramitha Devaiah
Description: The mutton pepper fry from here was good and we all loved the mutton keema biryani. Everything was really delicious. Its a small place with pleasant mabiance. Nice and fast service.

Author: Ritu Sehgal
Description: The mouth watering Biryani's are anytime favourite. The ambience is fine but the food, specially Biryani is exceptionally tasty. This is recommended.

Author: Swathi Kesarla
Description: Have gone to this so many times as it is near by. This is an Andhra restuarant and serve all kinds of tasty Andhra style dishes .The only thing I order here  is meals. I donno much about non veg but many of friends say that its good too. Veg meals contains dal sambar many varieties of fries rasam panchadi papad. On some days ulavacharu is served along with meals, I die for it ,it tastes lik heaven, so nicely prepared. Once I tasted veg biryani it was okay . It is low cost nd nice restaurant for daily lunch or dinner , Especially if you are carving for Andhra dishes. So go nd enjoy.

Author: Santosh Reddy Nigudagi
Description: Probably the best biryani place in Bangalore. We have driven all the way from ITPL many times to get the biryani and haven't been disappointed. Please start home delivery services in a wider area

Author: Priyanka Bariki
Description: Its really disgusting that these people don't deliver food to a place which is Just 1 km away....!!! one evening when i called  for the home delivery...One of the staff memeber  says " We cant deliver the food " and he cuts my call....These people don't even know how to treat their customers...!!!! When they don't want to serve customers then why the hell do they have the restaurant....!! staff was very very rude....They actually deserve 0.5 ratings...jst BMJ

Author: Hemalatha S G
Description:
All the ratings I give here solely go to the mouth watering Biriyanis they serve. Friday afternoons are crowded with the office goers from the surrounding tech parks. But that is no reason why the service should turn people's dining experience into a nightmare.
An arrogant waiter and a very pestering cleaning boy who just wanted us to eat as soon as possible and leave the place made it a bit of a harrowing time for us.
The boneless chicken biriyani was out of the world. And that's one of its kind of in Bangalore. The chilly chicken was also done well. Special mention to the Gobi Chilly. It was the best dish of all the things that we had ordered.
The ambience is good with clean and hygiene given a high priority.

Author: Pranav Prakash
Description: Located on outer ring road, this place is famous for it's Andhra style biryani. I was not sure why there was all buzz surrounding the biryani and hence decided to give a visit. We ordered for Meghna Special Chicken Biryani and oh boy! it didn't disappoint us. This was the best biryani I had till date and I instantly fell in love with this chain. The ambiance was okayish and staff was courteous. Must visit if you are a biryani fan, you won't be disappointed.

Author: Praneeth Srinivas
Description: A perfect andhra cuisine thats famous for its biryani portion and little less cowt on pocket. Very Crowded .... I have been to this place after a friend suggested me. I was craving for Hyderabadi biryani and I managed to reach this place after a great research and suggestions from peers and friends. It definitely didn't disappoint me. However, the biryani which they call Hyderabadi is definitely not Hyderabadi. It tasted better than many joints in Bangalore and the authentic serving in banana leaf is sure a great routine. I also ordered egg masala along side with rotis which are not so good. Egg masala tasted sweet and roti is hard (btw it's hot). We asked for the change of roti and surprisingly they did changed them. We also ordered fish fry which comes with 2 neer fish and tasted OK. We dint tried desserts since we were full. If you are lighter on pocket then you should try this place once.

Author: Abhishek Bajpai
Description: Went their for lunch on a wednesday afternoon.This place is always crowded,difficult to get place on fridays.We ordered for veg biryani,egg biryani and paneer biryani.Paneer peices were litle hard.The remaining two biryani's were good.Lassi is ok.

Author: Sharmistha Saha
Description: Indeed biriyani was very good over here! I was coming back from shopping and i was dam hungry nothing is better then Biriyani if you are hungry! Me and my guy went to this outlet.. It was dam crowded but I loved there ambiance and their service!! Authentic andra style briryani...loved it

Author: Vignesh Venugopal
Description:
Ambience : 3.5/5
Food : 4/5
Service : 3.5/5
Value for Money : 4/5
Things to try : Boneless chicken briyani, sheer fish fry
Disappointments : Unmannered servers
Best suits : Hefty non-veg lunch / dinner

Author: RAVI ROSHAN
Description:
Paneer Biryani was super.
Being a vegetarian, I have tried Biryani at different places... But no match with Paneer Biryani. Superb... Service is good and quick. Never tried home delivery though..

Author: Priya
Description:
The ambience of the place needs a bit of attention and I would rate it as 3 though the place is clean.
The whole experience of eating in a Banana leaf was awesome and new for a foodie like me.
Talking about Meghana food is like relishing the Exuberant taste of the biryani again.
To start with me ordered chicken 65 and gobhi "manchuri" . Both being authentic and awesome in taste. Excellent is the word. After the starters we ordered the megahana spcl biryani which was surprisingly boneless and made me reluctant at first to order but then when i git the first taste of it....mmmmmm.... It was the best biryani i had tasted in a very long time. I really recommend this place for all the biryani lovers in Bangalore.

Author: Cyril Mac
Description: Best Biriyani in town? hmmm that's debatable! But It sure is good! Not just the biriyani the sides and the meals as well! The portions are pretty big so think twice before you go witht the classic one biriyani per person order! The place gets really crowded though even on weekdays so make sure you factor in the time spent waiting. But otherwise no complaints about it. Oh and also remember this place is all about the food.

Author: Harish Ojha
Description: Horrible home delivery service. The delivery person would not talk properly and same with the person who takes order. They will bring the order half way and say either come and collect or cancel it. In fact once I order 2 ltr pepsi to make it more than 500 (min for home delivery), the person came with small bottle which I noticed only upon reaching back home (remember they will call you to come half way).. cheater.. So horrible service. To go and dine in is good.

Author: Patibandla Gokul Chowdary
Description: A good biryani place for biryani lovers. Taste differs from the one in koramangala but satisfies ur taste buds to the maximum extent. The ambience is a lot better compared to the one in koramangala

Author: Vamshi Krishna Arey
Description: I had paneer biryani it is the worst biryani I had a ven with my friends biryani they were cold and the meat was not cooked properly. The prawns were cold inside I suggest not to go there road side biryani is better.

Author: Manoj Gupta
Description:
I had biryani from Meghana Foods multiple times and the taste of biryani is simply awesome...Must try atleast for once

Place is well maintained

Author: Kumar Raghavendra
Description:
Although known for it's Biryani, this place is quite good for it's meals. With a large number of offices around it, it is always crowded during lunch hours. Despite having two floors of seating, it can be difficult to find a table here. Besides, finding a parking spot can prove to be even harder.

If you manage to get past these hurdles, the food itself is quite delicious. You can order any of the biryanis or go for the meals. Both are very filling and will whet the spicier side of your palette. The price is decent for the quality and quantity of food here. However, the service isn't the best and can definitely improve. The waiters can get to the point of being rude when the crowd is high.

Author: Prathama Mohanty
Description:
Good place to have biryani in neighborhood. Always crowded. Cozy ambience.

Been here couple of times. 1st time we had chicken 65, naan, paneer. It was very spicy n full of chillies. 2nd time we had dum aloo biryani and chicken biryani. Quantity was so much. We could not even eat because it was too spicy. Taste was not bad. Chilly prawn is very tasty. If u like spicy food then this place is a must try.

What I don't like about this restaurant is they put so much curry leaves and chilles in starters.

Apart from that staffs were active, service was on time.

Author: Rituraj Suman
Description: Staffs are like illiterate, they don't know how to behave . food quality has  also degraded last time when I went to meghana food ,I ordered biryani then I came to know they have decreased the quantity as well as quality even biryani from small restaurants is better than the biryani served by this restaurant. Had a very bad experience.

Author: Abhishikta Chakraborty
Description:
This place will always always be full of people and the locals seem to love this place. I did not like this place much, the service is fine but the ACs hardly work, they keep on switching the fans off so you have to keep o telling them to switch it on. 

They serve food on banana leaves so many people seem to like the authentic touch to it. They also serve raita and gravy with the Biryani. The 'special' Biryani is called special here because it would contain extra spice.

The mutton/chicken plain Biryani is just for you if you are not much of a spice fan. I would rate this as a one time try.

Author: Bulbul Rai
Description: Staff is not so friendly...but food is good.. try pepper chicken and boneless biriyani..overall this place is good for biriyani lovers........

Author: Rahul Das
Description:
Hyderabadi Biriyani... nati kodi biriyani, is at its best. For those who don't like spiciness, go with boneless chicken biriyani.

Vegetarians!! You still in scope!!! Paneer biriyani..

Author: User
Description:
Food is delicious upon mixing the chicken semi gravy mix with the rice. 
Buy Meghana Special Chicken Biryani as it is less spicy than the usual chicken biryani. Those who rarely eat biryani should order just one plate for two people as it will be sufficient finishing it with lime juice. Awesome feel!!

Author: Srikanth Nandipati
Description:
golden baby corn manchurian and
paneer biryani perfect combination

Author: Kartik Varma Namburi
Description:
The biryani here was good, but it gets really crowded on weekends and one has to wait for 15-20 minutes for a seat!
It was costly too when compared with its hyderabad branch!

Author: Krisssh - The Hogging Machine
Description: This is the best place to treat your friends as the the taste of food is awesome at the same time prices are nominal. I love the chicken biryani here. Service needs to be improved.

Author: Kiran Vaddireddy
Description: Been to Meghana lot of times. Delicious Boneless chicken biryani..!  And starters too (especially Guntur Chicken and Apollo fish). I've been in bangalore since 3 years, and its the best biryani I've eaten here so far. Only thing is whenever you go there, you must wait for atleast 20 min to get seated. And the place is little congested. Ofcourse, service was always good.

Author: Prakash Prakash
Description: This is not a place for Briyani lovers ,it is a perfect place for Andhra Briyani lovers.The Meghna Special chicken Briyani ,special chicken Briyani were ther the best that we have ever had.The meals here is also great with authentic Andhra style dishes.Side dishes are a must try here especially the fish fry stuff and other fish things .You dont get seat easily on weekends.That says the quality of the place.Price is fine not too high.

Author: Lopamudra Sarkar (thefatummy)
Description:
Biryani lovers, this is your place. This place has a quite big seating area but still it's over crowded even on weekdays. The biryanis are delectable, you keep asking for more and more. I am totally in awe of their Meghana special biryani, such a delight !! Among the starters, the Meghana special 555, pepper chicken, chicken 65 and apollo fish are worth mentioning.

The ambience is basic with nothing special to brag about. But it's their food which makes you boast of. The biryanis are flavorsome with the perfect blend of spices and the spicy chunks of chicken over it make your day just better.

The service is fast and the staff are very welcoming. The only negative point is the absence of a valet parking area.

Author: Rajdip
Description: Visited this place to satisfy my cravings for biryani. We ordered chicken tandoori, but it was not so good. Very oily, please avoid it. The boneless chicken biryani was just so tasty. We were served on banana leaf. There was lot of rush even during afternoon time, we had to wait for 15 minutes. The service is also quick.

Author: Rohan
Description:
This place has made a name for itself when it comes to Boneless Biriyani and very rightly so. Chunks of highly spiced chicken for the top layer of your biriyani and once it is served on your plate there's absolutely no looking back. Just gorge on till you either finish it off or till you can eat no more.

Has two levels of seating. Still pretty difficult to get a table. Almost always crowded this place is. Service is super quick. Before you can have a sip of water your biriyani is ready on your table. The waiter made a mess of serving me the biriyani but barring that the meal was awesome.

Understandably i haven't tried too many other things on the menu. This place is a must visit for all the biriyani lovers and the not so biriyani lovers too.

Author: Saurabh Shekhar
Description:
Megha Biryani is quite famous with Bangaloreans specially for its boneless biryanis. Well this outlet of Meghna Biryani is just like others. Biryani served is spicy as usual.
Its more of a daily food joint than a restaurant to sit and spend time with family and friends.

Author: Vijaykrishna Ranganathan
Description:
Bhagini, Nandhini, Meghana amongst others have perfected the fine art of sit - down “fast food”.

Meghana is pretty near my office on ORR and when my team, wants their biriyani fix, we usually order it from here. From time to time, I always drag others or end up being dragged here and I gladly do so to get my fix of their fantastic fish biriyani, which is the curried pieces of fried fish, over the eye watering spicy rice. A MUST try, if you haven’t!

I’ve eaten their meals, chicken biriyani etc, which is jolly fine. The specials/side dishes are often restricted to fish, chicken and mutton, which are fried and without much finesse I am afraid.

The decor is extremely functional and you are pretty boxed in, quite close to the other tables. The service staff is lighting quick, polite but robotic! but that's expected when the footfalls are so high and everything becomes rather mechanized. But you will hardly bother about these things, when you are gorging.

Don't go here expecting some great culinary experience. This is a very competent and affordable joint, if you stick to the basics.

Decor-6

Food-7.5

Service-7

Overall - 7

Author: Roopa Gowda
Description:
This was our other adventure when my frnd was in town. The place is buzzing with activity during the weekends especially evenings. I ordered the ghee rice with butter milk to calm the spices down as this place has a reputation of spicy Andhra style food. The ghee rice was so beautifully done, without to much spices I was actually surprised this came out of an Andhra style kitchen. Full marks to the chef on this. To add to the overall taste it is served on plantain leaf which adds to the taste I guess

The ambience and service is decent and fast, so all in all a great place to dine in this area.

Author: Sipra Patel
Description: I went there with my team for lunch as i had heard a lot about it from my friends. And the visit was worth it. As I am vegetarian the list of food items in veg section was good and the food also satisfied my taste buds.

Author: Bala Ganesh Muralidharan
Description: This is the first time I'm coming to this place... Biryani is excellent over here.. Its very crowded at peak time. U have to wait at least fifteen minutes at the max.. But the food is very good. Worth for waiting. As a South Indian I love the way they serve in Banana leaf.. So nice place to have lunch...

Author: Rachit Khare
Description: Went to this place with friends as heard great things about their biryani. Ordered Chicken boneless biryani and nati chicken biryani. Rice was cooked properly, good aroma. Quantity was descent as well. Overall great biryani. Place is bit crowded. Order home delivery if you live nearby.

Author: Praveen Babu
Description: Meghna has branches in many places in bangalore. But this branch is the best of the lot. It's a must try for all biriyani lovers. Tried their meghna special biriyani. It's the best biriyani as far as I know in bangalore.

Author: Swapnil Sonawane
Description:
I regularly order their chicken biryani (with-bone and boneless varieties) for home delivery (via Swiggy). Marathahalli has over 10-15 biryani places but I find all of them very average, Meghana is an exception. Their hyderabadi biryani is tasty & spicy, the rice is cooked just right and has a good flavour. 

I've never been to that outlet and so can't really comment about their service and staff. I've heard the veg biryani there isn't as good as the chicken one, but again I've not tried it personally myself.

Author: Vinod Kumar
Description:
Ambiance is good
Hell lot of oil in all the rice contents biryani especially, first thing attracted my attention is serving food on banana leaves was strange for eating biryani but, it's all new feeling for me.

Author: Sharath M.H
Description: I loved it. Megahana special biryani was yummmmmmmmmmmmmmy. So that is my review. But its asking me to enter minimum 140 characters that's why I typed this

Author: Suryaditya
Description:
1) delectable, flavorful, spicy, finger-licking biriyanis served on a banana leaf.
2) huge set-up with basic ambience.
3) fast service and fairly economical.

Thanks!!

Author: Dushyant Chillale
Description:
I was happy to see Meghana foods opening up at marathahalli as It's extremely tough to go through traffic from bellandur to it's koramangala branch.
With the koramangala branch doing so well, no wonder they had plans to expand.
If you come to the marathahalli branch, you'll be surprised to see how much seating they have. It's way better than the koramangala one. But even then you'll end up waiting for your turn to get a table. The reason is that marathahalli is a very good location which connects whitefield, old airport, sarjapur and many other places in between. Strategically opened, this outlet should do the best business :)
I've had their best biriyani; meghana special chicken biriyani and it tastes the same as their koramangala outlet. The boneless chicken biriyani is also good. Do not try the lollipop biriyani, it is not at all good. The chicken biriyani with bone is decent.
Also, make sure you ask for today's special in the starters. They usually have an excellent starter everyday. I've liked their chicken 555.
Some of my friends even prefer to have a dull meals here and have some chicken starters along with it.
Do not have the lassi here, cos you won't be able to finish your food otherwise :)
At one visit, I actually saw one staff carry a sack of chicken and one side was slightly open where a piece of raw chicken was popping out. After that, I've never wanted to come back to this place and I actually haven't come back since then.
I wish they don't do this again.

Author: VJ
Description: If you are a fan of Biriyani Meghna is a must visit place for you. You will enjoy the different varieties of Biriyani, chicken and special fish. Once you try I am sure you will definitely go back again.

Author: Abhishek Pranit
Description: Went one Sunday afternoon for lunch. Order meal and one chicken item on advice of Waiter but and he didn't tell about spices and all in that. That chicken was so hell spicy that it  spoiled whole mood and we left after having some meal. Had very bad experience.

Author: Nivedha Balasubhramanian
Description: I'd eat their biriyani any time, any day. Service to food everything is great about Meghana foods. I feel Marathahalli and indiranagar are so much better than the Residency Road branch.

Author: Aleem Javed
Description: The food is definitely tasty. Boneless hyderabadi biryani is a must try. Service is quick. Ambience is simple. Seating is comfortable. It might seem a bit pricy for some, but then depends on your pocket size.

Author: Sanojmahesan1
Description: Have gone there 6 times, but have tried only the famous boneless  chicken  Briyani!  It's just too good! So the 5 is just for the Briyani and good staff. Only problem is its housefull most of the time and you need to wait.

Author: Abhijeet
Description:
I would definitely give credits to them for the food that they serve.
Its delicious and soothes the taste buds.
The service was also pretty quick.

But the staff here at marathahalli were not cooperative at all.
We asked them for plates, they said we don't serve plates, but people seating on the other side were relishing their meals on plate.
The waiter wasn't interested to tell about the description of the item and was also talking very rude.
When we complained to the manager, he was totally casual about the issue.

This kind of substandard behavior was totally a turn off :(

Author: Arun Vasudevan
Description:
Famished? Have company? Wanna have a hearty meal? Well. You're on the right track.

5 visits to this outlet is substantial enough for me to realise that this place offers great repeatability! Each time their service is prompt (infact quicker than required) and each time I was full and satisfied.
The decor and the ambience is irrelevant here because the food will do all the pampering.
This place has better seating than the koramangala one.
The highlight being the biriyani, it's not extra spicy or overdone, the flavours really blend well and give that amazing experience.
The lemon chicken as a starter choice is a must.
And if you're visiting this place on a weekend, then do hurry yourself.

Author: Nishant Gupta
Description: The place can get real crowded even with two floors of seating. It's a biryani place as such. You'll love the quintessential way of serving directly on banana leaves. Typical Andhra  flavors, can get spicy.

Author: Anoop
Description:
loved their curries...Veg biryani was also awesome...didnt liked their non veg biryani ..
the place is very crowded & congested..
Service is quick and perfect..is definitely light on pocket good food.

Author: Prajwal Hegde
Description: Decent place for Biriyani lovers. And the Andhra thali is also tasty. I like the combination of biriyani and lassi here. Cool place to visit.

Author: Murali Murali
Description:
Very good sarvice and today special dice with bone is a good teste
Biriyani more spicy and guality is very good thank you to meghana foods

Author: Raunaq Kapoor
Description: Have been to this place two times and had chicken biryani each time. The biryani is good, service is fast. Overall a good place to have a quick meal.

Author: Kanav Ohri
Description: The different varieties of biryanis,their taste and service all are add ons to visit the restaurant. The quantity is so much that you can finish it alone only if you hv not had your previous meal.

Author: Kalki
Description:
Meghna is a loud place for treats and hungry group hangouts. Best known for its biryani which is typical Andra style. I have been to two of its outlets, one near Brigade road and other at Marathahalli. This place is always crowded and we have to wait to get seats. Service is really good and the customers are always served quick and with politeness. The decor/infra is not that grand or huge to the delicious food served. MEGHNA has come up as an ordinary restaurant with great food and the must BIRYANI.

For the QUICK REVIEWERS:
Food - Best Biryani, Andra style cooking, tasty spicy and hot ( you should love spicy n hot food to be a customer).

Ambience - simple in look and for loud desi crowd, hangout groups and families.

Service - Good and quick service( though its highly crowed you don't have to sit long to wait for food or get your order).

Outlets - All good and same.

Note - 1. BE PATIENT to get a seat.
2. LOUD crowd.
3. If you know TELUGU its a plus point.

A place for chatting n eating yummm :)

Author: Pooja
Description: after hearing so much about this place we finally visited this place and to much of our disappointment the chicken and egg biriyani was pathetic. The rice seemed to be cooked one or two days before. There was no taste in biriyanis. It was a complete waste of our time and money and spoilt our evening. I will not suggest ppl to visit this place.

Author: Mousumi Chowdhury
Description: Been there several times. Their boneless chicken biryani is my favorite. Both the biryani rice and chicken pieces are very tasty. They serve foods on banana leaves :) .

Author: Jeya Dev Nair
Description: Been here quite a few times but every time I come here I'm liking it more... Great food! Spicy and yummy... Must visit for someone coming to Bangalore...

Author: Sharath Chandra
Description:
Hi,

A place for Andhra cuisine.
Very populated. Need to wait for the table.

Do not expect leisure and pleasant ambiance.

Go for only taste. Thali and biryani everything is awesome in taste.

Food: 4/5
Ambiance: 3/5
Value for money: 4/5

Author: Suneel Karjala
Description:
Tried biryani here and its good and spicy Andhra style enjoyed the food.

I always look for Andhra restaurants for normal lunch and dinners and this one is near to my office & home.

Author: Manish
Description:
Had heard a lot about this place and finally went there on a treat for lunch. The place was full to capacity even though they had two floors of sitting area.
The menu itself speaks about the place being famous for biryanis.
We ordered other north Indian items as well apart from biryani. Good in quantity and in taste too.
The only thing that bugged me was the service. The staff was very quick (literally QUICK). We were served starter after 5 mins of order which impressed us and then they served the mains as well even though we were not even half way through the starters we was really annoying.

PS: If you are going on weekends then do expect a waiting time.

Author: Hari Katra
Description:
Special Chicken Biryani, Boneless Chicken Biryani, Alu Dum Biryani are amazingly tasty.
Lemon chicken, pepper chicken are very good.
Insanely packed during peak hours.

Author: Deepan
Description: Briyani at its best. Awesome simply awesome but was way too spicy, got a red head to say. Ambience quality quantity serving in all the way felt very good.

Author: Venk AV
Description: Writing this review post having dinner today, Mutton keema Biriyani is very spicy which you can't consume more than 30% from what you bought, that's the limit. After complaining to the supervisor they gave us white rice to mix. I was disappointed with their food this time though it was one of my favourite restaurants in the past, their quality is getting downwards.

Author: Vijay Singh
Description:
I must say I'm really impressed with you people.

I know Meghana is always crowded, but luckily they got us place within no time, that to around 09:00 PM SAT.

Food was perfect in all respects, no doubt about that.

Service could have been better, I had to wait bit longer for everything. I hope i can ignore that as the FOOOOOD was great.

So on a happy note am gonna give you 4.5.

Surely will visit again. :)

Author: Bindu Karthikeya
Description: Been there with friends.... Anytime u go, it ll be full of people waiting for the mouth watering biryani.... Being a veggie i ordered veg biryani and few other veg starters.... I must say it was pretty awesome n tasty....

Author: Shikha Suman
Description:
As always this place was so crowded but in no time we got a nice place...we had ordered pepper chicken, boneless biryani and sweet lime soda..
Pepper chicken was the star i would say and would 5 out of 5. But the piece in boneless biryani was very hard and chewy..before when we used to have in here and it used to be very fresh and so tender..but they have decreased the quality significantly.
The service is getting worst day by day..the waiters treat their guests as some s***..no respect when they talk..we specifically told them sweet lime soda but they got sweet and salt..
We totally understand it could happen to anybody coz of that much rush..but this is not the first time..it had happened some 2-3 times with us.
So my ratings are below:
Food 3/5
Quality 2.5/5 (they have decreased the quality)
Service 1.5/5
Value for money 3/5
They have increased the price as it used to be before and decreased the quality along with that so.

Author: Abhishek
Description:
When you call for home delivery they will just say sir minimum order amount is Rs.800 higher then any other biryani place.
If they don't want to deliver simply say that. Huuuh

Author: Kishor Roy
Description:
just love the biryani's at meghana, was here with a group of friends for lunch
ordered Boneless and lolipop chicken biryani
great taste and the portions are big.

Author: Pranoy Mathew
Description: Meghana Special Biriyani is the best Andhra style biriyani I have had in Bangalore. It's different with boneless pieces of chicken. The quantity is huge and I dare it's difficult to finish one full biriyani. This place is almost opposite Innovative multiplex, Marathahalli. The restaurant is always crowded and you might find it difficult to find a parking.

Author: Raju Krishna Naidu
Description:
Nice service.
Nice variety of biriyanis are available.
I loved the mutton kheema biriyani here.
It is too crowded always which I understand because of the taste of food.
Nice place to have delicious biriyani

Author: Suman
Description:
Went here with a friend for Friday lunch. At 12:45 itself ~ 50 people were waiting for a table. 

But after giving our name in the list, within 10 minutes we got a table.

The service was fast. The starters were really nice. The quantity of the dishes were good.

The biriyani wasn't that spicy but the taste was good.

Author: Bala Gopal
Description: Famous for their andhra flavour, I really like their way of serving food in a plate with banana leaf.. I recommend everyone to try their variety of biriyanis🍛 and the quantity is so much that everyone will definitely be pleased and happy.. 👌😊

Author: Poorvi Kulkarni
Description:
Heard a lot about this restaurant from my friends, so finally visited it. It wasn't as great as they had told me. However, I'm surprised that there is always a huge crowd. I had 3 times from here, once it was delivered. All the 3 times biryani (which is very famous here) was very salty. It ruined my palates. I had to sip water and Coke. Service was also average. If I get another chance I may skip it. Value for money? Definitely but not at cost of my taste.

Ambience 3/5
Food 2.5/5
Service 2.5/5
Value for money 3.5/5

Enjoy your food..
Bon Appetite!

Author: Dhawal Rastogi
Description:
I am a huge fan of Meghana foods but last two times we visited it seems like the standard is going down big time.

We generally order Meghana Special Chicken Biriyani + Chicken Fry. Last two times also we ordered the same. On both the occasions we received "Meghana Today's Special" instead of "Chicken Fry". As we had chicken fry a lot of times we were pretty sure that the dish they served is not the one we ordered. Even after confirming the staff kept on saying that it is chicken fry!

When we received the bill, they charged us for Meghana Today's Special and not we ordered. Thankfully I checked the bill and asked the cashier to correct it. THEY REFUSED and started arguing. Then I called the waiter and he accepted that we order chicken fry. The faces they made to me was not as expected. This was NOT the first time and I was very angry and probably won't go back again.

Author: Pallavi Gowda
Description:
I have ordered food for my team, veg and non veg both, firstly Food wise it was very spicy and no taste at all. Secondly the delivery was very bad, they have packed both veg and non veg in same type of covers. it was very difficult to make out which is what.
I would suggest not to order from meghana at all. I am very disappointed with the food especially.. wasted around 8k, which is not the small amount.

Author: Pratheek Ponnappa
Description:
Almost all Biriyani lovers would be aware about this chain of restaurants. Ambiance is decent with lot of people around to cater every table. Meghana special biriyani is a must have here. The massive proportions of biriyani is enough to suffice two people (provided appetite is moderate).
It is located on the busy service road and parking can get tricky, absence of valet parking is a big negative point in here!

Author: SuperAmarms
Description:
Hi,

If you are planning for a  home delivery, planning to have the WORST birayni, please select this .
 we ordered a biryani, which was stinking , had to throw away the entire food, the food was ordered at 7 :30 pm , delivered by 9 40 pm after a long wait had to Taste this stinking biryani, including starters .

my last order from this restaurant.Thanks for the service

Author: Anurag
Description:
Biryani lovers this is just the place for you dont order home delivery their packing is messy and confusing you wont know what contains what till the time you open it.

I always eat meghna's special chicken biryani its really tasty juicy boneless chicken pieces with raita (more of curd less of water) . Guaranteed best place for biryani lovers.

Author: Sundeep Rajagopalan
Description: Always crowded maybe due to repititive customers or close proximity to their work place/homes, Meghna Foods simply amazes in the Boneless Chicken Dhum biriyani and the usual side dishes which i usually do not order when you have good pieces of chicken served. When you have quality and good quantity which are propotional to the amount paid, you will always have people thronging. You just cannot help it out.. Thank you.

Author: Mrandmrsnomnom
Description: I always prefer Kritunga for Biryani and this place gave me a reason that why i should not waste my time on other Biryani places. Went to this place on a Friday afternoon and was really disappointed by their service, staff and Biryani. It was really crowded that day so the service was a bit slow but the irritating part was that for half an hour their waiters kept on saying that our order will come in 5-10 mins. Their Biryanis were pathetic, be it veg or non-veg. Rice was not cooked properly and the taste was also not good.

Author: Himanshu Tewari
Description: one of the best biryani one can get in entire bangalore. truely full of flavours. a must try place for all the biryani lovers. and not just biryani almost everything they have on the menu is worth trying.

Author: Arabinda Biswal
Description:
You can say they are one of the best in preparing hyderabadi Biriyani and the long queue's in all of their outlets almost all time proves it.
Other than Biriyani they offer good andhra dishes as well like kebab, Chicken 65, andhra meals. Mutton kheema Biriyanis and boneless chicken Biriyani are two things everyone should try. Be prepared to wait as they don't entertain reservations and they have a huge fan following.

Author: Mahesh Sivarama Pillai
Description: Just called them for home delivery.. My apartment is 100 meter ahead of Alpine Eco... The arrogant guy who took the phone said his last point is Alpine Eco after that his Bike won't move.... Height of Customer Satisfaction.... Guys, please avoid this.. there are many Biriyani outlets in Bangalore....

Author: Upanshu
Description: One of the best biryanis in Bangalore. Being a "Chicketerian", I ordered Boneless Chicken Biryani. It was awesome and no hassle of bones. My wife ordered dum aloo biryani, it was very nice but less potatoes.

Author: Bhavana
Description:
Food - Their Egg & Veg Biryanis are really good. I am a Hyderabadi, so my love for Biryani takes me back to this place often. After Paradise, this is my go-to place for Biryani.
Ambience - Decent. Not suggested for dine-in on weekends as it is superly crowded. Take away is the best option.

Author: Mashood Abdulla
Description: Generally I don't like biriyani's other than the Malabar biriyani. But Meghna's boneless chicken biriyani altered my viewpoint about other biriyani's ☺️ the quantity they serve is more than enough for two!

Author: Suparna Sengupta
Description: While Bangalore has a lot of wonderful restaurants and cafes, especially dessert places, this city leaves me wanting in the biryani department. But this is one of the few places with decent biryani. Décor is decent. The boneless special chicken biryani is good.

Author: Atul Mavinkurve
Description: they have done it in the past and now again.... we ordered 4 non veg biriyani and 1 veg biriyani i came all the way from HSR layout to collect the parcel but guess what i find when I get home there is no Veg gravy the Veg Gravy is missing only rice!  how do you manage to do that two times?  and now when i call the restaurant no one answers..  great experience for my vegetarian guests thank u

Author: Suneet Raj
Description: Ambience is simplistic to the core. Had a proper veg meal after a long time. Go for the Day Fry and Ghee Rice. Take any one item of paneer. Trust me you won't regret. The rice and dal combination was awesome.

Author: Anvesh Mallick
Description:
Biryani is really nice. The service is prompt. The servers, are dedicated to provide a good experience, whenever you go.

I love going to this place for the biryani carving.

The only reason I deducted 0.5 is because the place is too crowded at the times of lunch and dinners.

Author: Pradeep Kumar
Description: Visited marathalli franchise today, place was crowded and had to wait for 20 minutes. Disappointed with the service. After sitting at the table, we waited for a long time for food to be served. Restaurant is under staffed. It gets busy and staff cannot handle the rush. Food was average, had andhra meals and biriyani. Taste did not meet expectations. Meals was bland so as biriyani. Will not visit again.

Author: SoNi RaNi
Description:
ONE OF THE WORST RESTAURANTS I'VE BEEN TO OR ORDERED FOOD FROM. I've ordered food online on 10th of October and made an online payment (these guys are using MOBIKWIK which is ONE DISASTER) which was declined for the first time but went successful the next time. The bill amount was deducted twice from my card. I received an email for the same which stated that the amount which got deducted against the first transaction would get credited to mobikwik wallet within 48 hours but guess what my money is still with those guys. I've called them hell number of times just to hear "Sir, we are looking into it, your money will get credited by tomorrow". WTH man, it's been almost a month now and I still did not receive my money (2K) back from you guys. Meghanas guys are so irresponsible that say they don't have anything to do with this, it's an issue with Mobikwik guys. I just question you guys, WHY THE HECK are you using mobikwik as a source of online payment for your food when you are not ready to take incharge and resolve such payment issues? 😬😬😬😬😬😬😬😬😬
And the guy who was looking into this issue (GOD only knows if he was actually looking into it or was just.... ) is such a useless one that he stopped picking my calls and texts me saying he is busy with his meetings. BLOODY USELESS SOUL...DO YOU THINK THAT I'M SITTING HERE WITH NO OTHER WORK THAN JUST KEEP CALLING YOU EVERY DAY just to request you to look into the issue and get my money credited back to my account. Now let me tell you Meghanas, enough of patience I showed, now if I'm not getting back my money by this 10th, you'll see me at your head office here in bangalore and..... Wait and watch....!!!!
My Rating is: lol why do you guys have to mandate minimum to 1... It's a -ve rating from my end to you guys.

Author: Ashwini Saket
Description:
Have been here on a weekday afternoon to have a quick lunch since me and my friend were too lazy to prepare lunch. It's close to my place, around 2 Kms.

When we reached it was was around 2:30 in afternoon and was full packed. I had heard a lot about biryanis from Meghna. Seeing the crowd was excited to try biryani here. After waiting for 15 mins got a table for 3. We were seated quite decent and waiter soon spread banana leaves on our table.

We checked menu for 5 mins to find some starter... But however at the end ordered what waiter said would be quickly available. Had a plate of reshmi kabab, chicken dum biryani and paneer biryani (for veggie friend).

Following are my observations:
1. Quick service
2. Prompt staff
3. Not a place to relax and spend time with friends but only to have biryani n leave.
4. Above average biryani but dint meet its hype
5. Starter was very good, but quantity could have been more.
6. Eating in banana leaves altogether adds to flavour and feel.
Would visit again to have a quick biryani in moderate price, but certainly have had better biryani.
Note: the chicken dum biryani had 2 chicken leg pieces unlike other places where we get only 1 leg piece and a normal one. So kudos for that.

Author: Kalyan Tadepalli
Description: Best Andhra food I had in Bangalore was at meghana foods here. Decent ambience and moderately priced. Ulavacharu which I had here, probably I will never forget!
