Author: Udayam Kumar Singh
Description:
This is one of places all biryani lovers will talk about.
The biryani was decent. This is one place which is always crowded and that talks volume about the place.
Must try: Chicken Boneless Biryani and do take extra chicken.

Author: Praveen Matapathi
Description:
paneer biryani without paneer:
we ordered paneer briyani and meghana(Marathalli) delivers birynai with out paneer and when asked the person on the phone concluded that he is not responsible .

we ordered for coke instead they sent thumps up and when asked the reply was "all they have is thumps up "

Author: Alka Mathur
Description: Perhaps the best biryani in Bangalore. Their Meghana Special biriyani and Chicken Boneless both are mouth watering stuffs and must have stuffs. Enjoy true taste of Hyderabadi Biryani.

Author: Rowena Samuel
Description:
After a late evening call, we were dead hungry and we ended up going here. We were group of six people out of which 3 were vegetarians. The restaurant doesn't look exceptionally great but the staff were friendly and we had to eat on those Leaves. We ordered Chicken lollipop and Golden Baby Corn as starters. Both were good and chicken lollipop was really crispy so that was definitely good. We then ordered Prawn Briyani, Aloo Dum Briyani and Plain Briyani. The Prawn Briyani was amazing. The quantity was a lot and the amount of prawns in the Briyani was also a lot. It was definitely on the spicy side and I love spicy so it was perfectly fine for me. The Aloo Dum Briyani was also really good. One suggestion is perhaps they could add more choices for vegetarians and also the ambience can be improved upon.
Food : 4.5/5
Ambience : 4/5
Service : 4/5

A place I will definitely visit again :)

Author: Niranjan
Description:
This restaurant was just amazing. They got 3-4 branches in Bangalore. And in all the restaurants the crowd is crazy, and has a long waiting time.! The food is amazing. They have 4-5 types of biriyani's. Best were boneless chicken biriyani, Meghana special biriyani, chicken 65, prawn fry, fish fry, chicken lollipop. Their curd was great, as for it.!
Overall it was great.
MUST TRY.

Author: Jinsha Jaganath
Description:
We always get food delivered from here,rather than going. But went here on Dussehra day.Was expecting the crowd to be less since it was festival day,it we still we had wait almost ten minutes for table.We were a team of eight and most of us non veg.Tried the following dishes.
Egg chilly- Good dish, wish it had been a little more spicy.
Prawn fried chilly ,Prawn chilly- I usually don't eat prawn in restaurants since I feel it's always undercooked but these dishes were delicious.
Special fish fry- I dint try it since I'm not a fish fan.But could see my friends enjoying it and repeating the order
Tangdi kabab- My favourite. It was cooked perfect and I loved it.
Chicken boneless biriyani- Have tried the biriyani in the Koramangala outlet , but wasn't up to the expectation.But this one was too good.

Author: Santosh Sadangi
Description:
One of the worst restaurant I had ever been. I ordered chicken lolipop and tandoori chicken- so tasteless..
Staff are also not up to the mark. Over all Not worth it not satisfied.

Author: Nischal Nayak
Description:
Don't go there on a Sunday... That's what I learned. We had to wait for almost half an hour, the queue was long and extended till the stairs!
Finally we did get a table. The ambience is nice but the service is pathetic. It took them forever to get our order, they came back every 5 mins saying that some item wasn't available and we had to order something else. I'm not a big fan of Meghana's brand of biryani, yes it is spicy but nothing else. It is also unreasonably overpriced. There are other outlets serving better biryani.
Wouldn't recommend this place to anyone, try it at your own risk.

Author: Prateek Mittal
Description:
One Liner: Hyderbad taste! Karnataka banana leaf!! Messfull n bad behaved staff(sarcasm).
Order: Biryani(any), for vegetarioan go for paneer biryani instead dum aalo.
Positive: I am big fan of biryanis and found of eating in hyderabad and hear I found it taste similar. One of the beat birayanis in banagalore. Maintained clean ambience also you can find other options in menu.
Negative: staffs are noncoperative lazy too. Specially marathali branch. I tried escalating to manager but then got busy with food ;) and @beingfoodie9 I need nothing more than that. Little overpriced but thats ok looking onto taste.

Author: Swetha
Description: I like the meals here but somehow the biryani in marthahalli branch doesn't match the taste of it in Koramangala . The food here is just average and the place is aways over crowded

Author: Vipul Oswal
Description: Good food. Regular food is Spicy. Ask them to make it less spicy. I ate vegetarian biryani. It was above average. Service is very quick and polite.

Author: Sibani
Description: Chicken tikka was super tasty. Service was superb. We hardly waited. The staff was really fast and attentive. Didn't like the biriyani which they claim to be their speciality. It was a bit sour. I have had better biriyani in rather smaller places. But again this depends. I personally like spicy biriyani.

Author: Jomson George
Description: Had been there with my friends twice. There was huge rush and we managed to get the foods within 20 minutes. The service was good. The food is tasty. We have ordered meghanas special biriyani which was tastier and also becomes my favourite dish. A few chicken dry items were not upto the expectations.

Author: Ritwik Rowsun
Description:
i have been to meghna foods with a group of 6 . Its a good place to have a biriyani(biryani) of a different style (Andhra)...Serving plates were banana leaf then. Ambience is fine alike any family restaurant. Aroma of the place was quite foody as there was a mix of biriyani,chicken gravies and other heavy spices, so people strictly veg who even cant stand smell of non-veg...Meghna is not the person for you. Overall place for EATING(mid-spicy and spicy), Not for dates, romantic dinner or long chat time place...Eat and Fill urself and move, theres a famished crowd waitingggggg.....Overall 3/5
Ambience - who cares? Okayish
Food - 4/5
Service - 3/5
Go for a Lunch, Dinner didnt looked that good to me

Author: KiranKumar
Description: I have ordered for home delivery and cost of the item was completely different from menu card which is available at zomato. The variation was upto 80 to 100 rs  on each dish. food was good, but was disappointed with the cost variance...

Author: Rohan.kumar.k
Description: Visited twice and tried chicken biryani. Place is average like other options nearby with slight variations of chicken Biryani. Overall it's good with better sea food side dishes.

Author: Sharmistha Pal
Description: Ambiance is not good at all, waited for 30 mins but no luck. Will recommend not to visit this place and waste your time....Chaotic and rude staff.

Author: Sunil Kumar
Description:
I have visited Meghna a few times for their biriyani's. Their special chicken biriyani is good. and must try.
i have a large group of Friends who wanted to try meghna and We ordered 6 biriyanis to our office in Cessna tech hardly 300 mtr from the restaurant. We ordered our lunch at 12.50. Then the trauma started. We waited more than 1/2 hour and called up to check if it going to be delayed. No one was picking up the phone. So called Meghana kormangala and got another mobile number for contact. That person was rude and kept giving us some execuses. We waited till 2.30 (all of us hungry) had lunch at the office cafe. Then at 3 this person called back asking if i still wanted the order delivered !!! So meghna delivery service is third class or actually even worse.

Author: Vijayalakshmi
Description: The biryani here is really good and kinda better than shanmukh...The paneer quality and taste was great... My friend who had chicken boneless was totally in aww for it... And service was also pretty much good... Only problem was they did not accept cards which is unusual for a restaurant these days...Nevertheless it was a great experience... Quality and quantity totally good.

Author: Sathish Natarajan
Description:
Instead of Biriyani, for a change we tried Veg Meals. Their's signature Ghee-Podi and Ghangra were at its usual best.. Succulent fish fry made it a satisfactory meal.. Serving was good.. 
Waiting Area should ve been better..

Author: Sachin Gopal
Description: I love their Andhra food. No matter what you order,  everything is good on your pallet. Tried chilly prawn, Tandoori chicken,  Fish Tikka with biryani. A very good place to visit if you are an Andhra food fan. I miss kulfi which they used to serve long back. Could not find in the recent menu.

Author: Suraksha Mattoo
Description: Ambience is better than koramangala branch but little chaotic with larger group. They staff is unable to handle lot of people in one shot. Waiting area is also very limited. Coming to food ...do try Apollo fish, mutton and chicken biryani. Their beverages are not ice cold.

Author: Gaganpreet Singh
Description:
Worst experience ever.
It rained that day and food was even colder than the weather. :P
We ordered chicken biryani and some starters.Everything was cold and over spicy.
We had to search for some other place to fulfill our appetite.

Pathetic Experience overall...

Good thing was, the saunf they served with the bill.

Author: Nitish Satyavolu
Description: This restaurant undoubtedly serves the best Biryani in Bangalore. Very spicy and flavourful, just the way I like it. The only downside is the pricing which seems to be going up due to the ever increasing demand.

Author: Shubha Amin
Description: Home delivery comes after two hours. If we call , the lines are waiting all the time. If u have paid online, God save you. Worse experience ever. They left us hungry for two hours . Very very bad.

Author: Bharath
Description:
Been there frequently as it is always busy though it doesn't take much time to get a table.
Ordered Biryani comes ina bowl served on banana leaf(quick service) So after eating the Biryani we literally felt like we are burning our mouth and stomach (its Spicy as hell) though people like Spicy but they could have decreased little cloves and cinnamon mixtures in Biryani .
Apart from that every thing is well.

Author: Lakshmanrao Paruchuri
Description:
Don't come for anything except biryani.
We ordered panned butter masala after 10 mins they told it is not available. We ordered panner starter after 30 mins they told it's not available. Worst restaurant experience in my whole life.

Author: Akshay Cherukupally
Description: Landed here in search of a satisfying biryani, and would tell you we were not disappointed, though it may not appeal well compared to the authentic biryani we love in Hyderabad, it sure comes close, couple it with some exquisite starters at offer, you would enjoy a mouth watering meal.

Author: Subrat Jain
Description:
I visited this place as it came highly recommended from some of my colleagues. But i have to say, i was profusely disappointed.

I have to admit at this point that i havent tried a lot of their dishes but after the experience that i had i dare not try it again.

So i had ordered a paneer biryani as its not a very common thing among most of the biryani joints. Though the biryani was decent (i mean nothing special) the way it was prepared was just outright repulsive.

You would think that a panner biryani would have been cooked with chunks of paneer but surprisingly meghna foods served a normal biryani topped with some sort of red gravy with paneer in it. Even the panner chunks were hard and seemed stale.

Avoid this place and go to kritunga that is just next to this.

Author: Naresh Gunda
Description: meghana foods, marathalli. you better to change the service staff. their rude behavior, not proper service. all are behaving like an third rated. they are spoiling the environment. especially on second floor. if it is not change, you may loose your business. you better to maintain and collect the feedback from your customers. then you can know about your customer satisfactory level.

Author: Shrey Bhatt
Description:
I think this place is a little overhyped. But this is a great place for Andhra Style meal

Went to this place quite a few times now.

Ambience: It is a 2 story diner but still whenever visited it is highly crowded which is not the restaurant's fault but even after getting a table is gets clumsy , waiters running around all the time. a couple of times we were offered tables outside the reach of Fan. Got another table after refusing 

Service: Service is usually good , considering the crowd 

Food: Already mentioned the place is good for meals. Biryani is good but not as hyped. Rest ala carte is not recommended so as the Veg Items. Can just go for Meals or for biryani.

Author: Koushik Rakshit
Description: I have heard of this place a lot of my friends. Ultimately I landed up yesterday. Seems to be a very bustling place. Huge crowd walking in every minute. Best part was food was served on clean and fresh banana leaf. Service was quick and prompt. We ordered meghana chicken spl as starter. Fish and boneless chicken biriyani. Food was spicy but tasty. I personally likes the taste, though my friends got busy managing spices. Over all liked it. Quality and quantity is good enough.

Author: Bhuvanesh
Description: Mutton pepper dry is way above the expectation. Liked it so much. They serve the food in banana leaves :). Fish biryani is also good. Overall a very nice experience except one drawback being the guy who took our order is dictating what the customer should buy instead of suggesting what a customer should try out at their outlet. >:(

Author: Shirish Jumade
Description:
I have already placed my review in their marathahalli outlet so no complaint from food point of view.
Negatives-
Rude staff
Place not spacious

Author: Neha Chandra
Description:
Inconsistent in taste. We had a very bad experience with the food quality. We went there for 2nd time after having relished their Biryani before. This time we ordered Gomura chicken, which was speciality of the day and chicken Biryani again. Gomura chicken was absolutely tasteless and chewy. And the biryani, felt like we were eating only red chilli powder, with Enhanced Prices!! No flavors this time.
We left with burned mouths and a big hole in our pocket.

Author: Sachin Kodagali
Description:
Review done here is on the basis of Delievery by Meghana's

We were 9 people and had ordered both Veg and Non Veg. Food was delivered on time. However they had missed a Non Veg Starter we had ordered. Also there menu has changed but not updated in zomato, so many items we asked they didnt have.

Review for Veg Items

a. We ordered Golden Baby Corn, Gobi Chilly, Paneer Tikka and Paneer Manchurian. Paneer items were good, baby corn wasnt crispy
b. Coming to biriyani, veg biriyani i would say was average, mostly aloo pieces found and not much masala
c. They could have packed more Raita as we had orderd 3 Veg biriyani and 3 non veg

Author: Shruti
Description:
It's an okay place. The birayani was good.. not too spicy nor bland. Price wise it's okay. Good to go once in a while with friends.

Though, it can be crowded. And the service is not that great.

Author: Vignesh Shanmugam
Description:
The meghana restaurant is known for briyani , but I dint know they are famous for serving briyani with glass pieces......

I ordered meghana special briyani and I got multiple small glass pieces, when I complained about this to the manager "RAVI" all of them are trying to cover up the issue.
They took the glass piece which I showed and disposed it immediately to erase the proof.

These kinds of restaurants should be closed@ as it might be a threat to the public who consume their food.

This is apart from the mosquitoes and cockroaches present in large numbers in this restaurant.

The photos I attached are real pics taken during the incident, the glass piece can be seen in two pics.
With briyani pics the glass piece is kept at the corner of the left, next pic they shook me while taking the pic and grabbed the glass piece.

Author: Subho
Description: The order after being taken we get no communication from the restaurant and then when we call the Restaurant they respond back with the reply that "no the order has not been placed" and when told that the money has already been paid did they confirm regarding the order.

Author: Santhosh Jayakumar
Description:
The place is heavily crowded on a Sunday night for sure, mostly young crowd and hence fairly noisy... There is a significant chunk of customers who do take away too... All this results in quite a bit of commotion, even then their service is very quick...

Packed B/L Chicken Biriyani, Butter Chicken and Butter Naans... Naans weren't fluffy at all, it was more like Roomali Roti with butter on them... We opted for Butter Chicken to get the least spicy dish but it was not to be.... Chicken Biriyani was the usual fare, it was nice and didn't disappoint... It is an eatery where you get consistent quality of Andhra food but the spice levels are pretty high, people from other parts of India will take some doing to handle it...

Author: Parthiban Dorai
Description:
Bad food, bad service. The place looks decent and the ambience is fine. The food, just bad. 7 members of our family went and our order was biryani and meals. Biryani was ok. Not bad. But no where close to being a good authentic biryani.

And I never thought an Andhra restaurant can go wrong with meals. I have had meals at Nagarjuna and Ruchi Sagar and they are just awesome. Here, I started my meals with dal powder and ghee.

This ghee that they gave us liberally was not ghee at all. Its a weird mixture of something that tastes like coconut oil and something else. But not certainly ghee. Its was some bad oil. And that screwed my appetite. It made my stomach resist any further food and gave a very bad feeling. Could realise it was totally unhealthy. So I kept aside all that rice and tried basic stuff like chutney, pappu, sambar and everything was just bad.

If they add something so weird in the name of ghee right in front of your eyes, made me wonder the kind of ingredients that they could add in the kitchen!!!

They even managed to screw up the water we asked for. The Kinley water we asked for has so much impurities and suspended particles, we asked the bearer if its genuine Kinley water. He bluntly said yes, and left the table. And it also tasted like tap water, so we thought we will not use the other bottle we ordered and we said we will return that bottle. But when the bill came they had added that amount in the bill. When we said we that we had already mentioned that we wanted to return the bottle they just but we have billed and we cant change it.

A wonderful Saturday afternoon spoilt. Will never this place again and never recommend this place to anyone.

Author: Swapnil Sidd
Description: Travelled 27 kms in heavy traffic for this authentic hyderabadi biryani.it took more than 3 hours to reach.but it was worth it...we tried the regular chicken biryani..amazing it was...salan to go along with biryani was just perfect..they have banana leaves instead of plates which was quite exciting for me as I belong to north India..people looking for authentic biryani ought to visit this place

Author: Vishnu Menon
Description:
Good place to taste this hotel's famous variety... Bone less Spl Biriyani.
Its wonderful.
The masala content is very high in biriyani's so don't forget to order Lemon Juice in the end.

Ambiance: 3.5/5
Food: 4/5
Service: 3/5
Pricing: 3.5/5
OVERALL: 3.5/5

Author: Ajith K Gatty
Description: The quality of the food is outstanding. really a good place to eat. Unfortunately once i got some insect in Mutton Biriyani. if i keep this thing aside service and taste of the foods are very good. Especially Chicken Lollipop.

Author: Sreeraag Gorty
Description: Found chicken piece in paneer biryani! Was totally ridiculous. Had bad instances when I found chicken in egg biryani but this was supposed to not happen. Moreover the waiter was confidently saying they serve veg rice until we showed him the piece

Author: Siddharth Maheshwari
Description: One of my favorite biryani places in the town. Being a vegetarian, I usually have veg biryani over here. The quantity is quite good, a single biryani sufficient for two people like me and the prices are reasonable. Service is quick.

Author: Kathiravan J
Description: The quantity and the quality of the food is very good! Nice to visit place to have good lunch at decent price!! The place is neat and service is quicker!!!

Author: Raviteja Kodati
Description:
This is specially for Andhra people. When taking veg thalli, You will feel that you are in Andhra because you eat thalli in banana leaf. The chicken biryani is also very tasty.
Overall good experience.

Author: Saravana Kumar C
Description:
Beware of home delivery / take away. Meghana replaced the ordered item without informing you and not defending the difference in paid amount. In my case ordered for Mutton Briyani and they packed chicken Briyani, I was surprise after opening the package. Tried 19 times to their contact number no one picked the call. I had visited the restaurant with food and their reply was Mutton was out of stock hence packed Chicken... I was there by exact restaurant opening time.. :) later came back Mutton is available we'll provide the same :) pathetic service and not even having courtesy to say sorry or compensation.

To show the wrong packing, I collected the food served in plate back to bowl. The restaurant manager collected bowl (opened food) and took to kitchen (pity for customers including me as he might have re-used the food) and returned empty bowl. Otherwise he should have advice me to trash the food. Tough I got a replacement Briyani I couldn't enjoy ... as my mind is questioning about hygiene of the food I received.

No option to upload a video otherwise you would have shocked to see his response. I'll upload the video to social media ...

Author: Shankar M
Description: Nice place to have lunch in marathalliregion. One thing i love this place is for thr fish biriyani. They get it right everytime. Andhra meals which they serve is also good. The other dish which i liked was crispy fried chicken. Ambience is average. Service is good. The order gets served very fast unlike other restaurants. This place is pocket friendly too :)

Author: Sam
Description:
Was a regular visitor to this place. Nothing fancy about this place but their food is something which will make you visit this place again and again.
If you are looking for a quick authentic Andhra meal look no further this is the place!
The thali/meals is really nice and tastes home cooked. Biriyani is a different style not the typical Hyderabadi dum style . And this too tastes really nice just that its little spicy well that's what is expected from Andhra cuisine though. Try chicken starters esp chicken dry roast it's well done.

Author: Ananth
Description:
Had been here for lunch few days back. The Andhra meals which they served on leaf was really a good choice.
We also ordered a Paneer tikka and a Gobi starter. Both of them were given in fairly large quantities . We then ordered a Veg Biriyani .The biriyani was one of the best biriyani I had. The rice in it was perfectly cooked and also the vegetables in it were so accurately .Masala and a Raita was served along with Biriyani. Overall a worth visit for Andhra Food lovers as well as Biriyani.

Author: Dhruv Rastogi
Description:
This place was recommended to us by a couple of friends. The fact that it was full at 330 pm confirmed that it is very popular.

Ambiance
They have two storied sitting arrangement and food is to be eaten on a banana leaf. One is supposed to not use spoon/fork to eat though I requested for one!
Food
We ordered Chicken Biryani which is served with curry and raita. Unlike hyderabadi biryani, this was very spicy and less fragrant but it tasted good. For vegetarian we ordered Mattar Paneer and tandoori roti. The gravy was very rich and the generous amount of khada masala made it pretty flavourful.
Service
Staff was not the friendliest/most prompt and this is one area which do with improvements.
Pricing
For the quality and quantity of food, the pricing is reasonable. The food being very filling, the pricing is justifiable.

Ambiance: 3.5/5
Food: 4/5
Service: 3/5
Pricing: 3.5/5
OVERALL: 3.5/5

Author: Lohitha Sanath
Description: starters are good,biryani is very tasty,apparently chicken biryani was awesome(my friend tried it),but one biryani for two is not at all enough. ANDHRA veg meals :D!!!really liked it. we get more quantity with veg meals than a ALU biryani. Looks like they recently introduced SPL veg biryani,which isn't that special nor that tasty. :|

Author: Prateek Baurai
Description:
My first visit to this restaurant is for a office lunch and from then it has become one of my frequent restaurant .....One should never miss chicken lollipops and boneless chicken biryani..........served in banana leaves this restaurant has it's own delicacy when comes to service. Excellent service,very cooperating staff and awesome food.
Boneless chicken biryani - 5 star
P.S: don't think i am exaggerating just try once and you will review the same :)

Author: Debasish Mahapatra
Description:
After office hours....fighting through the traffic....attack of deadly hunger pangs ....and above all biriyani crave....dats our story of one crazy evening.....
Heard a lot about them and also featured in brilliant biriyanis....so the occasion was right to try out this place....
first the place is huge..its a 2 Storied building and hugely crowded...the ambience is not anything fancy..they serve the food on banana leaves which was a new thing for me ....its easily findable thanks to its road side location...we easily got a table and soon were browsing through the menus.....for the starters we ordered their day special and for the mains we went for special meghna biriyani and boneless chicken biriyani....the best thing about this place...the service and the staff...service is super fast....we didnt even had to wait for 5 mins for our order....the starter was finger licking good...12 medium sized tender boneless chicken pieces with a medium spicy flavour and a taste of thousand wonders....next came our biriyanis which I was eagerly waiting for. The biriyani is different from the usual hyderabadi style as the chicken pieces are mostly boneless marinated with the best spices and not mixed with the biriyani rice....although I was expecting the Hyderabad style biriyani but I wasnt disappointed at all ...the very first bite I had ...and I was in a different world....it was spicy as expected and masala was evenly spread....we ate voraciously like gluttons but still couldn't finish the entire dinner....
We were like two pythons after having a huge meal....not able to move to our sides even....nyways it was really an awesome biriyani treat for the evening and the prices are also not that high ....a normal dinner for two will not cost more than 500 bucks .....full marks to the courteous and polite staff too.
Sad part is they don't have home delivery to my area...otherwise it would have been a biriyani fest at my place ....
Will go with a straight 4.5 ...
Nice dining done..😁😁😁

Author: Krishna V
Description:
Good place and good food. Overall we liked it. Taste is good. Special in andhra style. Ambience is also very good. 

Good place for friend outing. Service is also good..

Author: Piyush Mohanty
Description:
Been to this place for lunch !
I liked the way they serve that's unique Andra style . They do cook north indian food but things are too spicy . Speciality is prawn biriyani
Loved the veg shek kabab

Author: Chinmayee Panda
Description:
Everything is special here.thinking of asking the recipe for boneless chicken biryani.really yummy 😋.
I may have went nearly hundred times but never found a dish which will not be tasty.

Author: Jamila Murabbi
Description: Very tasty boneless Chicken Biryani!! The portion was big enough with a modest price. Ambience is just fine, nothing extraordinary but the food does the talking 😀 it's very close to my house, plan to go there often

Author: Rashmi Anand
Description: Best biryani that I have tasted so far in Bangalore. One must try their boneless chicken biryani. Tastes delicious. This place is always filled and one must wait to get to the tables. But I must say worth all the wait when to get to taste their yummy biryani.

Author: Saatvik Singh
Description: Meghana is known to be the Paradise Biryani of Bangalore! The place specializes in Biryani and thus has a large variety to make you spoiled for choice. The Biryani here(choose any kind) is simply awesome. Beware of the quantity too, as they serve large portions. Apart from Hyderabadi style biryani, the North Indian gravy dishes in chicken/paneer are also good.

Author: Foo Dee
Description: One of the few brands in Bangalore which does authentic style biryani. Chicken, mutton, boneless, special...lot of options to keep you interested for many repeat visits. Chicken kalmi good option for starter. Decor is decent, and not trying to be anything fancy. The food speaks for itself.

Author: Bhargava Krishna
Description:
Been here for few times when ever i visited Bangalore.. Rush place with people mainly biryani lovers.. Ambience is ok.. service is gud.
Other than Spl fish fry other dishes here are tasty.. Particularly chicken related items..

Author: Mayank Kinger
Description:
I have been to their brigade road outlet which turned out to be little pushy lunch given the weekend rush so this time thought to try their marathalli outlet and got it delivered through swugigy.

Their signature boneless chicken biryani which was pretty decent for a hyderabadi biryani though I found chicken pieces were lil tight.

It was one of the biryani craving days for me and it served the purpose bang on. It had a good amount of spices and quantity was more than enough for a person. Though my demand of some extra chutney was not entertained. Hence the three stars.

Delivery was prompt thanks to swiggy.

Author: Harsh Sinha
Description: Went there for team lunch and i found their chicken spicy biryani just too good !! It is quite big also but most of the time its crowded!! Well if u are a biryani lover then u should give a try to this place !!!

Author: Bikram Muduli
Description: I thought this was quite over hyped... heard a lot about this food chain but i didn't find it that way... meghana biryani was the most talked item but i found it rather very spicy with less pieces of chicken... could improve a bit in this matter...

Author: Sachidanada Prabhu
Description: A nice restaurant, Ambiance is good. Food taste is reasonable for the cost. The biriyani, too good. Too much crowded in evening time. you can visit once if you love biriyani's.

Author: Devbrat Mishra
Description:
Went here with my friend for lunch during weekends. Ohh goosh wat a crowd !
They serve best biryani in the town. Rice are well cooked and masala is well mixed to give the complete brownish texture. They served it hot .
Interiors is very good unlike that of koramangala. If you are in Bangalore and you are a some spicy biryani lover then don't miss this place. Cost wise its a bit costly.

Overall rating
Food :5/5
Ambiance: 4.5/5
Value for money :4/5

Author: Vijay Gaikwad
Description: Andhra style south Indian briyanis. Taste wasn't that good. Briyani rice is cmon for veg,egg,checking cken briyanis.Ambience is good.Service is good Quantity is also good.

Author: Abhishek Chandak
Description: I have been here twice for dinner and had Veg Biryani both the times and it tasted superb. The quality of rice and the sides are amazing and the service is also decent. Do try out as a very good option for Biryanis around Whitefield.

Author: Nitin
Description: This place is now my favourite. Every time I go here and try something - I am amazed. They have good food and even their meals are amazingly simple and satisfying.

Author: Abhishek Ranjan
Description:
Visited this place randomly for an early lunch with friends. We had to wait good 30 minutes before we could get a table. We ordered boneless Chilly Chicken and Chicken Biryani (played safe). The amount they serve is a lot for one person. But biryani was delicious. Ambiance is okayish.
Not much hyped so people tend to ignore it. But its a decent place for a quick lunch at a reasonable rate.

Author: Sonali Nanda
Description: My favourite joint in Bangalore for biryani...They are definitely one of the best in town...have been visiting this place for team lunch a couple of times and every time thr biryani has stood out...If u r a fan of spicy food then meghna biryani should be top one in ur list

Author: Pradeep
Description: Their Biriyani stood out among all the dishes. My favorite being mutton and boneless chicken Biriyani here andhra meals are worth mentioning esp the tamarind thick sauce which they served in a small bucket for meals. Not sure of the dish name but it was divine. Must visit for their unique style of Biriyani. Their daily specials are not very worth trying the country chicken curry was full of bones and bit bland. Will definitely visit again for their mouth watering Biriyani and meals.

Author: Ruchi Sk
Description: I don't even want to waste my time writing a review.But absolutely ignorable place.Expect for the biryani which is average,all d thing we ordered were below average.

Author: Gautham Rajkumar
Description:
Meghna here is very big. Two storied. But still huge rush. We went on a Friday n couldn't find place for almost 20 minutes.

The service was quick. We ordered boneless chicken biriyani n guntur chicken. As usual biriyani was spicy. Boneless chicken was good but biriyani was ok. Guntur chicken was best one I have had in meghna.

Veg meals was usual nothing extra ordinary. Ordered lime soda sweet n salt. Wasn't good at all. Overall experience is above average.

Author: Dinesh Sekar
Description: The chicken briyani is amazing! The quantity was a let down though. The service was very mediocre. The price was not expensive. All in all a must visit for the food.

Author: Malay Kumar Khawas
Description:
Ambience is okay, friendly staffs, nice Biryani, if you like very spicy Hyderabadi one. Rice quality is good, used in Biryani.
I like this and generally go at 7pm to grab a quick Biryani.

Author: Sarika
Description: Very bad service...waiters don't know how to behave with customers...if  you complaint to manager instead of taking some action again the waiter they start making excuses and does not make any effort to improve the service. Even to get a menu card you have to tell them 2-3 times and wait for 10-15 mins. Not at all recommended to go there. You will send up spoiling your mood.

Author: Saikat Patra
Description: U will get confuse when u can't see meat in the biryani...but this is meghana style...they will give biryani rice in different plate and meat in different... Spicy and dum....seriously it is very spicy but taste is superb...u can't leave it.

Author: Nishanth V Anand
Description: Firstly I Never thought it would be so crowded. Had to wait for a lil time. I being a  vegetarian ordered veg biryani. All I got was a bowl of colored rice with a small potato on top of it. The taste was good but the real ambiguous question was "was it worth the money?" The ambience is good and so is the service. Having food in a banana leaf was the happiest part.

Author: Anand Balagopal
Description: Meghana combined with swiggy was our quick fix for today's dinner. Had ordered 2 roti and 2 garlic naan and a kadai paneer. Roti and naan was nicely made. The kadai paneer Gravie was really nice with so much of paneer. Have never seen any Gravie with so much paneer. The cost was also reasonable!swiggys delivery was right on time!

Author: Manjary
Description: It was time for our Friday team lunch and everybody unanimously voted for Meghana's. Those who are regular to Meghana's can imagine the scene for a friday afternoon. People sitting, standing, leaning etc in every possible direction waiting for their table. Fortunately, we had booked well in advance and got our table as soon as we reached there. We ordered lots and lots of biryani and wasn't disappointed. Taste was amazing and service was prompt. I adore their "banana leaf for plate" theme. Would be visiting again very soon.

Author: Urvashi Soni
Description: Just after some weekend shopping we crossed this place around 10 at night. They had limited options available in veg at that time. We ordered veg hyderabadi and veg biryani and tandoori. Service was okay and so was the ambience. Every item in our plate was up to the mark but what made our day was that simple looking biryani which was unbelievably tasty. I will surely dine in there just for the biryani.

Author: Deepak
Description:
For people in Bangalore who enjoyed Andhra Biryani from Nagarjuna, Nandini, Sridevi, etc. This is one place which serves authentic Hyderabadi Biryani.
The Meghana Special is my personal favourite. I'd am yet to try their meals. most of the time I stick with their specialty biryani and starters.

Author: Varun
Description:
So let me start by saying that I grew up in Hyderabad, eating various types of biryani. This is the place I go to when I need to full-fill my biryani craving! My favorite choice, is the boneless chicken biryani and the chicken 65. This is done to perfection and rest assured will full-fill your biryani crave!

Tip: Book a table in adavnce, and avoid going here for lunch on a Friday. If you do decide on a Friday, make sure you get there before 1pm. #ThankMeLater ;)

Author: Padmini Mellacheruvu
Description:
If you know me, then you know I love foraging for Biryani :D. And hands down this is the best place for just that. I've been to this place many times have always ordered nothing but biryani, and was never disappointed.
The price is very affordable and the service is fast. So this place is a must visit for sure.

Author: Vineesh Vinayan
Description:
Have been ordering during Fridays as my work place is in Ecospace Bellandur, same authentic flavor and taste as the Residency road branch,.. love it..

Must try for the seafood lovers... Prawns biriyani.. It's different from what you might have had in other restaurants, all time favorite boneless chicken biriyani

Author: Ila
Description: Only resort for near by office .. We always end up ordering in late shift ... Decent pricing decent food .. Nothing spicy .. Worth they money ..

Author: Sneety Sahu
Description:
Yummiliscious chicken kebabs! !! And amazing biryanis! ! A MUST TRY FOR ALL...good amount of quantity and reasonable price.
Best place to go when running out of money and you really want to hog on some delicious hyderabaadi cuisine.

Author: Sidhumohan Kc
Description: Visited the place today for a dinner with my food Buddy. Being a famous place for Biriyani we ordered Special Meghana biriyani (chicken) along with Kalmi kabab. Kalmi kabab was delicious. Service guys were not so great as they they put the whole Biriyani altogether to my banana leaf. But guys the quantity of Biriyani is so much that I couldn't finish. I suggest to buy one biriyani and share if you are couples and if not satisfied try a different one. I started with a whole load of Biriyani on my leaf.  Special Biriyani comes with chicken on the top and boneless. Tasted a bit different than usual and the rice was perfectly cooked for Biriyani. Altogether it was a tasty experience. There are some new dishes listed which I definitely need to try out which are Mutton liver Biriyani and Mutton kheema Biriyani. Will definitely visit again for these new dishes ;)

Author: Mrinal Jain
Description:
Biryani here is awesome.try veg biryani and the veg thali is also good.
This I the best place to have biryani in marathalli. The best family place.

Author: Paridhi Pachisia
Description: Heard a lot about Meghana Biryani  before, but it was quite disappointing experience. Very Bad service, Bad food.Meal was not all good, biryani was ok.

Author: SF 4A
Description: Never order online nor buy any thing veg.. Biriyani is OK only . one can have rarely at this place if you like hyderabadi biriyani...interior is OK and most of the time it is crowded...

Author: Nidhin
Description: Since it was hell crowded we opted for take away. . The food was well packed. . The food remained hot till we reached home. . The taste and flavor was well preserved

Author: Gourav Sachdeva
Description:
Originally a 3.5 on my rating scale, this has been downgraded to 2.5 now. I don't know for sure but I suspect it to be a across outlet problem for Meghna (since I had a similarly bad experience at the Meghna MG road outlet too). Known for their quality and lip smacking biryanis once upon a time, Meghna has now degraded to such a low level that their biryanis taste like boiled rice! I overlooked the first instance as a quality slippage but same thing happening twice must indicate something else, right?

An it's not just a particular type of biryani that's suffered the brunt, all of them have degraded (I have experienced it for Veg, Meghna Special and Chicken biryanis. Also for prawn curry).

I would now rate 'Biryani House' to be better than this without doubt now.

Author: Mohit Sharma
Description: Good place to try biryani..heard a lot about meghana so paid a visit, not at all disapointed..tried mutton dum biryani which was flavourful , rice was fluffy and no trace of oil.. will visit again

Author: Amit Dokania
Description: Ordered a mutton biryani for home delivery - had some/portion of the biryani (which was good), and noticed a fly in the packet. A good biryani which is unhygienic is absolutely  unacceptable and very poor!!

Author: Tapish @The.Bored.Panda
Description: Being a North Indian and a Vegetarian, it was difficult for me decide on the menu. They served with traditional South Indian style (like on leaves), which I definitely liked. We ordered Veg and Paneer Biriyanis and they were well prepared and neatly served. Only thing which left me surprised was, they didn't provide the spoons at first. We looked around and no one was actually having or using them. We called for someone and asked for spoons, and the people around were amazed. Being a North Indian, I dont have a habit and comfort of eating without spoons. Anyway, the Biriyanis were mouth watering!

Author: Ankita Mohanty
Description: The specialty of this place is it's biriyani. I had both chicken and prawn biriyani and they were amazing. Fast service,  table reservations is required. Ambience is okay but the place is pocket friendly.

Author: Rajiv Vaddi
Description:
Unique and amazing taste of Biryani makes you fall for it and it keeps you visit again !

But for those who wants more spicy will be a little disappointment for them.

It will be always very crowded and you should wait for atleast 5-10min to have a seat.

Overall its good to have Restaurant

Author: Rakesh Kumar
Description:
Hi,

I am a pure veggie. Meghana has limited menu in veg. Don't ever try out on a weekends. Quantity and quality has to be compromised on weekends and Fridays.
Mixed response I have faced on multiple occasions. OK to try out the veggie

Author: Gaurav Chopra
Description: It s located at a decent place. Very good for Family hangouts. They serve ina a diffrent manner.Food is very good specially Meghna boneless Biryani 😋😋.

Author: Srividya Vaddadi
Description: The choice of side dish is very less here for vegetarians and when it comes to Vegetable biryani we cannot find any vegetables in it. It might be famous here in Bangalore but I belong to Andhra and I've tasted much delicious and quality biryanis than this. The space  in this outlet, taste, ambience is much better than it'z koramangala outlet.

Author: Nitin Hajela (hajela.in)
Description:
En route to late night Sunday movie show , we took a dinner break at Meghna food situated on a crowded side lane of marathalli .
 Finding a car parking is a uphill task if one wish to dine here.
After sorting our parking issues we finally  reached the venue.. The ambiance was decently good like any other Andhra dining place.

Since we were in a hurry , we ordered vegetarian meals and two side dishes namely chicken Sindhura and pepper chicken.

The meal was good and we all related the pepper chicken and the Sindhura chicken too.

The place is known for its array of biryanis and we intend to visit again for our share soon.

They also served a slightly sour chutney in basket ( you can check my photos )

Author: Murali Sahukara
Description:
Meghana Foods is known for consistently belting out their version of the Hyderabadi style Biriyani. I dropped in at this outlet of Meghana Foods at closing time on a Sunday night on my way back from the airport hoping to takeaway some Biriyani for dinner.

The staff was already winding up everything and obliged to my request for two Chicken Boneless Biriyanis to be parcelled. The biriyani was ready and packed in 15 min for which I paid INR 390.

By the time we reached home (about 30 min), the biriyani was still warm. It was delicious as expected with its succulent pieces of chicken doing the magic and the Raita in the parcel went well with the Biriyani. Not a fan of their Salan, so just tried a little bit of it.

The biriyani filled my starving belly at the 11th hour and thanks to the Meghana staff, I did not have to go hungry that night!

On a scale of 5, my ratings are:
A. Food - 4.5
B. Service - 5.0
C. Ambiance - 3.0
D. Wait Time - 4.5
E. Value for Money - 4.5

With an overall rating of 4.0!

I recommend this outlet of Meghana Foods to anyone looking for a biriyani treat. The quality of food is almost at par with their Koramangala outlet, so have no questions about that, but don't expect a great ambiance.

Author: Manjunath Srinivasa
Description: Wish there was zero, Meghana Foods don't deserve even 1 rating, Last evening ordered for Meghana Special Non Veg Biriyani which was delivered late on top of the same was spoiled after few bites noticed bad smell. This morning I have a bad throat😡 now I have to spend on doctor, People who pack the food would definitely notice the bad smell yet sent it, you guys don't care about customers health😡 just bothered about making quick money.

Author: Vinay A.k.a Thindipotha - V!n@y!$m
Description:
We had ordered for dinner for about 12 of us from here a while ago. Out of the dozen, we were the only 2 vegetarians. While we were against having biriyani from this place as we assumed this was a place for the meat eaters, we ended up ordering from here as we did not want to experiment anything new and stay hungry :).
We still don't regret this decision of ordering from here. We dug into the delicious long grained rice in the biriyani and became fans! The vegetables and rice were cooked in
delicate masala and was a bomber! This also came with a tasty gravy and some very horrible tasting , sourest raitha that I have ever tasted in my life! I wonder how people who pay so much attention to taste of the biriyani did not pay attention to the raitha!
Anyway, good place to order from..go on and dig in :)

Author: Prateek Thakur
Description: It's a good place for biryani fan. Not too costly, service and spicy biryanis are too good. They serve in banana leaves, which I liked. Place is always crowded but you will get table within 20 mins. Do try chicken boneless biryani..😉

Author: Varun
Description:
Well I just came back from dinner at Meghana Foods, Marathalli and thought of writing a review right away, as first impressions are also the lasting impressions..

Definitely, not a good place for vegetarians. I ordered Chilly Paneer in starters and what was served was actually a mixture of Chillies and Paneer dipped in a vessel of oil. In maincourse, they didn't have Paneer Butter Masala, which was apparently one of the very few Paneer items on menu in vegetarian curries. Had to order Veg Kolhapuri, which was again a mixture of some vegetables drenched in a pool of oil..A very bad experience on vegetarian front, though my Non-Vegetarian friends seemed to be enjoying their Biryanis..

Author: Ravi Kiran
Description:
It is fine even if bad restaurant is not reviewed but a good one needs to be reviewed ..a honest foodie!

There isn't every weekend that I would live without tasting there fab biryani!

This place is for the people who just want eat biryani without bothering about the ambiance..They offer a couple of different varieties in biryanies..
though it is not the best biryani but it needs to tried at least one if u r in blgr.

The birayani is very well cooked but not best basmathi rice used,spices are mixed properly,a little spicy though but well balance overall.This is not pure hyderabadi style of making biryani.It is a mix of nawabi and  coastal andhra style of making biryani.They provide boneless chicken just the way people want it without additional charge.

Must try items 
Chicken boneless biryani - Little spicy but good(red color)
Chicken special biryani - Just the right amount of spicy and tasty too.(yellow color + boilled egg inside mixed)

Pricing:5/5 (excellent)
Quantity:3.5/5
Ambiance:3/5
Crew:4/5

Author: Subbaraju Indukuri
Description: Another restaurant where I just have been here as a take away customer. Non veg starters are really awesome. Leaf chicken, maharaja chicken and gongura chicken are best among the starters. Coming to the main course, it is a good place for biryani lovers. I love the biryani here especially meghana special biryani is yummy tasty with medium spicy. Definitely a must try place!

Author: Prafulla Deori
Description: Love the food out there. Very tasty, good amount of quantity, good service, reasonable price & nice place for lunch & dinner.  You should definitely try Meghana's Spl Briyani. Definitely you wil love it.

Author: Ishan Nayak
Description: Very poor service. Staff behaviour is below standard. Quality of food is not that great but OK type. If you are visiting prefer it when less crowded.

Author: Ashish Mundada
Description:
One of the renowned places in Bangalore for Biryani.

A place thats always crowded.

I went to this place on a friday. It took me 25 minutes to get the table. i was lucky.

The service was quick. I ordered one Paneer Tikka masala. Fish fry.

Paneer biryani. Chicken dum biryani and Cold drinks.

Paneer tikka masala had fresh paneer.

The biryani Paneer was Golden fried. The Biryani rice was topped with good quantity of Paneer.

The chicken biryani was good too(As said by a friend)

The captain was a little rude.

Overall Good eating experience.

Below is my rating.

Ambiance: 3/5

Quality: 4/5

Quantity: 4/5

Service: 3.5/5

Value for money: 4/5

A good place to visit only for Biryani's.

Author: Ramesh Katakam
Description: u must try paneer biryani. they serve one of the best in city but if u want to try it then u must go only on weekday not on weekend because on weekends the hotel is so much busy that they won't cook well.

Author: Mohammed Zeeshan
Description: Over a longtime my friends were pushing me to dine here, I took a step bravely. Just to taste it's chicken boneless briyani, which i have heard a lot about. After tasting this Chicken boneless briyani, i couldn't see any other stuffs much appealing to me which I will like to try out for. Chilly Fish among the starters was quite good.

Author: Mayank Mehta
Description: Sudden Biryani cravings got us to go to Meghana Biryani. It was Saturday night and the place was jam packed. We got Chicken Biryani and Chili Egg packed. The chicken was spicy, but really tasty and the quantity of the rice was enough for two. The chili egg was..meh. It is friendly on the pocket. I will definitely try this place again for their Biryani

Author: Pallab Saha
Description: This is the worst Meghana outlet i had ever ordered from... I ordered at 12:55pm for 3 chicken biryani and 2 prawns biryani (total bill 970/-)..promised delivery in 45mins..order did not reach by 1pm.. After making repeated calls (every time it was 5mins away) the order finally came at 1:25pm and the order that came was 1 chicken biryani and 1 some other biryani.. But the bill came from the packet was of same 970/-... They promised another 5 mins (which could have been another 1hr as before)... WE CANCELLED THE ORDER!!!!! Will never order from Meghana Marathalli... Meghna kormangla is much better.. Never had this experience!!!!!

Author: Sohom Majumdar
Description: Probably the best place for Hyderabadi Biriyani. The food is not too spicy, so North Indians can enjoy, and it isn't too bland for South Indians (especially Andhra guys) to cry that it's tasteless. Curries are good enough too, but was disappointed with Kulcha. Moreover, if I visit Meghana, it would be mostly for Biriyani.

Author: Gijo George
Description: Love their biriyani ! Do feel it to be a tad spicy at times but nevertheless it worth the price and the hype !! They also have a great collection of chicken starters !

Author: Chirag Saxena
Description: Now that you guys have already deleted my comment once... I'll take up this once again...Worst place ever to dine out or order... Pathetic service.... No cleanliness... Tasteless food... And that's not all.... They serve COCKROACHES too... Not one but there were many of them.

Author: Rameshwari Sah
Description:
Nice place
Must try items:
1. Meghna's spcl biryani
2.  Chicken Boneless biryani
3. Kalmi Kabab
Other starters are good
Prices are also decent.

Suggestions: Should start home delivery in kundalahalli area too.

Author: Amitesh Datt
Description:
BIRYANI - for me its heaven on earth..
Well I was new in Bangalore when one of friend asked me have you tried meghana foods and I was no man, is it nice....
His expression at point of time was amazing😁
He told me try it and then we went and I tried and I ate a good tasty BIRYANI after a loooong time

Well that place is very special because I have many memories in meghana's!!!!
The amount of food quantity and the quality they offer in that price range is just so amazing 😊😊
Heavenly place for BIRYANI lovers!!
And my personal advice to eat over there with hands not spoon that's the time you will get the real taste of BIRYANI ..
Everyone should try it once!!!

Author: Meena Rajput
Description:
If you like biriyani this could be right place to test. Good ambience, with great variety of biriyanies.

Meghana serves the kind of biriyani that gives you cravings later. You will find yourself licking your lips, days later..at some odd timing in the day and then resolve to self "got to have that biriyani again". Yes. it is that good. I was also hoping that they would serve in Banana leaves, which would have made the experience more authentic. Sadly, all we got were white plates.

Author: Smarajeet Mohanty
Description: I have been to this place many times ... I have tried some other meghna outlets too in kormangla and brigade road .....all there biryani is very gud, so is in this one.... Staff ...also always there for you ... But the place gets really crowded on weekends .... You have to wait quite sometime to get a table .... If you r in marathalli try it out ...its good and light on pocket too .... For dinner and lunch on weekends ....

Author: Raman
Description: We have been there few there few times their chicken biryani served in banana leaves that's a special, biryani was okay not so great .one can try it out once.Service is not good.Ambiance is fine.

Author: Shrimant Chakrabarti
Description:
I went here in one of the weekdays to enjoy my friend's treat. We  had tandoori chicken and chicken biryani. 
Well, to tell you the food, sometimes, more than the taste of the food, the way it is presented to the customer really gives so much impression that they get carried away by this very fact and enjoy it. This place is one of those places, which I think, believe in this fact.
The food was good and in par with the food hub (Kritunga, Hyd. Biryani, Biriyani Zone and others) that you can find in the area (Marathalli), but, yes, their way of serving food on banana leaves really impressed me and my friends! 
I can rate this place more in between 3 to 3.5, but still, I am giving them 3 because I feel like giving them ratings based on relativity with respect to  the other food hubs in the area I just named, especially, Kritunga, is better than this place. (My point of view!)

Author: Panda Pritesh
Description:
Nice Biryani's and quick service .. we went there to grab a quick meal with frnds .
we were a little disappointed at the hygiene but not disappointed with food.
We tried mutton biryani and it was served hot , mutton chunks were cooked perfectly and rice was very soft.
Value for money  - Yes !
Next Visit -Yes Soon!

Author: Sayantika Bhattacharya
Description:
Had heard a lot about Meghana foods and decided to give it a try. I love the spicy biriyanis and thus thought of giving it a try as heard praises of the biriyanis they prepare.
I had ordered the chicken biriyani and told to make it a bit more spicy and had got it home as a 'take away'.
The look was enticing, but when I tasted it fell below my expectation. The biriyani rice as well as the meat was cooked to perfection but it was less on chilli and a bit sweet according to my taste. But I still want to order another type of biriyani from them to make sure of the taste.

Author: Vasanthi Kakarla
Description: biryani is awesome. Ambience is not so good.The place is mostly crowded.But the food in this place has value for the  money you put. They serve on banana leaves which is a bit uncomfortable.

Author: Kini
Description: Pathetic delivery service. The restaurant promises free delivery within 3 kilometres vicinity but fails to deliver on this promise. They always seem to find some excuse or the other. It's high time they change their tagline on the 3kms home delivery promise. It's a shame that they don't value customers. The management should definitely change this note which they promise if that can't live upto their words. Really disappointing and pathetic.

Author: Avinash Yadav
Description: Meghan's Foods is a delightful place for culinary inclined folks. The entire range of food is good and biryani are among the best there is. I have tried their Andhra style chilly chicken and found it to be great. Their mutton pepper and chicken kababs are good as well. All in all a nice place near Marathahalli for great food and best is they deliver too.

Author: Sailesh
Description: Pretty decent food at not so bad rates! Highly recommended for a starving bunch on a tired afternoon! (Especially after a failed attempt to get into Absolute Barbecue) :p

Author: Madhusmita Padhy
Description:
Was longing to visit this place after knowing a bollywood movie was shot here and of course for their positive word of mouth about biryanis.
And I had to try after they opened an outlet near my residence in marathahalli.
So it wasn't a rumour after all..They do serve amazing biryani :)
Other items we ordered also tasted just right.
But somehow I found it lacking in their service.. Probably coz its overcrowded.
One can definitely go back again n again for having their Biryanis.

Author: Arun Prasad M
Description: Ok, Hands down one the best biryani in Bangalore for me. Anytime you visit this place i get fresh and hot biryanis. Their starters are good, north indian dishes are good, meals is also fine. Consistency is what i like about them, they haven't changed the taste much for years i get the same old taste when they started in Koramangla. Good value for money and would keep visiting again & again.

Author: Dipendra Rajpal
Description: Meghna foods.. popularly knows as Meghna Biryani :)  Awesome food, nice ambience, spicy biryani. They have varieties of biryani. I have tried chicken biryani, boneless biryani, fish biryani, paneer biryani and meghna special. liked it. The place is too much crowded and mostly on weekends you have to wait for your turn. I even tried panner butter masala and chilly paneer but seems just some other gravy. Fir biryani lovers spc in whitefield area this is indeed the best place.

Author: Monalisa Dohare
Description:
Its quite near to my place. Good biriyani.
The serve it on banana leaves, that makes it look very traditional Hyderabadi  cuisine.
The biriyani is good as well as other foods.
Good service.
Satisfied... :)

Author: Atul Gurale
Description:
If you love biryani then this is the place you should try. I bet you can never hate or dislike their biryani. Just one word Awesome.
Quality and quantity are above expectations.
I love their biryani and would definitely recommend all biryani lovers to try it atlest once.

Author: Aparna Srikantan
Description:
Starters were pretty Good , but not up to the expectations.
Veg Curries were total disaster. Vegetarian pls do not opt. My NV friends were also not happy. 
RISK IT!!!!!!

Author: Saurav Das
Description: Birayani here is something to savour. However, the spice factor is little on the higher side. Firday afternoon is severely crowded. However, if you still manage to find a place, dont forget to order for the Mutton Biriyani, if you really are into spice, then order for double masala. Rest of the menu is just a filler. Service is average and below. Tipping extra to a regular might ensure you a better place next time.

Author: Kanchan Chakraborty
Description: It’s a very nice place to have spicy food. Meghana Foods is well known for their testy Biryanis but we enjoyed the other dishes too. You guys should visit this place for their Biryani for sure, the service is average and ambiance is good.

Author: Sadashivnagar Sadashivnagar
Description: The most AWFUL service at Meghana MARATHALLI you will ever come across. We were very excited to order at Meghanas keeping the hype about the same everywhere. However first of all they never answered the call for at least 30 mins and when they did the guy over the phone was so blunt and rude as if they are doing a favor providing us food. And when asked that you have to be courteous enough to speak properly he banged the phone. That was really really sad for such kind of upcoming brand doing this. We will never order here, they are not the only good Biriyani restaurant in whole of Bangalore.

Author: Nikhil Malhotra
Description:
Very Good, infact the best Biryani in marathahalli.
I tried their special chicken and fish Biryani. 
Both were very good. Not much spicy and quite flavorful.

Author: Varsha Ghosh
Description:
One of the best biriyanis I have ever had in my life! I tried the Meghana special Biriyani in which the chicken pieces are cooked in egg and the Boneless chicken biriyani which was on the spicy end but still yummy nevertheless. 

A must try for every Biriyani lover! :D

Author: Ami Bhat
Description:
When we had been to the restaurant, we had totally enjoyed the biryani and basis the same, recommended home delivery for a house party with friends. The home delivery was a mix of veg and non veg starters and biryani. The same was a complete disappointment.

The delivery was on time and the order correct but the same was not labelled properly at all. There was total confusion on the same. The veg biryani and chicken biryani was just biryani rice without any vegetables or chicken pieces. (Not a single piece.)

Will definitely not be ordering from the place again .

Author: Shaheer Shahab
Description: It's actually hard to differentiate between the taste of so many of these Andhra joints. Anyways, this place is no different either. Good food, nice biryani (like every other place). Although there's nothing xtraordinary to crave about it or make you especially visit this place. If you are close by or want a change from your go to restaurant, may be give it a try. It's a safe bet.

Author: Suman Sourav
Description: Before you start going through all the reviews I would kindly request you to note one point. Please do not have anything before visiting this place if you dont want your food to be wasted. I had one lassi and then ordered for a biryani and even before having the half of the biryani both my stomach and my body gave up. A good example of quantity with quality. The biryani tastes great and not just non veg ones, but even the Veg paneer biryanis.

Author: JayaChandra Vissamsetti
Description: Brilliant spicy food is the short answer for this restaurant. We were at this place on Friday afternoon around 12:30 PM, at 1 PM this place became very crowded and people are fighting for tables, despite 2 floors and lot of tables. Food taste is good, proper andhra restaurant with lots of spices and chilly, don't forget to order lassi or sweet lime soda when you go to this restaurant.

Author: Sudeepth Kumar
Description:
Ordered biriyani and naan but the time it came lost the appetite. Anyway managed to take the first bite and found was cold i mean what were they doing then for so much time.When asked waiter and manager address due to AC the food might have become cold but if observed the AC wasnt working only.Service was worst even tge road side food huts give a better service. And the most important part was still to happen, after completing the food we were gossiping and the waiter comes and asked us to leave since he had to leave and that table was under his region so he cant leave until the table is empty. I felt so embarassed infront of my guests didnt want to even argue with them at that moment . Anyone who reads this plz dont visit this store. I am a food junkie and always prefer to try at various places but if compared to the meghna outlet and koramangla and at marathalli its like 10 : -10.
Its really the worst food outlet visited in the last 6 yrs of my stay ay bangalore.
Never recommend it to anyone .

Author: Tapan Kumar
Description: I had biriyani at meghna foods koromangla but here it is quite worse. Service is more worse than expected. If u are looking for authentic biriyani visit koromangla venture. This is my second visit to marathalli store and its worsened from the earlier visit. Plz don't go here look for other options.

Author: Venugopal Reddy
Description: I felt the worst ever than any restaurant.... Service is really poor.....Food got worst taste compared to other Meghana restaurant.... More over that they charge extra for Raitha.....I never suggest anyone to Meghana Marathalli.....if I can rate '0'....I would like to rate....

Author: Ajay Raj Achary
Description:
The food was OK...But the service was worst..No AC turned on n they charge service tax for what....
This would be the last restaurant I would wish to eat....

Author: Chaitanya Shroff
Description: For starters, this is the place which made me fall in love all over again with biriyani. Not that I had not liked it before, but the place in Koramangala first then this one after my office shifted made me like it even more. It is a large place with two flights of stairs and it all smells nice when you enter the place. Only problem is that even on a weekday afternoon, it'll be jampacked and need to wait for a while to get seated. Coming to the food now, I like kalmi and chicken 65 here. They are my favourite chicken starters. Another thing I like more is prawns fry. We have been here like four times on different occasions and have always taken chicken boneless biriyani. The spice mix is really yum and goes reall well with the evenly cooked rice. Over the time though, the quality of biriyani rice has gone down and makes it more harder to complete one full pack of it. The service is pretty zippy and price is moderate. Always check the daily specials here, they usually are good. If they can get more consistent over the quality, then the time spent here can definitely be more satisfying and worth the wait.

Author: Shabnam Asif Anwar
Description: Pick, go and eat... I ate it alone but still enjoyed ... I Loved the Biryani! - Tried 'Chicken boneless biryani'... The raita served alongwith was equally good.

Author: Shruti
Description:
Meghana Foods certainly lives up to the hype and offers a wide range of Andhra delicacies and some kick-ass biryani. I've tried Meghanas at two other joints in Bangalore but I've never really enjoyed it. The Marathahalli outlet was successful  in changing my views altogether.

So, a friend and I took a break from work and were starving by the time we entered Meghanas. We ordered a chicken boneless biryani and a sweet lassi and sweet lime soda for drinks. The boneless biryani is really something else. You need to try it to believe it. The chicken pieces are tender and it's just the right kind of spice - the kind of spice that doesn't overpower the taste of the rice and the chicken. We found that the quantity was slightly insufficient for two people and decided to go in for another round. The sight of another big bowl of fresh, hot biryani brought out the gluttons in us and we ended up devouring the whole thing with raita and onions, in less than 10 minutes.

We paid Rs. 460 for two biryanis and two drinks and got ourselves a good deal. Service was prompt and the servers were also courteous. All in all, a great place for some really tasty food. Definitely going back! :)

Author: Kalyan Kumar B
Description: I have been to this place several times with friends and team members. Huge fan of the non-veg starters here- especially Kalmi kabab. I have heard that the veg starters are decent as well. Chicken biriyani is good, although a little bland( but you can always ask for extra masala). It is extremely crowded even on weekdays, but service is not bad at all. Best part is - they serve the food on banana leaves!

Author: Soumya
Description:
Reached here for a Sunday lunch but it was so crowded that we decided to order takeaway.
Ordered 2 boneless chicken biryani and the quantity is good.The chicken comes in a different packet.It was spicy , well flavoured but nothing different from some biryani places.

Author: Sudeshna Roy
Description: I ordered butter chicken and naan. It was not good. In butter chicken, the pieces of chicken was brunt black from one side and the gravy was very oily, not good either. Each of the naan was of different shapes of triangle and half circles, never saw a restaurant like this.

Author: Amit Samal
Description: Awesome food, really loved the meghna special biriyani, a must visit place, but do keep in mind it's quite crowded even on weekdays as most of the offices nearby flock here for lunch treat.

Author: Reuben Benjamin
Description:
I had visited this place in its first week of opening, and again this week. There has been a visible change in food & service.

Just based on my earlier experience I would've certainly rated it 4.0 or 4.5. Their biryanis were really good back then, really rich & even the quantities were generous. Even their service seemed a bit more professional, and significantly more than most neighboring Hyderabadi biryani joints.

But this time my visit wasn't all that great. There wasn't anything wrong here, just not the same standard I'd walked in expecting. The biryani seemed quite bland for Hyderabadi biryani standards & the serving size was visibly smaller. I also tried their signature Guntur Chicken & Lemon Chicken. The Guntur chicken was quite rich in flavor. The Lemon Chicken wasn't all that great though. It just seemed like regular friend chicken nuggets, only spicier.

I hope they return to their earlier quality & quantity. I'm sure they'll get significantly higher reviews when they do. And I'd be glad to adjust my ratings once that happens.

Author: Abhinav Prakash
Description:
Are you a Biryani fan??
You are at the right place. Chicken boneless biryani is superb here. In addition to these, I have tasted two starters here; Chicken 65 and Chicken Pepper...both were okay.

Ambience is just okay.

P.S: Parking is a problem here, so you need to park at the service road, make sure it's not a No Parking area.

Enjoy the biryani :)

Author: Gnapi Reddy
Description: Pakka andra style restaurant... When ever I think about this restaurant my mouth starts oozing...? food is that yumnnnn!!!! Especially  Meghana special biryani , fried fish, Guntur chicken, n bangalore special chicken.... I'm in love with this restaurent

Author: Shiva Borusu
Description: Tried this just for a visit. Their lollipop biryani is awesome and a must try. The Apollo fish fry is good. Average ambience and overall a good restaurant based on Marathahalli.

Author: Nisheeth Jain
Description: I always love the biranyi here..whether be it chicken boneless or Meghna specially..at both the layouts I had, i.e. Kormanagala and marathalli. But the bad ratings for the services and low courtesy of the staff at Marathalli outlet. So better if you want to have food from here, just get it packed and take home which will save you from their bull***t behavior.

Author: Gajanan Hegde
Description:
Awful Experience . If you are a pure vegetarian don't go there. 
We have ordered veg Manchurian . But whatever they had given had some chicken pieces in it . I think they don't cook veg and non-veg separately.When we asked about this they were telling like somehow it got mixed . 
Food served also not very tasty . It was oily
So please beware if you are a vegan

Author: Gyanapriya Sarangi
Description:
Apart from the biriyani, the other dishes are also up to par. They are well-prepared and you can see a little bit of reservation in terms of spice and oil usage.Flavors are pretty well balanced.

Not extravagant, but good food.
Service is okay even on busy days.

Author: Amith S Bhat
Description: Being a vegetarian, I wasn't particularly Keen on this one since they serve only 2 types of vegetarian biriyanis(veg and paneeer). Oh man, I was so wrong! The veg biriyani served here changed the very perception of biriyanis. The best I've had till date. The other items on the menu don't stand up to the mark, but hey, who cares as long as they serve that piping hot, incredibly spicy, delightful biriyani with a thick raita and masala gravy. I've heard from my non vegetarian  colleagues that meghana special is pretty darn good too. Beware though, huge crowds of IT people will be thronging the restaurant any given day and might take some waiting to get a table.

Author: Siddharth Jain
Description: One of my friend took me once. We ordered one biryani and believe me it was more than enough for both of us. We somehow managed to finish it. But it was very tasty. Overall one of the best biryani in town and it is well known. Ambience is simple and service is good.

Author: Kirti Avinash
Description: I had heard a lot about this place but had never tried it. And one day I landed along with my friends. We ordered the famous special meghana chicken boneless biryani, and it was awesome. I really liked it, its bit different than usual biryani's but its wow. I would seriously advice you to try once.

Author: Himanshu Choudhary
Description: Chicken and fish biryani are good. But avoid paneer biryani here, two of my friends had vomiting after eating it. Lassi is always good here.

Author: Ashutosh Tibrewal
Description: It doesn't have great ambience but got some decent biryani. If you feel to try some andhra biryani this is the place. The paneer in the biryani where soft, huge in size and quantity. The biryani had lots of panner.

Author: Abhi
Description:
Chicken Boneless Biriyani.
Really yummy with juicy tender pieces of spicy chicken. One dish you should order here without having to glance at the menu.
Trust me!!

Author: Avinash Jobs
Description: Sorry to say that got veg in chicken biryani. If veggies get chicken in veg biryani. How they feel .....i felt the same .no words to say this experience

Author: Nimish Joshi
Description: A must visit for the Biryani. Will recommend both Meghana special as well as the spicy Biryani. Chicken 65 as well as Silver chicken is worth a try.

Author: Umang Bhatia
Description: The most pathetic food I have ever eaten and I was shocked because all my friends told me that the biryanni here is awesome. I had a chicken biryanni (home delivered) and suffered 2 days with food poisoning. Maybe they don't maintain the same quality for home delivery, I don't know, but I suggest everyone even if you want to try out the biryanni here ,at least dont  have the chicken of this place

Author: Chaithra Srinivas
Description: People come here to eat biryani...  well I though why to order the usual biryani.  I tried there veg meals and took chicken starters. Amazing food they serve different kinda chutney  which was so yummy that it made forget all about my chicken, Being a hard core non veggie even there veg meals make me wanna go there again and again . The most important was the bill which was so light on my pocket that I can go soon.

Author: Shilpa Mohanty
Description: Superb biryaani..too tasty ? . A must try wen yu r in bangalore ?. The only disadvantage is poor serving facility. Else the food is toooo goood !

Author: Avirneni Vhivek
Description: Awesome experience with delicious food even in veg & non-veg.I had meghana special biryani I shows that its specifically made for me fabulous.even veggie is worth of price.enjoy Andhra delicious food with meghans

Author: Puneet
Description: Brilliant .. a no fuzz place. Even while runnin housefull the food gets to the table in no time. Hot n tasty. Well what else can u ask for from a casual dine place. What more - food apart from their famous biryani is good too :)

Author: Aravind Jayeram
Description:
Late on Sunday morning decided to try Meghana Foods after many recommendations friends and foodies. Was about 1 PM when I visited the place with wifey and my 1 year old son. Was shocked to see the crowd in there and and about good 25 people waiting for their chance to get a table. Thought it was a bad decision to come on this day considering I had a year old kid along with us.  We decided to go ahead and wait it out and have out lunch here.
After good 15-20 mins wait, we were allocated table. Ordered for a Meghana Special biryani, Chillie Prawn fry and a Mutton fry. Also ordered for a coke and lime-soda. After 10 mins, the waiter came and mentioned, mutton dishes are not available any-more and asked for a replacement. We quickly ordered for Naati chicken fry as we did not want to waste any more time with kid getting crankier by the minute.

Chillie Prawn fry was good. Naati Chicken Fry was below average. Meghana Special Biryani was very good. The lime soda never arrived until the end of dinner after requesting the waiter few times. 

Rating 3 only for the Biryani and pricing. Ambience is nothing great to talk about. Service is again average (I would think this might be due to being a Sunday and over crowded).

I might again go just for biryani and definitely not with my young son and not on a Sunday as well.

Author: Somen Mohanty
Description:
I had high expectations from this place knowing the quality of food meghana foods serves in different places. But was a bit disappointed with how things went here.
The service was average, the food quality and flavours were not at par with other outlets. Banana leaf serving was a very good addon to have.

Author: Veera
Description: Its disappointing , didn't have a home delivery facility...I call them for a home delivery after seeing in zomoto..they asked us to come and collect the food...

Author: Gautam
Description: Went for a dinner party. The ambience was not superb it was just okay. Ordered Chicken Lollipop, chicken peeper, chilli chicken for starter.
